## Paxton Probes 30 North Texas Firms
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton [opened an investigation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQhuGrwR0W4B_igmIbd9l2S2tsDxgFQwSzdnL3R3Eu4fSjV898_-7THXzw0f2FHQ29bJoiniUgEeaJ8AWFIDuk4rZUKFnrFywwKaF6Ljou1LSCD--prVYzi3WQFRqptdZy0MOt2gzi3Glhe93oFq2VyzLfFrhZrVqthG0qbz4x0QklpWikrtWgoZMr9gNagFmyVuDqKeWaNrxINrzTgble0l4FsxE9C2v-MDUyNZ7nWT8ww-eNOmXH1Oj33bsM5FNkavzSW94IpsYrx4Eo5Yhv7jBihsAfGPkTXpQijynTxr93G5czP3wBbjP8X7mPBxby7kpX2azP04fgS69ZK9wOPlxE-t2wh1E_AQAA__94spBX) into nearly 30 North Texas businesses accused of using fake "ghost office" addresses to fraudulently sponsor foreign workers through the H-1B visa program. Paxton's office alleges the companies, mostly IT and software firms in Collin County, used vacant "ghost office" addresses to mislead federal immigration authorities about active operations. The [attorney general's office](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuqAkDGRSpLiGbq69EhliQjSZZJT4YHj7FWj3Cbaz7E_25__fY3yADz66v_BCQ58ljRH3EpAI80j4gUKQHVJxayqUlsXPWGCUXPaMd4zL0YIPx3irrZm41aJGI5RSSmil7_Vq5H2SswYptJV2Qttra3veqQ6WvhWoa2_OZbzjUgjeCtVIraATFnuNC8AkqhtH6ynlhla8lJZwpA1zM6dXHcxK9C5V-6eSQyWHfd-bCwKilCMeDiNmCI1LWyWH87tKDhkDQsGz_OHYN8ieGNkbPpQiI3hiYQEdBAYz-XROMjEfNyzkHVytiJDDwVrOYsq0sus8m_4XH7EULHU29r37EHzpVXXj7gU-XPL0u8g3I78CAAD__7R3nMA) named nine companies in its initial legal action, including Tekpro IT LLC, Qubitz Tech Systems LLC, and Virat Solutions Inc. Paxton announced Thursday he is expanding what began as a smaller statewide inquiry, with investigators now seeking business records from the targeted firms. _The[Dallas Morning News](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMpDdhvESONiE7G-6IerBbWjJYGT3DvNvv2Ku8LMKSqVX7-_X_IWc-Fj_4E5e3jHPB101kQiVWeiNVbCsJHXdcpUcIy9UcQYNj1YPrYY5IKfvuW-Cf-owmoa8cc45M7rxV7N5Y6ON-gmLscGaYTQBNS3WObLWxBgb9veYHjQYo61xHYwOBxPoMVJEfBrVawosuXSy0Qcppu_8otIteW-S30TOquxvBZOC6bquLmBKWO8jd0XBdEcFE-87rwWF86FgwiK8JFIwnfiWfLR8vKgKryhU28082xdXbGPBf6EFANs_-qE7t7MpPpwXp8T14VSv1x05fWDkZwpfHv4HAAD__0kxh7M)_ reported the probe centers on Frisco, where the Indian American population has grown from roughly 2% of residents in 2000 to about 33% today.
## Storms Drench Houston, SE Texas
A Flood Watch covering Houston and much of Southeast Texas expired early today after [waves of heavy rain and severe thunderstorms](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQhZ8GOtDYXBwXLrahy7ZbogGPsSWDI3s2hLf_RV7h7450pHP5_j3nJ4YYju0v7mT449J80FkiMVOemT5YGPNGXDafCifnwkoFZwlybGBoQM4WQ7zmvrZmAatFTUYopZTQSj9qb-ChdE-olwfhKHFdcUBHMIz9SsK5pQ7mDoMBpBDQCdVKrXAQlkZNDnERVQ9kA6fcsqfvJBev9Kbcrmmvo_HMr1J1fyo5VXI6z7O90Kd0u5Wc7juVnDBzWCPd0qf_hdPR0MGUS-NiSrZ55XRQs-PVQNcBQA9d63mPdTb2dYYYQxlV1cO2Y4jfYv4drreRPwEAAP__fE2A6g) swept through the region overnight. The National Weather Service issued Severe Thunderstorm Warnings for northern Harris, Montgomery, and Liberty counties as strong cells pushed through on Friday. [A ground stop at Bush Intercontinental Airport](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL9GdGKkAywoVKShc9qUzIEO0EQgj3QY--8z-BfSbLWz-3Z_7sMdffD78o0bWX7NcdjpzIGYKQ1ML8yMaSHOyxozx3n2E2UcQMFNqkYqGBz68B7qwtlRuU4XZLUxxujOdG2x2lE1FaEjM49V7UxrVNeNU2tmmupGt1R4e4WpRoHWqtKmhM5gox3dOpoRRy1qRc5zTCWv9EGawzs-KZVT3IpgV-ZHFtWXgF5Af55nOQU__cIaj8xxv1wC-muWgD7ECYOA_uoU0KvmEi2gX1I8dicdBXxLn_NBTiJLj6t0B0mOktdjd5Qyx7TlIln3OH0IPt-MqNWyoQ8fIP7fjU8LfwEAAP__tguIPg) halted flights for hours at the system's peak. [Overnight totals reached 1 to 2 inches](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQRZ8GOiN7-HEoXGyTLttuiQY8BmsNjuxJHN5-RbRv8HWjo9HVuffPY3qgD_5Yf-NOhj8uTgeVHIiZ0sT0wcyYVuK8bjFzdM4vlHECCYOQvZAwWfThnLramlnaUdVklNZaq1GPt3ozLYC7YW-VnFWn59527dwutpvBAc5S1t5cYbKXoJRslW5g1NgrS8NIDnFWVSfJeo6p4Y2-Si6c8U2pWeJeB7MxP3PV_qrgXsG9lNK4-IFhi6_M8bieLkzIG6UK7v-5cCFGKwrysolC9JcOK1zyFk-RkV_pOnY8xbeqElAnY5_Fh-DzoKtOrjv68FXgnw33NvAvAAD__xy8hF0) across most of Southeast Texas, with isolated spots near 2.5 inches and rainfall rates hitting 2 to 3 inches per hour. No widespread flooding emergencies were confirmed by early Saturday. A storm struck the Hill Country, still recovering from last summer's deadly floods that forced Camp Mystic to remain closed this summer. Forecasters expect cooler, drier weather through the weekend.
## Five Dead in Hill Country Crash
A Cessna 421C airplane crashed near Wimberley late Thursday night, [killing all five people on board](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozAQBdCvMZ2RPSFxXLjYhi7bbokGPAZrDY7sSQh_v1qe9H7glSPNvTq6fx7DA2OK2_wbV3L8CXnYaK-JmKkMTB-sjGUmrvOSK-cQ4kQVB1Bwk-oqFQweYzqGrvFuVN7qhpw2xhhtjb03i6NpROis1vegR42qMx0ZC51FpUcIYxPd_zJ1VaC1umjTgjV41Z5ulgLiqEWnyEfOpeWFTlJIR35Taae8NsktzM8qLr8E9AL6fd_bvy9uc5kF9Oe7gP7bqwX0Ib5JekIvnwk3klPBusg9riOVRIc8Q3KJKckpvzYuh1zwqF_H0RTnn3tMKdabEZ2aV4zppPDPBnw7-BcAAP__QwaGdg) in a deadly aviation accident in the Texas Hill Country. First responders found no survivors at the scene [near Round Rock Road](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2StCAQPQ1mWMCoDAHBl5jNl25otdAotQxMSe-ot99yrrBh93v1_r4e0wNiinn5D0-0dIQyZdxrQiLcJsIDKsG2INVlLZVKCNFhhUkJNXDRc6EmDzGdU9d4OwtvZINWaq21NNrcm9WKuzAonevuctZzGERwXvVmDvJ6utBEe4mJXigpxU3qVhkNvfQ4GAwAs2SdQB-pbC2t-IkU0lneuLWuPJtkV6JXZbd_TI1Mjfu-t98H5AtkarzaMDWm4iAxNa5wXmfPPYLnoaRU9pgX_kqQkbsN6spj5heNu_KT6WRqbDbrX3tMKdZBs04sT4jpY05_m-xt1W8AAAD__wd4gjU) around 11:05 p.m., while a second aircraft in the area landed safely. Witnesses near the rural crash site [reported hearing a loud boom](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ShCAQhU-DmRa0CmNAsInZbLqh1WqrVCFY0DuOt99yrrD5-_ne-3kOT3TehfUbd7L8XuIQ6MyemCkNTG_MjGklzusWM8dlcRNlHECCLmVbShhmdP4ammK2o5w7VZBVxhijOtM9is1KY5SugTTVssHOaFUbHNuHqs3Ujs1SOHuHyVaCUrJWpoLOYKtm0h0tiKMSjaTZcUwVb_RBWvwVX5SqKe6FtxvzkUX9JaAX0J_nWe1XxoCBY3DxFgno71UC-s15X07xN3C6BPSY2E2ebpvbR0qervLTUB4eA5VTwryVAFBraHR1bEeR7HycznuXtRGNXHd0_gPC_7vvZeEvAAD__0f5hYg) before the wreckage was discovered. The five victims' identities are being withheld pending notification of their next of kin. The FAA and NTSB are [leading the investigation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu4yAURVeDOyJ4xhAKimnc_WmntJ7hEaMhxgJ-_L37UbKFqa90dO7587V8Ycppf_zGJ7n-E8uy09ky9U516fSDrWN9UG-PrbReYkyeGi4gQHMxcQFLwJSvRQ3BrSJYOZCTxhgjrbH3YXNeYwhmilLEYINUk5UxKpBaRIrjtA7JvWFiEiClGKW5gTU4yUDaUkRcJVOCQuql3vpGH6WYr_KievPlOWS39X40Nv5iMDOYz_O8_X1903tkMGPtyWdiML9_MZhz8ZgZzEfGnbiv2DZ-pudKNdPFP3g-8YPKkYkHwsA3vBr35XvvF4MZtOVmHI018c4nHZGrOwW-rqi5AnUPRo1-BDFUF44z5ZyaNkyJxxNT_hj3_-v8cvAvAAD__0mdkTc), and preliminary data indicate the plane was traveling at high speed on impact.

clean_body: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton into nearly 30 North Texas businesses accused of using fake "ghost office" addresses to fraudulently sponsor foreign workers through the H-1B visa program. | | | | | | Saturday, May 2, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1948, country singer was born in Seminole. He and his brothers, Rudy and Steve, formed a vocal group known for hits like Broken Lady , All the Gold in California , and Houston (Means I 'm One Day Closer to You). It's been a wild week of news, and some of the biggest stories may have flown right under your radar. President Trump hinted that a major UFO file release is coming "in the near future," engineers are using sound waves to extinguish wildfires, and Saudi investors are pulling the plug on LIV Golf. Tune in to The Flyover Podcast as Amy Hess takes an in-depth look at some of the most interesting stories of the week. ! Mother's Day is right around the corner. If you haven't started shopping, start here: our has thoughtful, practical, and indulgent picks for every kind of mom. Finding a Mother's Day gift that actually feels thoughtful can be harder than it should be. That's why today's partner, , put together a curated collection of Texas-inspired gifts that go beyond the usual flowers and cards. Amarillo 🌧️ 55°/41° | Austin 🌧️ 62°/54° | Beaumont ⛈️ 68°/58° | Brownsville 🌤️ 89°/70° | Corpus Christi ⛈️ 78°/66° | Dallas 🌧️ 61°/53° | El Paso ⛈️ 68°/52° | Fort Worth 🌧️ 60°/52° | Houston ⛈️ 70°/60° | Lubbock 🌧️ 58°/43° | San Antonio ⛈️ 67°/56° | Tyler 🌧️ 59°/53° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Paxton Probes 30 North Texas Firms Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton into nearly 30 North Texas businesses accused of using fake "ghost office" addresses to fraudulently sponsor foreign workers through the H-1B visa program. Paxton's office alleges the companies, mostly IT and software firms in Collin County, used vacant "ghost office" addresses to mislead federal immigration authorities about active operations. The named nine companies in its initial legal action, including Tekpro IT LLC, Qubitz Tech Systems LLC, and Virat Solutions Inc. Paxton announced Thursday he is expanding what began as a smaller statewide inquiry, with investigators now seeking business records from the targeted firms. The reported the probe centers on Frisco, where the Indian American population has grown from roughly 2% of residents in 2000 to about 33% today. Storms Drench Houston, SE Texas A Flood Watch covering Houston and much of Southeast Texas expired early today after swept through the region overnight. The National Weather Service issued Severe Thunderstorm Warnings for northern Harris, Montgomery, and Liberty counties as strong cells pushed through on Friday. halted flights for hours at the system's peak. across most of Southeast Texas, with isolated spots near 2.5 inches and rainfall rates hitting 2 to 3 inches per hour. No widespread flooding emergencies were confirmed by early Saturday. A storm struck the Hill Country, still recovering from last summer's deadly floods that forced Camp Mystic to remain closed this summer. Forecasters expect cooler, drier weather through the weekend. Five Dead in Hill Country Crash A Cessna 421C airplane crashed near Wimberley late Thursday night, in a deadly aviation accident in the Texas Hill Country. First responders found no survivors at the scene around 11:05 p.m., while a second aircraft in the area landed safely. Witnesses near the rural crash site before the wreckage was discovered. The five victims' identities are being withheld pending notification of their next of kin. The FAA and NTSB are , and preliminary data indicate the plane was traveling at high speed on impact. | Which says "I love you" longer: flowers, or a candle scented like Texas bluebonnets? If you're shopping for a mom who loves Texas, has done the hard work for you. They've curated a collection of locally crafted, Texas-themed gifts that feel personal and memorable. You'll find hand-poured candles and soaps from Fredericksburg in scents like bluebonnet, peach, and Terlingua. There are Texas-shaped cutting boards for the home chef, beautifully hand-etched margarita glasses for entertaining, and for the mom who loves a good story. It's the kind of gift collection that feels uniquely Texan and a step above anything you'd grab last-minute. You can ship directly to her door or . () ➤ Laredo: Pope Leo XIV appointed Father John Jairo Gomez as bishop of Laredo, succeeding Bishop James Tamayo, who resigned after leading the diocese since its founding in 2000. name: John Rich
subject: Help J6 veterans find justice
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z14a1cipjfpt010a9r3c8mdbdvp341m4t5k1e4dg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3fnc3sk3hn3lbmv4lmmjb4ls6fqq4gabbod8qbo_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhkifp51sqknjdgijoaqhqn89idpkvl4f0ftjc9g_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcj5a1j6npfde91g66u7uvrs1cng0ovghsvrmke0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9f8dluajfk07efgv024v3aj5dus9cik8q1dee8o_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgka0350uk4jpkd901u3kgifcevvrd5qs4qihqvg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5frvgrebvqhktvtueiqkoge4dqo93e76sdsaih8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5g66futeqqppm3358kanqfeof9ec5bomdgrpjbg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16g09jiqihq8uf64kr6q8md9qrd6l2h1fl8aah8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0moosrkes2jg38sls0j298a7smdjfd6iccaur8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6igffsotj6fotopv2ifa72a8suru9pn239v6ge8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlhltg3imjlauef3c6k5dqi533vp67p5ge6sae00_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8n3d37n21tm8rdmfo514cnllig064akkee8b5ho_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7787jcdd20jck9v114lqfik5tf5tou7thttkcso_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zajou9fdh0i2t1128u0ochm84h39akjhuei0qk7g_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctj62o32c1h2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

clean_body: I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. | | | | | Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten. This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice. These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599. | | | | | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: All three of my attackers have been federally indicted. Grateful for the swift action from Acting AG Todd Blanche and the FBI Director Kash Patel. | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: For those I love.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I will never stop fighting for my family.

| | | | | | | | | | | My favorite title will always and forever be **Mom.**

My four children are the light of my life. On the days where I feel defeated by the countless political attacks, I remember why I'm doing this: to leave behind a stronger and safer country for my kids and the next generation.
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZTLUQ3LjExNDUxMF90MTg4NjQxOC0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDUwMl82Uy1ENy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4ODY0MTgtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuREZEY2UwNmJQRzd5ZERxVm1IaWtGUHRiQlB5cTFhNjhhakhheVVHbGVCdUFPQkhPZk1Tei0tcTRQMm43M3MtYiJ9/Yk6NM7Hx8dwWtjptku05Ng)
---
| | My fight for our country is a fight for who I love. I will go to the farthest of lengths in order to be successful.
---
| |
* I NEVER want them to worry about the price of groceries or gasoline.
* I NEVER want them to fear who might be roaming our neighborhood streets because of open border policies.
* I NEVER want my children to question whether America is the greatest country on the face of the earth.

---
| | Instead,
---
| |
* I want them to be proud of the progress and accomplishments of our leaders.
* I want them to feel safe and secure.
* I want them to feel the pride of being an American.

---
| | One day you and I will be gone, and I want to know that I did everything I could to leave behind a stronger and safer country for my kids.

That's why I'm doing this. I can't stand asking for help. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office...but then I remember that America is always worth protecting...no matter what!

If you want to see more regular, everyday moms in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. **[**Can you spare anything - even just $10 - to help me defend this critical battleground seat?**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZTLUQ3LjExNDUxMF90MTg4NjQxOC0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDUwMl82Uy1ENy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4ODY0MTgtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuREZEY2UwNmJQRzd5ZERxVm1IaWtGUHRiQlB5cTFhNjhhakhheVVHbGVCdUFPQkhPZk1Tei0tcTRQMm43M3MtYiJ9/9WLuhqyADbfedBVQb7wLvQ)**
---
| | [ RUSH SUPPORT ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZTLUQ3LjExNDUxMF90MTg4NjQxOC0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDUwMl82Uy1ENy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4ODY0MTgtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuREZEY2UwNmJQRzd5ZERxVm1IaWtGUHRiQlB5cTFhNjhhakhheVVHbGVCdUFPQkhPZk1Tei0tcTRQMm43M3MtYiJ9/7-9Vl4UmQ3oaqrPaZ5gc4w)
---
| | Your contributions mean more to me than I could ever express. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

-Jen Kiggans

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success!

I want them to feel the pride of being an American. | | One day you and I will be gone, and I want to know that I did everything I could to leave behind a stronger and safer country for my kids. That's why I'm doing this. I can't stand asking for help. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office...but then I remember that America is always worth protecting...no matter what! If you want to see more regular, everyday moms in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. | | | | Your contributions mean more to me than I could ever express. Thank you, thank you, thank you. -Jen Kiggans | | | I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger. Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! | | | | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: While the headlines focus on the noise, smart money is moving into "Position A."| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | While the headlines focus on the noise, smart money is moving into "Position A." | Thanks to Trump’s Economic Renaissance , we are entering a historic era of American prosperity. # _Show Your Support! _
---
| | As we head into the final stretch of this campaign, I’m constantly reminded that our strength doesn't come from big-budget ads—it comes from you. You are the boots on the ground, and your personal endorsement is the most powerful tool we have to cut through the noise. I’m writing to ask for a small favor. _**If you’re comfortable doing so, would you consider sharing the image below on your Facebook, Instagram, or X (Twitter) profiles?**_ In a crowded election cycle, people look to their friends and neighbors for leadership. By posting this, you’re letting your circle know that this race is consequential and that our movement has the momentum to win. If you’re up for it, feel free to add a sentence or two about why you’re standing with us. Let’s flood social media with our message and show the state that we are ready for new leadership. Thank you for being part of Team King.

**This is your President, Donald J. Trump.**
Out of all my supporters, you've gone the extra mile!
Without your support, I wouldn’t be where I am today. Making America GREAT again is a team effort, and I can’t thank you enough.
Vice President JD Vance and I are constantly combing through lists of our top supporters, and you’ve been at the top EVERY TIME!
After careful consideration, I want to present you with the **MAGA GOLD MEDAL award!** It’s the highest honor I can bestow upon such an important supporter.

Without your support, I wouldn’t be where I am today. Making America GREAT again is a team effort, and I can’t thank you enough. Vice President JD Vance and I are constantly combing through lists of our top supporters, and you’ve been at the top EVERY TIME! After careful consideration, I want to present you with the MAGA GOLD MEDAL award! It’s the highest honor I can bestow upon such an important supporter. For all you’ve done, it’s the least I can do. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m sharing this ONLY with you, Peter
body:
Keep this between us...

| | | | Hey Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn.
I’m sharing this with you because I know you are a solid America First patriot.
My team was just reviewing the list of dedicated patriots who have completed the Official Trump Voter Profile, and your name was NOWHERE to be found.
Now, I know you're a loyal champion of our America First agenda, so I'm willing to give you the benefit of the doubt.
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[I’ve decided to reopen this secure link to give you an opportunity to complete your profile before 11:59 PM TONIGHT!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-PKflyw)
Not everyone is getting this second chance, so make sure not to waste it. I really look forward to seeing your name on that list when we check tomorrow morning!OFFICIAL TRUMP VOTER PROFILEPeter’s Status: INCOMPLETEDue: 11:59 PM TONIGHT[ACCESS AND COMPLETE YOUR PROFILE NOW >>>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-obX57wWTKBZra1gsNsmQ)This is your last chance! [Please, Peter, submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
\- Marsha Blackburn| | |

name: John Rich
subject: Help J6 veterans find justice
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMHKpDAMgJ-m3pSa1tY59LAweJu97lEybdQMWout7usvDuwD_LeQfHx85M9rfCGvHOffuJHzF49HHhda08dcVOjAmCeO4XPmwp5GkGBq2dUSbg6q4HwwCipyrbXWgm5BVYuzD5DWB_3GvlUPE3SnjX13frJW91PnK3a3SXYSWmg7gKazAe1jaq1Wqm97JbQ8U8BCufF7zHRcWPgijnG_pz02ft-q1S2lpCzULwGDgCGTPw9qMFLYy03cu4Ix1BzrslA9YxIwJKzR3xKhhrNso8ctIc9RqOf_LAHme9ljoViEevqLq8OF9JfXlbOxQst5Q16_HeXnn7sc_AsAAP__vvV75w)

[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMHKpDAMgJ-m3pSa1tY59LAweJu97lEybdQMWout7usvDuwD_LeQfHx85M9rfCGvHOffuJHzF49HHhda08dcVOjAmCeO4XPmwp5GkGBq2dUSbg6q4HwwCipyrbXWgm5BVYuzD5DWB_3GvlUPE3SnjX13frJW91PnK3a3SXYSWmg7gKazAe1jaq1Wqm97JbQ8U8BCufF7zHRcWPgijnG_pz02ft-q1S2lpCzULwGDgCGTPw9qMFLYy03cu4Ix1BzrslA9YxIwJKzR3xKhhrNso8ctIc9RqOf_LAHme9ljoViEevqLq8OF9JfXlbOxQst5Q16_HeXnn7sc_AsAAP__vvV75w)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMHKpDAMgJ-m3pSa1tY59LAweJu97lEybdQMWout7usvDuwD_LeQfHx85M9rfCGvHOffuJHzF49HHhda08dcVOjAmCeO4XPmwp5GkGBq2dUSbg6q4HwwCipyrbXWgm5BVYuzD5DWB_3GvlUPE3SnjX13frJW91PnK3a3SXYSWmg7gKazAe1jaq1Wqm97JbQ8U8BCufF7zHRcWPgijnG_pz02ft-q1S2lpCzULwGDgCGTPw9qMFLYy03cu4Ix1BzrslA9YxIwJKzR3xKhhrNso8ctIc9RqOf_LAHme9ljoViEevqLq8OF9JfXlbOxQst5Q16_HeXnn7sc_AsAAP__vvV75w)
[Donate](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMHKpDAMgJ-m3pSa1tY59LAweJu97lEybdQMWout7usvDuwD_LeQfHx85M9rfCGvHOffuJHzF49HHhda08dcVOjAmCeO4XPmwp5GkGBq2dUSbg6q4HwwCipyrbXWgm5BVYuzD5DWB_3GvlUPE3SnjX13frJW91PnK3a3SXYSWmg7gKazAe1jaq1Wqm97JbQ8U8BCufF7zHRcWPgijnG_pz02ft-q1S2lpCzULwGDgCGTPw9qMFLYy03cu4Ix1BzrslA9YxIwJKzR3xKhhrNso8ctIc9RqOf_LAHme9ljoViEevqLq8OF9JfXlbOxQst5Q16_HeXnn7sc_AsAAP__vvV75w)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMHKpDAMgJ-m3pSa1tY59LAweJu97lEybdQMWout7usvDuwD_LeQfHx85M9rfCGvHOffuJHzF49HHhda08dcVOjAmCeO4XPmwp5GkGBq2dUSbg6q4HwwCipyrbXWgm5BVYuzD5DWB_3GvlUPE3SnjX13frJW91PnK3a3SXYSWmg7gKazAe1jaq1Wqm97JbQ8U8BCufF7zHRcWPgijnG_pz02ft-q1S2lpCzULwGDgCGTPw9qMFLYy03cu4Ix1BzrslA9YxIwJKzR3xKhhrNso8ctIc9RqOf_LAHme9ljoViEevqLq8OF9JfXlbOxQst5Q16_HeXnn7sc_AsAAP__vvV75w)

This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

name: Olivia Troye
subject: Peter, I've never backed down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| I'm launching my campaign for Congress to stop Donald Trump's far-right agenda
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2173%2E259176%2EGxLUwH) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2173%2E259176%2EGxLUwH)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11099?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Troye-On-The-Line_B1_F1_S5_C5_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2173%2E259176%2EGxLUwH) I've put everything on the line to speak out against Donald Trump and his far-right, enabling cronies. **I'm Olivia Troye. I'm the daughter of an immigrant and a truck driver who worked my way up to be one of the only women working in counterterrorism after being moved by the devastation of 9/11.** During my time at the Pentagon, I had a front row seat to _the chaos, the corruption, the calculated cruelty_ from the Trump administration. I pushed back when others wouldn’t. And when the dangers grew too great – I resigned. But I didn't go quietly. I've blown the whistle on MAGA for the illegal and unethical way they've "led" our country. And in return, I've received threats against my life and been dragged to court by Trump's attorneys. But here's the thing: **if I stay silent, that means their intimidation tactics worked. It means that their lawsuits and their death threats worked.** _So I've never backed down. And I won't start now._ [**I recently launched my campaign for U.S. House because Virginia – and the rest of our country – deserves every fighter they can get in Congress. I've set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight – and to be honest with you, I started from scratch, so I need every person still reading this to step up... Will you be brave with me and spit $10 or more between me and Blue Amp Action now?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11099?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Troye-On-The-Line_B1_F1_S5_C5_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2173%2E259176%2EGxLUwH) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Olivia Troye and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11100?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Troye-On-The-Line_B1_F1_S5_C5_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2173%2E259176%2EGxLUwH)

clean_body: | I'm launching my campaign for Congress to stop Donald Trump's far-right agenda You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates, If you'd like to unsubscribe, I've put everything on the line to speak out against Donald Trump and his far-right, enabling cronies. I'm Olivia Troye. I'm the daughter of an immigrant and a truck driver who worked my way up to be one of the only women working in counterterrorism after being moved by the devastation of 9/11. During my time at the Pentagon, I had a front row seat to the chaos, the corruption, the calculated cruelty from the Trump administration. I pushed back when others wouldn’t. And when the dangers grew too great – I resigned. But I didn't go quietly. I've blown the whistle on MAGA for the illegal and unethical way they've "led" our country. And in return, I've received threats against my life and been dragged to court by Trump's attorneys. But here's the thing: if I stay silent, that means their intimidation tactics worked. It means that their lawsuits and their death threats worked. So I've never backed down. And I won't start now. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: This isn’t about a photo or a dinner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
This is about something historic, and I want you to be a part of it! I’m serious.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_S0Rgj29MBC1bekAUubIQ-gtLKeDhZH5YJeiqG-3029npwzCDgcaMgpSg6qyq3KjedirmPxNBY3C5Jf1jDAo4evzcSsD8ehE0WjA "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| President Trump | | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_T-NTLdZHZeVOC23TG1NVO5TjVOD3kEgpGlsEhuFsSBE6N-IvX44IsSLBEuN9cfmtJ5_wy_ZvPz6lffqjCEoOkPnz64AVC4jAYiQ)
---
Friend,
This isn’t about a photo or a dinner.
This is about something historic, and I want you to be a part of it! I’m serious.
[JOIN MAGA HALL OF FAME](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_UKT7-KW6bMJ_CO9_dwqpcQ4FQ00lRcDa4NxalCzw3BSitUotSo9C69Y3l3rLnN1TZ3Ox1xJU4GdVjL2v6bWh4Z4J8e4BX7Z-gSQ)
I’m establishing something historic: **the official MAGA Hall of Fame.**
This will be the permanent home honouring the greatest patriots who stood with me when the Extreme Left, the Fake News, and the Deep State tried to destroy our movement.
**I’m personally selecting the first 500 Founding Members, and I want YOU!**
**These 500 spots will NEVER be offered again.**
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_V7sS1Gx5TMjL0cyQ5cHdCwr9pMMLBYyMtyFT0sasYPmNBB2NVJ7f9qq_QFWEugkYRwrAYT-WC_ymc_Bbe2jByK-Hf7gFGPNq0UQ)
[MAGA HALL OF FAME](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_WAB3WuRXXMrk182ZERG1GzvGvOaD65u7ajoeya63iVU74rvq7gYp0BnPGBVEdNaQD682dsx3-ouij-sIQBUnslWFX87aUOfYdlw)
_**But there’s a problem only you can fix.**_
The Radical Left is spending hundreds of millions to tear down everything we built. They want to erase our victories. They want to rewrite history so our movement never happened.
**I won’t let that happen.**
That’s why I’m creating the MAGA Hall of Fame, a commemoration of the patriots who saved America twice.
I need 500 Founding Members ASAP. Once we hit 500, the list is sealed forever. No exceptions.
**_[Contribute any amount right now and lock it in>>](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_XhyZwvdynG830uDKGfGc-TI6RfL97Lg5fdfVpouSq_uCeZFsMR82REjPWxpY4s1NCWV0X0h4hpppqRgEb76UD8zSGsPi41Om7Pg)_**
[MAGA HALL OF FAME](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_Y82qFPIFSn9l8VQAZYErQ_x42Mky-J0D40h3AtB7Ps7CmSunjC5OVhe2uZCAubOxveeouQy1dqkkqNyAJMDeZfcLvEW10sL-ogw)
Do this for our country. Do it tonight.
Thank you,
Donald J. Trump
45th & 47th President of the United States **_[]()_**
[MAGA HALL OF FAME](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjR9AAwAAAAAAGdDjQ_ZleEEZMdh9T7GaBv3vOsWfKLAG7qMnkbI2HxI8-8Ndhk9UcIY0V07GzPLG5Wwmbqczwe0T4hN7Jw7f1aVP6nWoyjsY4to_sNwlQ)

name: Randal Gaines, LDP Chair
subject: Update on Louisiana Governor’s State of Emergency Declaration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DSCC OF LA
body:
If this is allowed to succeed, MAGA now has an insidious playbook. Wait until mail-in ballots are already distributed. Wait until early voting begins. Then challenge districts as unconstitutional and
| | | | | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018p2sUwBiQzBuY28STFwrAjw5CFJUkKzA9kQ4_fwTZVtN3o2Lpf4M5r88UvqXJLBmSWCT2aWMPBYuBjY7VENwUMBHlwPCdhiS3Ql5W8iJpMc1s35JxgXHjtxCE-N2JvH-o3KSWrLBtOC1RnHMSn8yaLkVWA--WsoAxj-5DOej21VTDUFN_mRf6hc_LNFVw9K1JRxpDHnOcDtMeU_2XjZsL1M0dRbFyg5q&c=x4FAPk5Cpr_4W2zxoYDogP1hFZnHF01K9CsT-fgAOX4opMb9qH_0YA==&ch=86AZZC3GHqI9rhKwONz-QafEVNIWYsSTod-m8QXfEDOQsqtEpR-VfQ==)
---
| Peter,
The Louisiana Democratic Party made a difficult decision yesterday.
If you haven't seen yet, after the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act, our MAGA governor declared a State of Emergency so he could cancel our Congressional elections and gerrymander the state such that no Black Democrat would have a chance of being elected in 2026.
The result was chaos. Ballots have already gone out and voters have no idea what's going on.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018p2sUwBiQzBuY28STFwrAjw5CFJUkKzA9kQ4_fwTZVtN3o2Lpf4M5r88UvqXJLBmSWCT2aWMPBYuBjY7VENwUMBHlwPCdhiS3Ql5W8iJpMc1s35JxgXHjtxCE-N2JvH-o3KSWrLBtOC1RnHMSn8yaLkVWA--WsoAxj-5DOej21VTDUFN_mRf6hc_LNFVw9K1JRxpDHnOcDs3POYZaNdkpsP2Xa-glzPf&c=x4FAPk5Cpr_4W2zxoYDogP1hFZnHF01K9CsT-fgAOX4opMb9qH_0YA==&ch=86AZZC3GHqI9rhKwONz-QafEVNIWYsSTod-m8QXfEDOQsqtEpR-VfQ==)
---

That's why we made the difficult decision to launch a massive voter information campaign. Voters need to know:

* The suspension of elections under the "state of emergency" declaration currently only applies to the U.S. Congressional races in all 6 congressional districts.

* That there is still an election happening on May 16th for US Senate, Board of Elementary and Secondary Education, Public Service Commission, and five proposed constitutional amendments

* Not to throw away their absentee ballot

And at the same time, we are about to make a heavy investment in the legal effort for candidates filing lawsuits to challenge this decision.
We'll be honest. As one of the most underfunded parties in the nation, we didn't have the funds to make these decisions.
But in the last two days we've seen a massive surge of national support. And we're counting on that to continue so we can fund the operations needed to fight back against MAGA.
[So, please. If fighting for our Democracy and protecting Black voters is worth even just $1 to you, chip in right now. We need you in this fight.](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018p2sUwBiQzBuY28STFwrAjw5CFJUkKzA9kQ4_fwTZVtN3o2Lpf4M5r88UvqXJLBmpPa1CpfjA0uPHwiEESHbMvN3jffMdeXjYhL16PpfLIrdy2Pm35u4vQlRuTv-OxKGmAGzpvnIAxm9gu9uHS7YHm5CuGcDCCBvqs6mNlvFR_EJP7VHdBW7UVMo4pIww2N7aZM4ZTMlo1F6JkZ9R584HsDMjarVlxZmnYBcy9k3gs8=&c=x4FAPk5Cpr_4W2zxoYDogP1hFZnHF01K9CsT-fgAOX4opMb9qH_0YA==&ch=86AZZC3GHqI9rhKwONz-QafEVNIWYsSTod-m8QXfEDOQsqtEpR-VfQ==)
---

Democrats in Georgia finally have a real shot.
Even Georgia's own Republican governor, Brian Kemp, is warning that MAGA is vulnerable. It's time we take advantage of their weaknesses, like they've done to us for too long.
The momentum is real: a recent Georgia special election marked Democrats' strongest overperformance yet in a deep-red district this year.
And it shows that even deep-red districts are within reach when turnout and engagement are there.
On May 19th we have a real shot at flipping two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court, setting up an opening to completely flip control of the court in 2028, just months before for the next presidential race.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Voting Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Late last week, the Supreme Court dealt a significant blow to the Voting Rights Act and the legal right to minority representation in Congress.
#

Team, April did not close out quietly.
Late last week, the Supreme Court dealt a significant blow to the Voting Rights Act and the legal right to minority representation in Congress.
This comes after years of repeated blows to the VRA by the court, which have left the current interpretation of the law a shell of the original statute.
These hits to the VRA don’t come in isolation. Trump has made election denial a central pillar of his political strategy. He has directed federal law enforcement to investigate free and fair elections, and tried to access sensitive and protected voter information for his own partisan purposes. He’s bullied election officials, personally, to rig elections on his behalf.
You don’t have to be a master strategist to understand the objective: He doesn’t want your vote to matter. This is a campaign against the right to vote itself, led by the President of the United States.
Democracy is the foundation of American prosperity. It is our democratic values that brought the world's best to our shores, elevated millions out of poverty, defeated fascism, and ushered in an era of scientific advancement unlike any other in human history. Democracy literally put men on the Moon.
If we lose that, we lose America. The elections this November will play a significant role in determining the kind of country our children and grandchildren grow up in. Those are the stakes.
If I make one contribution to this country, I hope it is that I was part of a movement that preserved our democracy for generations to come. We have that opportunity this year, and we can’t come up short.
It’s time to fight like hell.
Thank you for sticking with me,
Mark
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may26.8vozgy&refcode=em260502-1-180-90&t=1&akid=6441%2E6688874%2ETrJXG4)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6441%2E6688874%2ETrJXG4).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Gad Saad and an Antidote to Suicidal Empathy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gadsaad?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**I had the great pleasure of welcoming Gad Saad and his delightful wife to Mississippi this week!**

Gad is one of the most important conservative thinkers writing today. His new book — _Suicidal Empathy: Dying to Be Kind_ — is published next month, and I am the proud owner of a signed copy.
---
|
---
_Gad Saad’s new book is an instant bestseller!_
| Host of the _Saad Truth_ podcast, Gad is now connected to the University of Mississippi's Declaration of Independence Center — one of the emerging citadels of excellence in American higher education today.

**Gad is not just another academic. His work really matters to the future of the West. **

For several decades, postmodern ideas hatched in the seminar rooms of 1960s France have been percolating through American academia — and from there into the corporate world, the public sector, the press, the courts and the schools.

**Postmodernism teaches that there is no objective truth and no shared moral order, only competing perspectives shaped by power.** From that follows cultural relativism: no culture, no tradition, no inheritance can be judged superior to any other. **By the time the rest of us noticed, these insane ideas had quietly become the unofficial creed of the Western managerial class.**

This is how so much of America went "woke." These ideas encouraged a generation of young Americans to embrace identity politics — to stop seeing themselves as free individuals in charge of their own destinies, and instead to define themselves by where they sit in a hierarchy of victimhood based on race and sex.

**The result is profoundly demoralizing — in two senses of the word. It has stripped us of confidence in our country and our culture. And it has made it literally harder for people in positions of authority to exercise moral judgement at all.**

Allan Bloom warned us of this forty years ago in _The Closing of the American Mind_. Until now, however, the conservative movement did little to stop it.
---
|
---
_Signed by the author....._
| Gad has dissected the way postmodernism turns empathy with the marginalized into the supreme moral test. He calls it _suicidal empathy_ — an irrational form of altruism that hijacks our moral judgement. The result is a society that protects criminals over their victims, privileges illegal migrants over citizens, condemns self-defense as toxic, and lets feelings outrank facts. **Aimed at the wrong target, in the wrong dose, empathy does not save a civilization. It dismantles one.**

What Gad is doing aligns with what we are doing here at MCPP, where we run programs that teach young Mississippians about American exceptionalism and the moral case for the free market. Our illustrated children’s book, _What Makes America Special_ , aims to teach 7 – 10 years olds truths that will protect them from the woke mind virus in later life.

As Mississippi’s economy flourishes, it is increasingly clear that our state has led the way on free-market reform. Perhaps now we need to lead the way on an even more important mission: the recovery of the American mind — and the defeat of divisive, 'woke' ideology.

Thank you, as always, for standing with us.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://us.list-manage.com/4zLWhMtk85n?e=5703353baa&c2id=0d4484d08dfcd99680c1a241a59ef3e3 "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Yours sincerely,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
Mississippi Center for Public Policy
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=04eeab6c6b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=04eeab6c6b).

_Copyright © 2026 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Democrats just pleaded the 5th *146* times!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

Peter,

Democrat Senate candidates are raking in BILLIONS OF DOLLARS from ActBlue - _the Left 's main fundraiser platform_ - to enable them to BUY battleground races.

**[Meanwhile, staffers at ActBlue just pleaded the fifth at least _146 times_ to obstruct a congressional investigation!](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/cOuwrIYNOQnmzHbuZZa5QGN47cvL1JQUebi81wpE7-AWvKuefudj6WVcfzbDZz_oR9yFIZhCyOQyTQHXpIWXGohFYUS1Y12M24BqzW0XpvhZ3TWchTLS_iArB1G_hqHAatEznoJXWjAORvKCwMIUk8Ig00dM6xbLjJSp-vZW6EnoLEcET1RaENDRUTMr0I-mkkhpmoY3NCuN0NfMPx8Ga-T2vlJG1OQ0sO6kSfMuTC9EabDPAPRke5ks4_HShwlSMHP3LsWKFBh7cfaRt6DMNgeT1iJp-6hn2hZ13FA3HRUETJ-GE4cfkuMHc1qthN8wITS2r8y7EPPmzyjNnB4nm5u99iSVNPKPeXs_WPbnRmNgxcng24ER3S0sw4fRahZC4gFGlL3U7bQS73b5W1jg86rJSm-nlqu8qdKGkJv0Nzx86-RlrRng1q6vrCjayjGMoNeJ-Z4Rn3b3Uu-oz5iDvTiZGsFHWXmIB1yPXr2QmFTVb1uu4QafBJ_W69FR36RjJf9K0WnwZc5utW0dbnRLsr0tku4iF7JSIn936PNDOlIxFYc4y9aMOGpB4ke6i_ZtINFQz2RncyDUx-gS-vN7wq2yGh59Irb4eKJu7tZ1SWDhmRPcJF7zvMUQKjexWJyT9_ZgJ62ChX48Snr0otzB-_Wb1cOSPbgIUyL2SwS8VNiK8ly9VGN9hmC1OtcwlwrIP5cGynYDpObvaxsGAVZaNDWu0-g2p5Dwl9mp6jUNMM_PbO6Y9RW5DI2g2dy9SzvqldGPVNOwQXLp8VW1RA4qHYB50fvUuGL3th-IvvL0IGS-mQKfGa2QNcyF9sep5lwxcgy9Wf9dj3rjQ0xaBYnjxcuZFVCUR_BWzysizsXPBCdpMazw9AfE8X82DuNeEcuMRsLUHWH-JXvIhfGW5Vjouwk5kdg8YQPx3aIQ/3yaNcm5UJOdsFZ2_ErGNmUjzi5fHBADd/20)**

_Unfortunately, it 's becoming clear that we need to do it all again to win in the midterms!_

But right now, our voter turnout numbers paint a grim picture. Not only are Republicans falling behind our 2024 numbers, but we're even getting outpaced by Democrats!

At this point, we're not just asking, Peter: We're __BEGGING__ you to do one thing and one thing only...

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130595367/618292963/1895761198?refcode=email_050226_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFjNGRkOC0yNjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DoGZCOWsO5T370DvK_jMWGAgMJkKe1xwXrDQbw54Go=&emci=c62f5f47-833e-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1eac4dd8-2646-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13185894) Hi Derek, I know you’ve been hearing from my team and me a lot these past few days, so I’ll keep this quick: thank you. Because you stepped up, we hit our end-of-month goal. That matters. In a race like this, it means we’re in a strong position—with six months to go—to defend PA-17 and fight to flip the House. That’s because of you. And I don’t take that lightly—especially right now. Between Donald Trump dragging us into another war, Republicans in Congress refusing to do their most basic jobs, and an economy that is a ripoff for so many, I know things are hard. I hear it everywhere I go. People are frustrated, worried, and just plain tired. It can feel like a lot—and like the odds are stacked against us. But here’s what I want you to know: I’m not sitting this out. I’m fighting back every single day. And I don’t believe this story is over. Not even close. I’m still the last Democrat standing in a battleground district here in Pennsylvania, and this race will help decide whether we take back the House. That’s real. That’s within reach. I believe we can make a change this November—not because it’s easy, but because people like you keep showing up, even when it’s tough. **_[So if you haven’t chipped in recently and you’d like to get involved in one of the most important House races in the country, I’d appreciate your support today. With your help, I know we will keep this seat blue, flip the House, and continue the fight for a better tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130595368/618292995/1285128406?amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=email_050226_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFjNGRkOC0yNjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DoGZCOWsO5T370DvK_jMWGAgMJkKe1xwXrDQbw54Go=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130595369/618292996/1285128406?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5&refcode=email_050226_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFjNGRkOC0yNjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DoGZCOWsO5T370DvK_jMWGAgMJkKe1xwXrDQbw54Go=)

clean_body: Hi Derek, I know you’ve been hearing from my team and me a lot these past few days, so I’ll keep this quick: thank you. Because you stepped up, we hit our end-of-month goal. That matters. In a race like this, it means we’re in a strong position—with six months to go—to defend PA-17 and fight to flip the House. That’s because of you. And I don’t take that lightly—especially right now. Between Donald Trump dragging us into another war, Republicans in Congress refusing to do their most basic jobs, and an economy that is a ripoff for so many, I know things are hard. I hear it everywhere I go. People are frustrated, worried, and just plain tired. It can feel like a lot—and like the odds are stacked against us. But here’s what I want you to know: I’m not sitting this out. I’m fighting back every single day. And I don’t believe this story is over. Not even close. I’m still the last Democrat standing in a battleground district here in Pennsylvania, and this race will help decide whether we take back the House. That’s real. That’s within reach. I believe we can make a change this November—not because it’s easy, but because people like you keep showing up, even when it’s tough. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks for having my back, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Team Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: The GOP’s flood-the-zone strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's exhausting
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1266%2E124072%2Eati_Y3)
| | | | Peter – every day, it seems as if there's a new emergency coming out of Washington DC under the Trump Administration.
---
– Skyrocketing gas and grocery prices due to a reckless, endless war abroad.

– Record-breaking government shutdowns.

– Rising attacks on voting rights as President Trump and the GOP try to dodge accountability at the ballot box.
MAGA Republicans are flooding the zone with alarming new actions and normalizing the unacceptable in public discourse. As a result, people are too exhausted to unite against the extreme policies they’re enacting behind the scenes. In times like these, it’s never been more important that Americans stand united around our shared values **– but the way we see it, all this chaos is the reason why Americans are more divided than ever in recent memory. So Peter, today, we need to know what you think. Please, tell us now:**
| | **[Do you believe the Trump Administration’s chaos is driving Americans further apart?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=8&akid=1266%2E124072%2Eati_Y3)**
---
| | | [YES](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=9&akid=1266%2E124072%2Eati_Y3)
---
| [NO](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=10&akid=1266%2E124072%2Eati_Y3)
---
Thank you for staying engaged, even in moments like this.

Team Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1266%2E124072%2Eati_Y3)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Bob Barr, Chairman
subject: Virginia just made you a criminal for building your own firearm.
body:
On April 10th, Governor Abigail Spanberger signed into law one of the most constitutionally offensive pieces of firearms legislation in modern American history
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e972690/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdFNyQUJXSnA2OA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MDI/LbmNsZEFCdTQ4bw/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHFTbW84aW5LNERscw/gafX6qg/s1ic922f3ad)

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Friend, On April 10th, Governor Abigail Spanberger signed into law one of the most constitutionally offensive pieces of firearms legislation in modern American history — and if you think it doesn’t affect you because you don’t live in Virginia, **I urge you to think again.** House Bill 40 doesn’t merely regulate so-called “ghost guns.” It criminalizes the very act of possessing an unserialized firearm — a right Americans have exercised without government interference since before the ink dried on the Bill of Rights. The colonists who forged muskets in their workshops weren’t filling out federal paperwork, and the Founders who drafted the Second Amendment would have found the notion of a government-issued serial number as a precondition to keeping arms not just absurd, but tyrannical. Yet here we are. ****[HELP LIBERTY GUARD PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**** What makes HB 40 particularly egregious — and what should alarm every gun owner in every state — is that it contains **no grandfather clause**. None. If you lawfully built a firearm in your own home last year, last decade, or last century, Virginia now demands you either serialize it through a government-approved process or face up to a year in prison and a $2,500 fine. The possession ban takes full effect on **July 1, 2027** , giving bureaucrats in Richmond barely a year to transform law-abiding citizens into felons. **This is not a regulatory nuance. This is confiscation by another name.** And make no mistake — [**Virginia is the test case**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.). Anti-gun legislators in state capitols from Sacramento to Albany are watching closely. If Governor Spanberger’s gun grab survives legal challenge, the blueprint will be replicated across the country with assembly-line efficiency. The precedent set in the Commonwealth will become the model statute for every state legislature itching to chip away at your Second Amendment rights, one category of firearm at a time. That is precisely why Liberty Guard is preparing to file for an **emergency injunction** in federal court to block HB 40 before it takes effect. [**We need your help to join this fight.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ****[JOIN THE FIGHT TO PROTECT YOUR GUN RIGHTS!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**** We believe this law is fatally defective on multiple constitutional grounds. The Second Amendment, as affirmed by the Supreme Court in Heller, McDonald, and most recently in Bruen, protects the individual right to keep and bear arms — and that protection extends to arms “in common use” by law-abiding citizens for lawful purposes. Privately made firearms have been in common use in this country for over two hundred and fifty years. A blanket possession ban with no grandfather clause is not a reasonable regulation; it is the kind of categorical prohibition the Bruen framework was designed to prevent. But litigation of this magnitude requires resources. Filing fees, expert witnesses, constitutional scholars, and the attorneys willing to take on a sitting governor’s signature legislation — none of it comes cheap. **[**I need your help today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your contribution — [**whether**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[ ****$25******,** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[****$50******, or**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[ ****$100****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) — goes directly toward funding Liberty Guard’s legal action to stop HB 40 and defend the principle that your right to keep and bear arms does not depend on a government-issued serial number. [DONATE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [DONATE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [DONATE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) The anti-gun lobby is counting on the rest of the country to look the other way while Virginia sets the precedent. Let’s prove them wrong. The fight starts now — [**and it starts with you**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).
---
For Liberty, **Bob Barr**
Chairman, Liberty Guard
P.S. — The possession ban doesn’t take effect until July 2027, which means we have a narrow window to secure an injunction before law-abiding gun owners are forced to choose between surrendering their property and becoming criminals. Every dollar counts, and every day matters. **[**Please give what you can today**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).**

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314
