clean_body: On April 10th, Governor Abigail Spanberger signed into law one of the most constitutionally offensive pieces of firearms legislation in modern American history Friend, On April 10th, Governor Abigail Spanberger signed into law one of the most constitutionally offensive pieces of firearms legislation in modern American history — and if you think it doesn’t affect you because you don’t live in Virginia, I urge you to think again. House Bill 40 doesn’t merely regulate so-called “ghost guns.” It criminalizes the very act of possessing an unserialized firearm — a right Americans have exercised without government interference since before the ink dried on the Bill of Rights. The colonists who forged muskets in their workshops weren’t filling out federal paperwork, and the Founders who drafted the Second Amendment would have found the notion of a government-issued serial number as a precondition to keeping arms not just absurd, but tyrannical. Yet here we are. ** What makes HB 40 particularly egregious — and what should alarm every gun owner in every state — is that it contains no grandfather clause. None. If you lawfully built a firearm in your own home last year, last decade, or last century, Virginia now demands you either serialize it through a government-approved process or face up to a year in prison and a $2,500 fine. The possession ban takes full effect on July 1, 2027 , giving bureaucrats in Richmond barely a year to transform law-abiding citizens into felons. This is not a regulatory nuance. This is confiscation by another name. And make no mistake — . Anti-gun legislators in state capitols from Sacramento to Albany are watching closely. If Governor Spanberger’s gun grab survives legal challenge, the blueprint will be replicated across the country with assembly-line efficiency. The precedent set in the Commonwealth will become the model statute for every state legislature itching to chip away at your Second Amendment rights, one category of firearm at a time. That is precisely why Liberty Guard is preparing to file for an emergency injunction in federal court to block HB 40 before it takes effect. We believe this law is fatally defective on multiple constitutional grounds. The Second Amendment, as affirmed by the Supreme Court in Heller, McDonald, and most recently in Bruen, protects the individual right to keep and bear arms — and that protection extends to arms “in common use” by law-abiding citizens for lawful purposes. Privately made firearms have been in common use in this country for over two hundred and fifty years. A blanket possession ban with no grandfather clause is not a reasonable regulation; it is the kind of categorical prohibition the Bruen framework was designed to prevent. But litigation of this magnitude requires resources. Filing fees, expert witnesses, constitutional scholars, and the attorneys willing to take on a sitting governor’s signature legislation — none of it comes cheap. Your contribution — — goes directly toward funding Liberty Guard’s legal action to stop HB 40 and defend the principle that your right to keep and bear arms does not depend on a government-issued serial number. The anti-gun lobby is counting on the rest of the country to look the other way while Virginia sets the precedent. Let’s prove them wrong. The fight starts now — . For Liberty, Bob Barr Chairman, Liberty Guard P.S. — The possession ban doesn’t take effect until July 2027, which means we have a narrow window to secure an injunction before law-abiding gun owners are forced to choose between surrendering their property and becoming criminals. Every dollar counts, and every day matters. .

name: Brett Bernard
subject: Gov Bill Lee Calls a Special Session to Redraw Maps for a TN-9 Republican Candidate
body:
💥💥💥Tennessee 9th District Will Elect a Republican 💥💥💥💥 | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/17030c509f34/teammeeting-5862864?e=9dd54a4530)
---
| Dear Peter,

The Supreme Court on Wednesday began the process needed to end the Voting Rights Act of 1965 which contributed to the redrawing of congressional districts based upon skin color only. Dr. MLK, Jr.’s quote was, "_I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the **_color of their skin_** but by the **_content of their character_**_."

According to the recent Supreme Court’s decision, districts’ use of race as a factor when drawing congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms should end.

The Tennessee 9th District will now come into compliance with the Supreme Court’s decision without having to redraw the Tennessee congressional maps.

_TIME IS CRITICAL_
Governor Bill Lee has called a Special Session to redraw the map. Unfortunately, the governor's changes will not take effect until 2028. President Trump needs as many _Republican_ U.S. House of Representative members to be elected in 2026, as possible. This is where you come in.

**Charlotte Bergmann is the only Republican on the ballot running to represent TN-9 with values that will make the district great in 2026. Her victory will appease the Supreme Court’s requirement of removing race as a determining factor for a congressional district. Charlotte has been fighting for this district for many years because she believes that we can be prosperous, safe, and great. She will be able to work with the eight (8) Tennessee U.S. House of Representative members to get President Trump's agenda passed.**

Now is the time for you to help send Charlotte Bergmann to the U.S. House of Representative. Please invest wisely in her campaign by providing her the means she needs to get her message out to the voting populous.

**[Please donate, TODAY.](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=0a032e5897&e=9dd54a4530)**

Sincerely,
Brett Bernard
Former Mayor of Grand Ledge, Michigan
901-692-7401

That means the election is already happening -- Here's the reality most campaigns won't say out loud: That's why Team Vivek is working overtime to turn out EVERY Republican voter for the May 5th Primary Election. Reaching every single patriot in this state before May 5th takes immediate resources. | | Energy is built now. Habits are formed now. And if our voters sit out this Primary, we risk losing them come November. The Left understands this - that's why they're already organizing, already spending, already turning out their base. We need every supporter invested starting NOW - because what we build in this moment will decide whether we keep this governor's seat in Republican hands in November. | | Every dollar goes directly toward reaching voters, driving turnout, and ensuring our momentum continues. _**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

name: Voter Registration Update via The DNC
subject: Some exciting news:
body:
---
Derek, We have some exciting news to share, but first, we need to explain why it’s so important: **Between 2020 and 2024, Republicans registered 2.4 million voters, while Democrats LOST nearly 2.1 million.** And now, the GOP is outraising us. They have _$843.6 million_ on hand — money they can spend on reaching and registering even more Republican voters. If we want a chance to win back Congress this year and put a massive check on Trump’s agenda, we’ll need to act fast. **Here’s the good news: The DNC is already on the ground in key battleground states registering new Democratic voters.** We recently onboarded our first cohort of _When We Count_ fellows in Arizona — these are Democratic organizers who are working to register over 250,000 new voters in their communities. And next, we’ll be expanding to Nevada. This is the DNC’s FIRST EVER partisan registration push, meaning we will _only be registering new Democrats._ [**But Derek, this is a massive undertaking and is going to require a huge surge of resources. If working to register new Democratic voters and train the next generation of organizers sounds worthwhile to you, we’re asking you to pitch in $7 directly to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260502_6975_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6975_22930333_-JzL_v&akid=6975%2E22930333%2E-JzL_v) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260502_6975_fr&refcode2=6975_22930333_-JzL_v&akid=6975%2E22930333%2E-JzL_v)**

clean_body: Derek, We have some exciting news to share, but first, we need to explain why it’s so important: Between 2020 and 2024, Republicans registered 2.4 million voters, while Democrats LOST nearly 2.1 million. And now, the GOP is outraising us. They have $843.6 million on hand — money they can spend on reaching and registering even more Republican voters. If we want a chance to win back Congress this year and put a massive check on Trump’s agenda, we’ll need to act fast. Here’s the good news: The DNC is already on the ground in key battleground states registering new Democratic voters. We recently onboarded our first cohort of When We Count fellows in Arizona — these are Democratic organizers who are working to register over 250,000 new voters in their communities. And next, we’ll be expanding to Nevada. This is the DNC’s FIRST EVER partisan registration push, meaning we will only be registering new Democrats. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
I’ll get straight to it.
A new poll shows Zach Wahls trailing Republican Ashley Hinson by just 2 points.
In a statewide Senate race. In Iowa!
If Democrats are going to retake the majority, it will require winning races exactly like this one. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between Zach Wahls and Resist Reclaim Rebuild right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
DONATE NOW TO FLIP IOWA BLUE! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
Here’s the math: Democrats need a net gain to retake the Senate majority. There are only a handful of true pickup opportunities in the entire country this cycle, and this poll shows that Iowa is one of them.
Trump carried the state by double digits in 2024, but now, Wahls has narrowed that lead to 2. That’s why this race matters so much.
As someone who has spent a lot of time campaigning in Iowa, I know Zach has what it takes to win. Zach isn’t some placeholder candidate. He’s a 6th-generation Iowan who has spent his career standing up for working families and taking on powerful interests. He’s built real grassroots support without taking a cent from corporate PACs.
And now he’s within 2 points.
But here’s what I’ve learned over decades in politics: when a Democrat gets this close in a red-leaning state, national Republicans don’t sit back. They flood the zone with money and try to shut it down early.
If Zach has the resources to define this race, expand outreach, and reach persuadable voters before outside money drowns him out, he can win. If he doesn’t, Republicans will try to bury this opportunity before it fully takes shape.
Zach can win this race. But he cannot do it alone.
If you care about Democrats retaking the Senate, I’m asking you to split a contribution between Zach Wahls’ campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP DEMS WIN! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
Iowa is in play. Let’s not miss this opportunity.
Howard Dean
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.

Fellow American,
Speaker Mike Johnson here.
I'm coming to you because this moment matters, and I have an important offer for you.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. [**Team, Amy Klobuchar just introduced an AMAZING new bill to support Automatic Voter Registration – it would destroy DECADES of Republican voter suppression efforts!!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73950?t=3&akid=24195%2E4449941%2EbhhHdt)

[**We’re racing to support Sen. Klobuchar and pressure Congress to pass this bill, but it comes at a cost – and we’re running out of resources. Unless we make up our $74,583 shortage by 9 AM tomorrow, we’ll have to give up. Can we count on you to rush in $10 ASAP? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73950?t=4&akid=24195%2E4449941%2EbhhHdt) | [DONATE $10 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73950?t=5&akid=24195%2E4449941%2EbhhHdt)

Friend, Governor DeSantis made a promise to the people of Florida: he would fight for fair representation and would not stop until he got it right. He kept that promise. Florida got shortchanged in the 2020 Census. For years, Florida’s congressional map didn't reflect who Florida actually is. But the state has changed. The population has grown dramatically. And the political reality is clear: **Florida has moved from a Democratic majority to a Republican advantage of 1.5 million voters.** **So Governor DeSantis acted.**

Florida’s new map for 2026 makes good on Governor DeSantis’ commitment to conduct mid-decade redistricting, and it more fairly represents the makeup of Florida today. Not the Florida of five years ago. Not the Florida Democrats' wish still existed. _The Florida that is._ The radical Left has attacked Florida’s map from the moment Governor DeSantis announced it. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and his allies in Washington are calling it a power grab and threatening to make it a national issue. They're not worried about fairness. They're worried about losing ground, because they know this map reflects a Florida they can no longer control.
_Governor DeSantis isn’t backing down._ That's the Florida Blueprint. You fight for what's right, you do the work to back it up, and when the other side screams, you take it as confirmation that you're winning. **And now RON PAC is working to elect conservatives across the country who will govern the same way: bold enough to fight, disciplined enough to win, and unwilling to apologize for either.** The 2026 cycle is approaching fast. RON PAC is already laying the groundwork to recruit and support conservatives who will bring this model to every battleground in the country. That takes resources, and it takes people like you standing with us before the national committees ever show up. Florida’s new map for 2026 makes good on Governor DeSantis’ commitment to conduct mid-decade redistricting, and it more fairly represents the makeup of Florida today. Not the Florida of five years ago. Not the Florida Democrats' wish still existed. The Florida that is. The radical Left has attacked Florida’s map from the moment Governor DeSantis announced it. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and his allies in Washington are calling it a power grab and threatening to make it a national issue. They're not worried about fairness. They're worried about losing ground, because they know this map reflects a Florida they can no longer control. Governor DeSantis isn’t backing down. That's the Florida Blueprint. You fight for what's right, you do the work to back it up, and when the other side screams, you take it as confirmation that you're winning. And now RON PAC is working to elect conservatives across the country who will govern the same way: bold enough to fight, disciplined enough to win, and unwilling to apologize for either. The 2026 cycle is approaching fast. RON PAC is already laying the groundwork to recruit and support conservatives who will bring this model to every battleground in the country. That takes resources, and it takes people like you standing with us before the national committees ever show up. Jeffries and the Left want to make Florida their new battleground. Fine. Governor DeSantis has never walked away from a fight, and he’s not starting now. Thank you,RON PAC | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | | P.O. Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

**** For 1 in 4 Americans with a disability, healthcare is a lifeline. Now, that lifeline is being held for ransom by two of Trump’s predatory schemes:

2. **The Cancer Drug Scam:** While Trump hands Big Pharma sweetheart deals like 100% tariff relief, these companies are jacking up prices on life-saving cancer drugs to fuel a $70 billion profit surge.

They are gambling with our lives to pad their pockets. **Able Dems is fighting back by electing leaders who treat healthcare as a right, not a corporate kickback.** [**Will you donate to help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stop these scams?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3UJ7ArecOtOGDVQjbKUIyDC9fuoaMOlknro2ufCbHwqrTCeBGAN93gYrMC5aXhZcoM-4Wk9VNDcz16eVJQnBRATKEXqOn69uZKVKflWg5oIrfqfmAMGzBNv7Z3R4_5Id7Nw-jJIFCknJQ69K8zrqFig4iUwLeLgS0Uvn6WgzGxFhywKQC_rQJ1iM7bx23vr_9DnnAqdkxtqkt3FkNReeFl7Y_MtI1cPrWcbVZeJeIFaxV9vDR4KqocBYtV-yxvOoFIpNiSdEToLYylqaFUtf-5LiNzf4jXjwtbazMEe7F9HA1UD3wfoSTal0lS43l19M30/4qa/LsUVh7_pRGG5TilmAfUmrA/h2/h001.NumMNY3tS4q8leKJz7ZnsTMlD8IP6r32ZULAQyhcFQo) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

They steer patients to brand-name drugs that cost hundreds more than generics, and these costs don't even count toward your insurance deductible. 2. They are gambling with our lives to pad their pockets. Able Dems is fighting back by electing leaders who treat healthcare as a right, not a corporate kickback. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** In solidarity, The Able Dems Team | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. He just said something we all need to hear

| | | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT1vgzAQhn-N2UD-AEwGD5UQWzpUlTqii32AG9tQ2zR_vyJNxg7drEev79Vz93Eez2CdDfMreFQxT2NM47LPqB1EDBrzsnpIN4jBhnnklLclbUrKjxwrjDLaANMFKiallII2oisWdby6rjYnECCEZGziaIC28tJOgjZNYdUxijaUs5oyeqqERsabru2wE5JOJ1JTcBhzFXHbL85qCBnSdVqjxkqvvnBqyXlLRLwQPhA-JNR7xOqKwYBzXzs4l6Y1-lCtcSZ8eAqVv0blQ6lED9aVnxsQMezZj2ndo0Yi-gPx9kAejd09Ef12Dz-oBr-BnQMR_d2lFnT8o-T5Yw0ZQyaif3sfyucCiqjMdrPO2dRKUtP56Lgr5v8f5FvxnwAAAP__P2mbvQ)

| | Friend,
It’s Team Qualls. We wanted to alert you to something Justice Clarence Thomas [_just said_](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyU0L1ugzAUxfGnMVui6-svGDx0YakSqVNHdDEXsGpIZJumj1_RN-h6dPQb_p-34UYxxX2508Y-13nIZViPhUOizHvguj42Ki_Ke9yXAQHtBcwF8PzJZvJTmEiGhr10zjkFRrXN6pWdrDY4glazVGPHZGjEGTvlAs8mNNGfFBhAqUFCd1WBJZrWttwqB3MnNFDiXK-Zn8eYYqC9UvmaHznwNTy2Jvm11mcR6k1gL7D_OVeB_TvvE6X0cVBK5XYX2JdK9SgCewRtu85I14IDh9pabLKfnq-YUizWCQ3LRjH9-fX_Nb49_gYAAP__qBFrPg):
**_"I think if we don't stand up and take ownership of our country, and take responsibility for it, we are slowly letting others control how we think and what we think."_**
Thomas’ warning is ON POINT and crucial for ALL of us. Here’s why:
The radical, far-left is a growing threat to our freedoms.
For too long, Americans have watched as out-of-touch politicians and bureaucrats made decisions _for_ them. And whether it’s unchecked fraud, rising taxes, or policies that put ideology ahead of common sense, the people have been sidelined.
**If we don’t step up and take ownership of our state, someone else will gladly do it for us.**
If we don’t fight back against a radical ideology that’s seeping into our homes and our schools, it will gladly take over.
But here’s the thing: If we don’t like the direction things are going — the rising costs, the lack of accountability, the same failed leadership making the same bad decisions — then it’s on _us_ to step up and change it.
No one else is going to do it for us. Not the political insiders. Not the career politicians. Not the people who benefit from the status quo. **_[The only question now is, are you going to step up and be part of fixing it?](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT1vgzAQhn-N2UD-AEwGD5UQWzpUlTqii32AG9tQ2zR_vyJNxg7drEev79Vz93Eez2CdDfMreFQxT2NM47LPqB1EDBrzsnpIN4jBhnnklLclbUrKjxwrjDLaANMFKiallII2oisWdby6rjYnECCEZGziaIC28tJOgjZNYdUxijaUs5oyeqqERsabru2wE5JOJ1JTcBhzFXHbL85qCBnSdVqjxkqvvnBqyXlLRLwQPhA-JNR7xOqKwYBzXzs4l6Y1-lCtcSZ8eAqVv0blQ6lED9aVnxsQMezZj2ndo0Yi-gPx9kAejd09Ef12Dz-oBr-BnQMR_d2lFnT8o-T5Yw0ZQyaif3sfyucCiqjMdrPO2dRKUtP56Lgr5v8f5FvxnwAAAP__P2mbvQ)_**
**_[If the answer is yes, we’re asking you to take that step today and help support Kendall Qualls’ campaign for governor of Minnesota:](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT1vgzAQhn-N2UD-AEwGD5UQWzpUlTqii32AG9tQ2zR_vyJNxg7drEev79Vz93Eez2CdDfMreFQxT2NM47LPqB1EDBrzsnpIN4jBhnnklLclbUrKjxwrjDLaANMFKiallII2oisWdby6rjYnECCEZGziaIC28tJOgjZNYdUxijaUs5oyeqqERsabru2wE5JOJ1JTcBhzFXHbL85qCBnSdVqjxkqvvnBqyXlLRLwQPhA-JNR7xOqKwYBzXzs4l6Y1-lCtcSZ8eAqVv0blQ6lED9aVnxsQMezZj2ndo0Yi-gPx9kAejd09Ef12Dz-oBr-BnQMR_d2lFnT8o-T5Yw0ZQyaif3sfyucCiqjMdrPO2dRKUtP56Lgr5v8f5FvxnwAAAP__P2mbvQ)_**

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkcuO3CAQRb8G77B4uG16wSJSy7vJIoqUpVWGwibDwwGc-f3InekPmO0Rl6p76tfb8gY--LR9h4i6NLeUuuznhiZAwWSw7TlC_YCSfNoWwcRI2Y0ycb3jndXWWOCmQ82naZoku0nV7VpZKaSbhLDq7pCzdZRqsINjAKvgynVeX1-xGxN8YJzde2mQi5saFSo5MXcnA4OApfUFj3MN3kBqUN9dLgZ7k2MX9N7aUYn8RsRMxFzRnAX7d0wWQvhzQgjV5RJTn8tGxIwRfKCrz9Tl3LDQ3wcQOZ8tLjWfxSCRjwuJ8UIRrT8jkY_jmfukBuIBfktEPp7rD5ItL1H0vyn6qeqVyKlhakQ-fvyc6atzV7Q9PnwIvo4TGdh2zXi2al-_wV8t_gUAAP__qJmXKg)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

name: Julia Letlow
subject: POLLS ARE OPEN - MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julia Letlow for Louisiana
body:
Early Voting May 2nd - 9th; Election Day May 16th

| | |
---
| | | | [|
---](https://julialetlow.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=70758973fc60553eda6683b43&id=2d2189c448&e=95355a072c)
| | | | | | Friend,
Today is the first day of early voting for the United States Senate, and I am asking for your vote.
This is the moment we have been working toward together, and your vote is what gets us across the finish line.
President Trump has given me his Complete and Total Endorsement because he knows I am conservative to my core, he knows I will stand with him and fight for the America First agenda, and he knows Louisiana deserves a senator who will not waver.
That is the choice on this ballot: President Trump’s endorsed conservative, or the senator who voted to convict him.
**Early Voting: Saturday, May 2 – Saturday, May 9** 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM _Note: Closed Sunday, May 3_
**Election Day: Saturday, May 16** 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM
To find your early voting location or your Election Day polling place, visit [GeauxVote.com](https://julialetlow.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=70758973fc60553eda6683b43&id=a37d157b85&e=95355a072c).
One important note: You may have heard confusion about Louisiana’s U.S. House primaries following the recent Supreme Court ruling on the congressional map. The Senate primary is moving forward exactly as scheduled.
Please tell your family. Tell your neighbors. Tell your church. The best thing we can do this week is make sure the people in our lives know the Senate primary is still happening, that early voting is underway, and that every vote matters.
These past few months, I have had the honor of crisscrossing our state. I have sat with farmers and law enforcement officers, with teachers and nurses, with small business owners and with moms and dads who are worried about the country we are leaving our children. I have listened, I have learned, and I have carried their voices with me every step of the way.
I am ready to fight for Louisiana in the United States Senate. I am ready to stand with President Trump and finish the job. And I am asking, with a humble and grateful heart, for your vote.
Geaux vote, and bring someone with you.
After you vote, take a picture and share it on social media. Tag me so we can reshare it.
This is the people’s seat, not my seat. Let’s go win it!
With gratitude,
Julia
---
| | | | | | Paid for by Julia Letlow for Louisiana
---
| | | | | _Copyright © 2026 Julia Letlow for Louisiana, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Julia Letlow for Louisiana
P.O. Box 106
Baton Rouge, LA 70821

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://julialetlow.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=70758973fc60553eda6683b43&id=f4f124b587&e=95355a072c&c=1be3e807ca) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://julialetlow.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=70758973fc60553eda6683b43&id=f4f124b587&t=b&e=95355a072c&c=1be3e807ca).
---
|

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Exclusive - Leaked Poll Results
body:
Plus: A Super El Niño is coming — and it's not subtle. | New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/j73wpTH6RpU?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| | | | | |
A leaked Democratic primary poll [just got leaked to us ](https://us.list-manage.com/FxkL0QS2r2O?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)— and it's worse for the liberal climate agenda than anything Republicans could have written.
Haaland is up 30. But what's buried in this poll is the bigger story.
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/dZCj0owJ9Hf?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| |
🔥 **86% OF NM DEMOCRATS JUST ADMITTED IT — CLIMATE AGENDA BURIED BY THEIR OWN VOTERS**
The poll dives past the horse race and into oil and gas. What it found is devastating to everyone pushing net-zero in Santa Fe.
86% of NM Democrats know exactly what funds half the state budget. 78% are afraid of what happens to schools and roads if production drops.
Then there's the question that drops climate support to 37%. We tell you what it is.
When you see how fast this house of cards falls, you'll understand why Mimi Stewart's net-zero push was always a paper tiger.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/bUklhe5Ey6I?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |
🚨 **HAALAND'S 30-POINT LEAD HOLDS — BREGMAN'S UNFAVES DOUBLE OVERNIGHT**
Sam Bregman attacked. The attacks worked — kind of. Haaland's unfavorables ticked up. But Bregman's doubled in 30 days.
His total favorables climbed too. And it still doesn't matter. Mark walks through the math problem Bregman cannot solve, and the one moment in this poll that tells you exactly how this race ends.

🌨️ **A SUPER EL NIÑO IS COMING — AND IT'S NOT SUBTLE**
NOAA models are showing 80-90% probability. The temperature signal is two degrees above average — a "super" event we haven't seen in two decades.
Mark walks through the maps and tells you what it means for snowpack, ski season, fire danger, and the monsoon.

😢 **BEN SASSE'S FINAL WISH ON 60 MINUTES**
The former Nebraska senator is dying of pancreatic cancer. Scott Pelley asked him a question nobody saw coming.
Sasse's answer about his daughters and his teenage son will gut you. "There are no maverick molecules in the universe."
If you have kids, you need to hear this.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/GCNwQfa_1aO?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |

PLUS: GOP tied 50-50 on the generic congressional ballot. Kamala Harris back on top of the 2028 Democratic primary. Gregg Hull's farewell as Rio Rancho mayor. And the faith data that flips the script on Gen Z.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **Watch** on[ YouTube](https://us.list-manage.com/Vd81u83TMRr?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://us.list-manage.com/seUcxP56FrL?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://us.list-manage.com/swswEZU4jCS?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://us.list-manage.com/rstDyV2mQX8?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_

name: Laura Gillen
subject: We are just getting started 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I have taken on powerful people before and I know how to fight.

| I want to start May by saying thank you! Because of supporters like you we closed out April strong.

In a race this competitive, that kind of support makes a real difference and I do not take it for granted.

Republicans are targeting this seat hard because they are scared of what we have built. They are spending millions on ads in this district. They recruited a new opponent endorsed by Anthony D'Esposito. The NRCC has been coming after NY-04 for months. They are doing everything they can to make this race look like theirs to win.

_But I’m not scared and I’m not backing down._

I have taken on powerful people before and I know how to fight. Holding this seat is one of the most direct ways to check what is happening in Washington and I know together we can win.

Now let's kick off May strong. [_**Can I count on you to chip in today so we can keep the momentum going and show Republicans this seat is defended?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130610098/618338457/798536563?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2026-05-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDk0MWY1Mi0zMTQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRaeWySa4uUwwRrTVVBh4alR1UZKqL_EcvJS9_07wjw=)

clean_body: I have taken on powerful people before and I know how to fight. | I want to start May by saying thank you! Because of supporters like you we closed out April strong. In a race this competitive, that kind of support makes a real difference and I do not take it for granted. Republicans are targeting this seat hard because they are scared of what we have built. They are spending millions on ads in this district. They recruited a new opponent endorsed by Anthony D'Esposito. The NRCC has been coming after NY-04 for months. They are doing everything they can to make this race look like theirs to win. But I’m not scared and I’m not backing down. I have taken on powerful people before and I know how to fight. Holding this seat is one of the most direct ways to check what is happening in Washington and I know together we can win. Now let's kick off May strong. = | = Thank you for your support, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Break Hollywoodâ€™s monopoly onchildrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Today you have a very special chance

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztr9u8c56sj3cu5chjnje9uc5ri8ji637acse1bg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv5l8je1115n8baa76tvos8csb7r0s0nss1rvajg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq3e2c05n0989egjr5ej0elbpt2a69bsplkjjuv0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc70s0d4rgog2sonei6rak31b6icbucbknikhjv8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z59ec5veq57cv1etjnneiovn1lrcjmn03p6bki08_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv596inosm8sdt8kcjt3p1ivelr8emrvpio5d8ng_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9nbg849kb4tp729jkm2is9s0ectf7s9dmukovbo_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0enm2totdp4s6inat7g34t0ujef91vdul7rbih0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5nvd9lsce0ene6kl8a9t9kerrdp8hk5kil08m3o_rp22sh2s8i6epr7ctgmapr2c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

I thought more people would step up to help a couple of America First veterans, but I guess not.
Commander Zinke here, and I may be retiring, but I'm not going quietly into the night.
The SEALs taught me to always assemble the most effective, lethal team possible. I had the honor of training and leading American heroes like Rob O'Neill, the Luttrells, and Chris Kyle. Now, I've recruited the finest once again.
My friend and fellow combat veteran, Aaron Flint is battle-tested and ready to take on the radical left. Aaron is MAGA A.F.- and he has my complete and total support in this race.[DONATE TODAY >>
](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/5zyOqEGfAfLFnqeqpI-UTnB-o9zgx0winRUGIYc1b2izr8BFyD7fXqJJJNh0sVJYOeSy3Td9aoFeqY8s_VoeoRWv7MLiTNsPqXjwSVDqOcBd-fj9b8O-Jqu23RjxMdcsNLAyw6VtkuO3JGycd7ybZIrtBACJRzCOnRF5OhtFws8LCuXZfjXNqw260j9_1b4Hm_71eD9JgQXJ5RaRYMAzKzBsJYdlj2t-Fl2-SNk__CAUbExqSp3AE1cdXjgyy7FJlgqsYWlbZLAYGZneuRzKIawvSRTxsX8L865yb9QDdfGgV1i_BcVAn364GQWwaNujU4bh4bob2hLwJFAYR5rbDuyk-c3mwMXTPgf8JHDXN2F1fXzNHfQTBpv61yXDN2HATXlSd-C-5npQhE8w797Of9XaJogKer3b7d2uoFOEJAgS8K0iChw5Oym-VMWOOQw6C5HtHA-b3mJ7kX3XKLFB_td3SJJWcnCPYC07gJAblS7uqfSkZ5wC57NwHlk57DuQ4t1m1oT_gB6-A3PLl23tG2l863-2oTm5hLvYSl5BhNY2cmLRwb-57y9_J2i2RI-g0-VHG5Y_ovXU797TEY1C0YVBEpJ6roGhQpRBqclc9lr89iZjS2eZhXpUIvkK_Ny7O90Fcyg1CPenowsRL-uAHOUQMcpb6UPa_sEyGZkliiM7lSC_TRnVQu7tu9FMGp8tbB9P4EINiQeQc9IW1zt5P2f-oGqqE13RYJWQqk0vPOP0yancj3l9EIiAWzOalJiWS-sy9kve6WBKU7yRzKvOi-d9TgbeEVJI8g_Gu0ws06PE-xz1q78cZ66RETAm87yGMqaOSbULeeoKXUtO6zfTbbsSh-h3t1a1dVGg0iactNJ1XvTlGLJR1RZN5A/IqLAnTErNFLG3n8S8f8n6uJK47Xj1wbc/20)But If we don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will take advantage of this major pickup opportunity and start flooding even MORE cash into this race.
And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Peter.
After 23 years in the Navy SEALS, 2 years in Trump's cabinet, and 4 terms in Congress, I know who the right man for the job is.
Which is why I'm backing friend Aaron Flint- a combat veteran, family man, and TRUE America First patriot. wore the uniform for 20+ years - deployments in Iraq and Afghanistan - and now spreads the TRUTH across Montana's airwaves. He tells Montanans what the fake news media won't, holds the left accountable, and gives conservatives a mic when the left silences us.
I know a true America First warrior when I see one. I was in Trump's first cabinet. I took the incoming and remember who was and was not with us. Aaron was ALWAYS with us 100%.
He's in this race because he knows what's at stake and what will happen to this country if we lose and the left wins. Aaron is 100% Montana tough, 100% America First, 100% pro-Trump, and 110% bought into the mission.

clean_body: thought my last message would've worked, but I guess not. I thought more people would step up to help a couple of America First veterans, but I guess not. Commander Zinke here, and I may be retiring, but I'm not going quietly into the night. The SEALs taught me to always assemble the most effective, lethal team possible. I had the honor of training and leading American heroes like Rob O'Neill, the Luttrells, and Chris Kyle. Now, I've recruited the finest once again. My friend and fellow combat veteran, Aaron Flint is battle-tested and ready to take on the radical left. Aaron is MAGA A.F.- and he has my complete and total support in this race. If we don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will take advantage of this major pickup opportunity and start flooding even MORE cash into this race. And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Peter. After 23 years in the Navy SEALS, 2 years in Trump's cabinet, and 4 terms in Congress, I know who the right man for the job is. Which is why I'm backing friend Aaron Flint- a combat veteran, family man, and TRUE America First patriot. wore the uniform for 20+ years - deployments in Iraq and Afghanistan - and now spreads the TRUTH across Montana's airwaves. He tells Montanans what the fake news media won't, holds the left accountable, and gives conservatives a mic when the left silences us. I know a true America First warrior when I see one. I was in Trump's first cabinet. I took the incoming and remember who was and was not with us. Aaron was ALWAYS with us 100%. He's in this race because he knows what's at stake and what will happen to this country if we lose and the left wins. Aaron is 100% Montana tough, 100% America First, 100% pro-Trump, and 110% bought into the mission. But running for Congress with Socialist Democrats breathing down his neck will be his toughest challenge yet, and he can't get there without our support. humbly asking- will you help me keep this seat red? Thank you,Ryan Zinke Navy SEAL in CongressAaron Flint is a retired member of the United States Army. #

❗ Friends -- to everybody who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don’t skip this important message.
The Trump administration is trying to change the rules to let the USPS deliver guns through the mail — with no background checks, licensing, or training — and we need you to help fight back.

Since 1927, federal law has prohibited the United States Postal Service from carrying or delivering handguns as mail — with exceptions for members of the military, law enforcement, or licensed gun manufacturers or dealers.
Donald Trump is trying to change that.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q22026.j3JysD&refcode=em260502-1-b&t=1&akid=11443%2E3935704%2EVmFBu6)
His Department of Justice recently issued a memorandum saying that they would no longer enforce this ban. Now, the USPS is proposing a change to their existing regulations.

If this rule goes into effect, it would mean people who shouldn’t have a gun will be able to go around state and federal laws and get a gun mailed to them.
**This change also means that gun traffickers have a new way to move firearms through America’s communities.**
At a time when gun violence is the #1 killer of kids and teenagers in our country...this rule would make us all less safe. We need to fight back.

You have helped us so much fighting back against extremist legislation and passing gun safety laws. Now, we need your support again to push back on this proposed rule.
[**Please, will you please donate $3 to help GIFFORDS PAC today? Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. What matters most is that you are taking action today in the fight to make our communities safer.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q22026.j3JysD&refcode=em260502-1-b&t=2&akid=11443%2E3935704%2EVmFBu6)

The team at GIFFORDS

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re done playing it safe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
2026 is our biggest year yet. Here’s why:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260502-1&t=1&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)
**2026 is our biggest year yet, Peter.**
Let me tell you why.
Trump is demolishing the economy, dragging us into another endless war in Iran, and creating new crises for working people every single day.
The right has been playing a decades-long chess game, investing in down-ballot races, stacking state legislatures, and systematically dismantling the rights and freedoms people have spent generations fighting for.
**And the Democratic Party is at a crossroads.**
There are too many establishment Democrats who are unwilling to meet this moment with the urgency and moral clarity it demands. Too many of them talk about fighting for working people while taking money from the same corporations that bleed them dry. They write strongly worded tweets and perform empty gestures in a moment where playing it safe just isn’t good enough.
**We’re done with that.**
Leaders We Deserve exists to elect a new generation of leaders. Bold, fearless, working class progressives who don’t take a dime from special interests or corporate PACs. Leaders who have the backbone to do what’s right, not what’s safe. Leaders who come from the communities they’re fighting for and refuse to forget it.
That’s what we’re building. And it’s working.
We’ve already racked up several victories this cycle, like **Demi Palecek** , who just beat back her corporate-funded opponent. And we’re backing bold candidates like **Patrick Roath** , who is currently taking on a 25-year incumbent that thought he could stay complacent in his seat.
The House majority is within reach. We’re going to flip state legislatures. And we have even more endorsements on the way. More races to back, and more candidates ready to prove that fearless, progressive leadership is how we win back the voters we lost in 2024 and change the face of power in the Democratic Party for good.
This is the moment we’ve been working towards, and we need you with us in it.
**[Will you pitch in $5 today to help Leaders We Deserve continue backing the fearless leaders this moment demands?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260502_1_biggest.IiAgWI&refcode=em20260502-3433&amount=5&t=2&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260502_1_biggest.IiAgWI&amount=5&refcode=em20260502-3433&t=21&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260502-1&t=22&refcode2=3433_587540_pRUkdY&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3433%2E587540%2EpRUkdY)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Peter,

I've had enough.

If you're serving in Congress and there are serious questions about your conduct, you shouldn't be anywhere near a committee room.

Yet here we are.

Ilhan Omar is still sitting on committees, still voting, still shaping decisions for this country.

_Why?_

When Democrats had power, they didn't hesitate. They kicked Republicans off committees without blinking.

_Now we 're supposed to play nice?_

No.

_Remove her.
No committees.
No influence. _

Hold people accountable--for once.

| [ **TAKE ACTION NOW >>** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2daaec8d5af849d29cdbb408a7afe7d9&_e=GxOKossaavmaLNnLd4azfCSYg7VvOH4m0YHPQpxzKoJ-aPKHowhoLyEXn5jI_IB771GPqxAMZrvYbEKIrEyHyycP76FfGTsux6btRbUcZmRqLRjKBsjh-c-Is7Ef-g9AnCWw5asKdmH5a_nrqZL8AMyVYbJboQxac-PoFfUFpSK3vdFgNLwP6vF3Igoh2Xk3vCetkUAAnynGRvxzCaDAhYKi9qQrnAzOiag6ezzWFQJZDBEltbaZWfthXjB4RpaeEuRZs-7vnR3leZqExNx1IutpHzy9QLEVlfROorZ1tKQZD82Bb5GjLLtUnDI5N1MuwE8Dei4G5NA2IzMa6hz9n1kqFf4uXHpQfn35tC-bOSvjYGcIqdW3rK4PGxyUOgBKC3rNt_8DEgnextFAFa5_P0Pv65aAM1cT6Do4lWwzYfqk-2L-1MNMUeqlKVfu6s-stELdTd-d3V7sxC9OXeD5Yl2fBiEWynG7iY8Fe1FlsY-fQi5U-aB6Sd0CVLMB0UXf8o1QfN4h1sZ9u5Rzcp-Khu_T6FJjJYr6Si3F-yoFWNzodijEQ7y-tU-lVZab7_hb)
---

This isn't complicated.

Coach Tommy Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2daaec8d5af849d29cdbb408a7afe7d9&_e=GxOKossaavmaLNnLd4azfCSYg7VvOH4m0YHPQpxzKoJ-aPKHowhoLyEXn5jI_IB771GPqxAMZrvYbEKIrEyHyycP76FfGTsux6btRbUcZmRqLRjKBsjh-c-Is7Ef-g9AnCWw5asKdmH5a_nrqZL8AMyVYbJboQxac-PoFfUFpSK3vdFgNLwP6vF3Igoh2Xk3ulBhkMi0gumTo0GeplTGSaFuXSVvl-x0yv9IHFhH5i83iAzWxWRBgA5RMVH1HyYnq0B0iWVs3czBInjOtyLmRD0w1lDwKjKYeDmjOSnd6BwfPYUQ83koTgqqTkadO0yiNngnY8lQsE0lqf7dMrZs3VsT7FDvng7aTur7oefOQU8LLYb5i5yZmtlBiD43OCCrumkfoJD6GrOeOP743uFplRyds6WNmAX9OwVUjHgd8qqLX17K2eBi76uwvnDJqNqerxLc_oh1pWCoq9LweDCP4cZdqyxxRaS2h8UKH2LxPz28xTXGFeOdiyvDA4bCO8EXjqlSR0KgXy9lfFLZNwZT3ElQSf8RQfjFUgRj8XiEvVxNaDfbJG6Y5O1YdR8IPwEa)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Ilhan Omar MUST be REMOVED from Congress | Peter, I've had enough. If you're serving in Congress and there are serious questions about your conduct, you shouldn't be anywhere near a committee room. Yet here we are. Ilhan Omar is still sitting on committees, still voting, still shaping decisions for this country. Why? When Democrats had power, they didn't hesitate. They kicked Republicans off committees without blinking. Now we 're supposed to play nice? No. Remove her. No committees. No influence. Hold people accountable--for once. | This isn't complicated. Coach Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? I just wanted to quickly reach out and say thank you.

name: Devastating blow
subject: SCOTUS hands MAGA dozens of congressional seats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The Supreme Court has eroded our rights, broken our politics and handed MAGA one win after another. We can fight back!
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9icaJx5mSe_y7aMZ8xNuCO90c6NV1sv7zl3m1Jh3DCtV8zap44N_Gz52ema0dRvuGe9zp_TQTu5GzH88YsNcpVKlZvw85vy4jxpmrdR_D7b6--KoicFi9SpsOztnAc_kdszTUxONTmUqbv1aQMFbDIKgb5AtXN-q9o8rWd2wHChKr439vPfpFfz_cabszedDibb1LgkP1F1e_JJXynNCED2bc56LVnJBD-oGpc0oBtimcmRuZ6vxA==&c=glu9xMnKMHb6WLPa97k2FgurZt9-HGeNnHjUTSbPAoFIvtPiI6M_og==&ch=kIFvtZ8OlYdqVufpeh9sYv_DoO2Zyw4QdifmE405rfDAps0IfM7BVA==)
---
|
Peter,
The Supreme Court of the United States handed Trump and MAGA a massive gift, striking down a key portion of the Voting Rights Act that paves the way for MAGA to eliminate 25+ majority black congressional districts nationwide:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9icaJx5mSe_y7aMZ8xNuCO90c6NV1sv7zl3m1Jh3DCtV8zap44N_Gz52ema0dRvuGe9zp_TQTu5GzH88YsNcpVKlZvw85vy4jxpmrdR_D7b6--KoicFi9SpsOztnAc_kdszTUxONTmUqbv1aQMFbDIKgb5AtXN-q9o8rWd2wHChKr439vPfpFfz_cabszedDibb1LgkP1F1e_JJXynNCED2bc56LVnJZNTBKFvjzx3mOJxff0Y_Ww==&c=glu9xMnKMHb6WLPa97k2FgurZt9-HGeNnHjUTSbPAoFIvtPiI6M_og==&ch=kIFvtZ8OlYdqVufpeh9sYv_DoO2Zyw4QdifmE405rfDAps0IfM7BVA==)
---
While decisions like blocking Trump's tariff plan get the headlines, the truth is the Court's extremist conservative majority has quietly used the "shadow docket" to support Trump's policies 80% of the time.
That's on top of giving Trump sweeping immunity that allows him to act without fear of accountability.
The Court's extremist conservative majority further gutted the Voting Rights Act in a decision the Associated Press described like this:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9icaJx5mSe_y7aMZ8xNuCO90c6NV1sv7zl3m1Jh3DCtV8zap44N_Gz52ema0dRvuGe9zp_TQTu5GzH88YsNcpVKlZvw85vy4jxpmrdR_D7b6--KoicFi9SpsOztnAc_kdszTUxONTmUqbv1aQMFbDIKgb5AtXN-q9o8rWd2wHChKr439vPfpFfz_cabszedDibb1LgkP1F1e_JJXynNCED2bc56LVnJIVP1zWFmwrt7bz6TwCMu2w==&c=glu9xMnKMHb6WLPa97k2FgurZt9-HGeNnHjUTSbPAoFIvtPiI6M_og==&ch=kIFvtZ8OlYdqVufpeh9sYv_DoO2Zyw4QdifmE405rfDAps0IfM7BVA==)
---
Our nation's highest court, the one that is supposed to uphold the Constitution and protect our rights has been captured by ideological extremists.
❌They've sided with Trump - including giving him freedom from accountability
❌They've eroded our rights (Dobbs)
❌They've empowered the billionaire-funded dark money groups that have stolen our government and broken our politics. (Citizens United)
❌They've sided with corporate power over people's rights time and again.
If you think it's time to do something about it, if you believe that reforming and rebalancing the Supreme Court is necessary to defend our democracy, let us know by signing the petition below:
[>>> SIGN THE PETITION TO SUPPORT SUPREME COURT REFORM!](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9icaJx5mSe_y7aMZ8xNuCO90c6NV1sv7zl3m1Jh3DCtV8zap44N_CB8LRJGoYQ5d3xhvayUfloRwthnAKkFOQJjY6jaqsV-_Vk-bJutxY7bDx_-SA-Xr_P7v-9xtv5CodbHWzIR7Oh1TbzzucqVAsjXTsqsJC70l2eeUZizntdjKf87NVC4o8_e8uPclgmXdjfOofH4hxa4evM48UsMqQ==&c=glu9xMnKMHb6WLPa97k2FgurZt9-HGeNnHjUTSbPAoFIvtPiI6M_og==&ch=kIFvtZ8OlYdqVufpeh9sYv_DoO2Zyw4QdifmE405rfDAps0IfM7BVA==) We're building the firewall state by state, but it may not be enough. As our supporters, we want to know what you think because we are in this together.
-- Team Defend Our Courts
---

subject: Righting the wrongs of the J6 witch hunts
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b339cc22c00b4b238939357ef42e8ce4&_e=eDX8l_GyhnACETRm4FQmNXzgnyFie52ptTrF0knoBXuhXIuwqGuIb9yvsqAkHJKMfKWO9zD46i63wOUP0kCHuBk4-r9kCZ1YjEchDEFvUV-xfVcf466x4vOzsJjGKq-2kFiIjUMrs-IfhqOgCav3JZX-AOCK3LCwZldsBtxBedEfPW2ZFFTBYHNBM783oxaLlvQSbmC21-BU5ce_FKtRP1bL1VRNUM8Vk4430mOJwlgDBksvkq__xykq_1tKbLOrRVl-yeYbmgHuu6ThwjPqpGhyO-EdNwPvZMOgnADDXvTrSP5k7KPUQsL1DpS4pwUIoprp2Md2qg5O2cOK0RkZui-JWXa-D9BX24T3uINtgPHgVSSghDW74eULJDNw6la6DjnmXptUe9bzcHhdfX5HOC-xWLTedINqU9vN8518YZXAy6-0_7GlRGyUSdBVJ376k017cEWwoFIvf0shdN-dATK5R_24H8ckJLZ83xZ5guB2EHotlaxOA7eUhSthP9sS_ect-3uQbxIU3Hwxq22KlUW195mJjTZeJI7iTjMISc8b1bFxUzYQh_qSjVsPpyihu_8EhrZ9kdsTtpAEaaqyn6BWNGT3J8iooxwJ4tByi5sqOuaWh4JENnI17dE8pJfI)

Peter,

No one likes asking for help. Most of us have worked hard all our lives to be self-sufficient and provide for our families.

But for our January 6 patriots still waiting on pardons -- good individuals who answered the call to peacefully protest a stolen election -- the last five-plus years have been nothing short of a nightmare.

Luckily, **the Trump Department of Justice has rightly asked the court to vacate the charges and convictions against the unpardoned Proud Boys and Oath Keepers leaders** and dismiss the cases with prejudice.

After years of weaponized prosecutions under the Biden regime, this is the right step toward real justice.

**But a new threat has emerged -- not from the DOJ, but from the radical left in Congress.**

Congressman Jamie Raskin -- one of the most partisan Democrats in Washington -- filed an amicus brief in three separate appeals in the D.C. Circuit to defend the original jury verdicts.

**Our side 's attorneys had to drop everything and work around the clock all weekend to draft a strong opposition brief! **

The filing deadline is extremely tight -- early this week.

These patriots have been completely financially drained after more than five years of brutal legal battles, imprisonment, and persecution. Many are veterans who served our country honorably, only to be treated like enemies of the state by their own government. They simply do not have the resources to fund this critical fight on their own while still dealing with other lingering issues.

**Stand in the Gap has stepped in to raise emergency funds so their legal team can file a powerful response -- on time and with strength.**

That is why we need your help today, Peter.

Our goal is to raise at least $120,000 this week to defend the 12 individuals involved.

clean_body: Peter, No one likes asking for help. Most of us have worked hard all our lives to be self-sufficient and provide for our families. But for our January 6 patriots still waiting on pardons -- good individuals who answered the call to peacefully protest a stolen election -- the last five-plus years have been nothing short of a nightmare. Luckily, the Trump Department of Justice has rightly asked the court to vacate the charges and convictions against the unpardoned Proud Boys and Oath Keepers leaders and dismiss the cases with prejudice. After years of weaponized prosecutions under the Biden regime, this is the right step toward real justice. But a new threat has emerged -- not from the DOJ, but from the radical left in Congress. Congressman Jamie Raskin -- one of the most partisan Democrats in Washington -- filed an amicus brief in three separate appeals in the D.C. Circuit to defend the original jury verdicts. Our side 's attorneys had to drop everything and work around the clock all weekend to draft a strong opposition brief! The filing deadline is extremely tight -- early this week. These patriots have been completely financially drained after more than five years of brutal legal battles, imprisonment, and persecution. Many are veterans who served our country honorably, only to be treated like enemies of the state by their own government. They simply do not have the resources to fund this critical fight on their own while still dealing with other lingering issues. Stand in the Gap has stepped in to raise emergency funds so their legal team can file a powerful response -- on time and with strength. That is why we need your help today, Peter. Our goal is to raise at least $120,000 this week to defend the 12 individuals involved. Every dollar you give helps protect the rule of law, push back against leftist interference, and stand in the gap for these American patriots. Or keep reading to learn exactly who these individuals are -- many of them veterans -- why they were unfairly targeted, and why this fight matters to every conservative who believes in fairness and justice. These were the patriots that the Biden DOJ pursued the hardest with politically charged trials. Stewart Rhodes (Veteran), founder and leader of the Oath Keepers, was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 18 years in prison. Kelly Meggs was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 12 years. Kenneth Harrelson (Veteran) was convicted of related felony charges and sentenced to 4 years. Jessica Watkins (Veteran) was convicted of related felony charges and sentenced to 8.5 years. Roberto Minuta, Edward Vallejo (Veteran), Joseph Hackett, and David Moerschel were all convicted of seditious conspiracy after their own months-long trial and received substantial prison sentences with federal terrorism enhancements. Ethan Nordean was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 18 years. Joseph Biggs (Veteran) was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 17 years. Zachary Rehl (Veteran) was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 15 years. Dominic Pezzola (Veteran) was convicted of serious felony charges in the same case and sentenced to 10 years. These individuals should never have been targeted with inflated seditious conspiracy charges in the first place. Now, the Trump administration is finally moving to correct this injustice and vacate the convictions. But Raskin is fighting tooth and nail to stop it. He is demanding the court appoint a special lawyer (an independent amicus) to oppose the DOJ and defend the old jury verdicts -- essentially trying to keep the deep state 's narrative alive and continue punishing these patriots. This need is especially urgent. These patriots are broke and still fighting on multiple fronts. They cannot afford to pay lawyers to defend against this latest leftist attack themselves. Even if you're unable to give financially right now, your prayers for these patriots, for wisdom in the courtroom, and for protection against political persecution are always powerful and deeply appreciated. Thank you for your time, consideration, and continued support of conservative values and American justice. In solidarity, Shane Jenkins Founder and Executive Director of Stand in the Gap P.S. This is exactly the kind of emergency Stand in the Gap was built to handle. Even after President Trump commuted their sentences, many of our brothers and sisters are still struggling to rebuild their lives. They endured prison, lost jobs, homes, friends, and family. They were publicly defamed and smeared by the mainstream media and the radical left as "insurrectionists" and "terrorists." In many ways, that 's when the hardest part began -- financial ruin, ongoing stigma, and now fresh attacks from radicals like Jamie Raskin.** After everything our fellow patriots have endured, they shouldn't have to face this alone. The courtroom fight continues with a razor-sharp deadline. Without your rapid support, these individuals won't have the legal resources they need to push back effectively. It isn’t surprising, but that doesn’t make it any less outrageous.
The Supreme Court just ripped away another core American freedom: the right to a fair and equal vote in elections.
By allowing lawmakers to draw new voting maps that will significantly weaken representation for communities of color, the Court has just unleashed a new wave of racially discriminatory redistricting.
**This ruling paves the way for Republicans to redraw maps, giving them the power to create 19 more safe GOP U.S. House seats and eliminate 191 Democratic-held state legislative seats across 10 Southern states. **
_**That’s enough to lock in one-party rule for a generation. This ruling does not just affect what state legislatures do in 2026, it has the power to affect our country’s voting maps for generations to come.**_
[**We’ve been preparing for this egregious ruling, and we’re ready to organize our pro-democracy movement against new gerrymanders. But the scale of our response to this urgent threat will depend in part on the resources we can raise right now. Those outcomes aren’t inevitable. The more we push back, the more we can limit the damage.
Through grassroots mobilization, public education, coalition building, and public pressure, we can work to prevent new racially discriminatory voting maps. And we can continue advocating for long-term solutions to this ruling, including federal legislation that would ensure fair representation.

clean_body: We’ve been preparing for this. | | | | | BREAKING NEWS: In a landmark ruling, the U.S. Supreme Court opens the door for politicians to rig more voting maps in their favor by silencing Black and Brown Americans. = It isn’t surprising, but that doesn’t make it any less outrageous. The Supreme Court just ripped away another core American freedom: the right to a fair and equal vote in elections. By allowing lawmakers to draw new voting maps that will significantly weaken representation for communities of color, the Court has just unleashed a new wave of racially discriminatory redistricting. This ruling paves the way for Republicans to redraw maps, giving them the power to create 19 more safe GOP U.S. House seats and eliminate 191 Democratic-held state legislative seats across 10 Southern states. That’s enough to lock in one-party rule for a generation. This ruling does not just affect what state legislatures do in 2026, it has the power to affect our country’s voting maps for generations to come. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Let’s be clear: this ruling, in and of itself, does not immediately redraw any maps. It does not immediately move any voters of color into new districts where their vote can’t make a difference. Those outcomes aren’t inevitable. The more we push back, the more we can limit the damage. Through grassroots mobilization, public education, coalition building, and public pressure, we can work to prevent new racially discriminatory voting maps. And we can continue advocating for long-term solutions to this ruling, including federal legislation that would ensure fair representation. = In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team * = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2026 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. body:
My opponent just launched his first attack against me.
Hi Peter, it's Sherrod Brown reaching out urgently.
My opponent just started airing his first attack ad against me. His super PAC is spending _over a million dollars_ to plaster the airwaves here in Ohio and mislead swing voters.
**We need to respond right away.**
**[So my team is launching an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $200,000 so we can get our own ads on the air ASAP and fight back. Please split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103090?refcode=em20260502-10381&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10381%2E614464%2Eroxh2m)**

Poll after poll proves we have a serious shot at winning in Ohio and _The Cook Political Report_ has moved this race in my favor _twice._ On top of that, Senate Republicans' biggest super PAC announced their largest cash infusion of the year will be in Ohio. Now, my opponent is launching ads of his own – _much earlier than we expected._
The harsh reality is if we don’t respond today, persuadable voters will _only_ be seeing these misleading ads against us. **That will put our chances of flipping this seat in serious jeopardy.**
We can’t let this become a one-sided fight. The only way we can stay competitive in this race is by getting on even financial footing. So I need you to chip in – even $5.

Peter, If you watched the debate this week, you saw exactly what we're up against in this election. Standing on that stage, **I honestly felt like I was in the Twilight Zone.** I had to listen to six different Democrats -- the exact same politicians whose fingerprints are all over California's decline -- pretend they will fix this state. These Democrats spend billions of our dollars, and what do we get?
* A "high-speed rail" with zero track laid.
* Cities occupied by drug addicts and the mentally ill.
* Neighborhoods torched by fires because reservoirs were left empty.

[In just a few days, ballots will be mailed to every registered voter in California. Will you make a donation to help me defeat these radical, failed politicians? »](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/gBb_FprzWEAGm8SvHP2MyaFwYA0nIlpfWCiiUc_ZeDIlVTNmdZoBP-fsWd9iDc0BD_X_fsXJiNcmqaSyAXJ6nH-bE62hiUOcv7atIGTQLdWKsRwqLyifHGRLVoHRb3DFIupooXSpKig2JVLA5x9x-QcSgZJnN5Pzd2RjY6vL9WJRCd5cUYxu8djmoCM4bLcuUI4r5JI5gNvnwsHsi4Uat3yi1y9C85bTixTiS1zj0_u10btDWP_CZwyUoZIp-aZfjn4CyN3IVB6epZ9nhfpp3hlFOn5iWAIW_hyGNsfZRGg_zVun-rZul-XvaiY20hPZv0PNfJdElJkD9bPX0IjpiBG50gnlfiZK57ctw_bOXn0Jfp-cObZ5QThxspzwJMb1mKxZaCFSHbbK8waJkUVSDQ4OfP8o2zggdiNoLCxUO6UYycDlpRWk1NoUspbiId3u-oup0u0HaCOoMX9ft_3mIGjpJAs4hBBwfUEmTsdGcIHb9PYz2PFn3eYgfzHPF3vUIi1OVYGHyVeJ6DJZJN9VWdXtEpRcIVQtt1F1IMARIeJXRBZkqSvi/gUfyvyI9x2n2atmNBonXjg9KV_4XZkOu/20)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Thank you for a successful April!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
We have a long way to go, but with the progress we made in April, I’m confident we’re on the right track.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130615380/618349200/30495591?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-05-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU1Y2Q5Yi0zNzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5sGuEgxma3GmMoNtvtsuxmsCkO8k4atKvrbPJEMsnc=)
---
| I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all of your support in April — we finished the month strong, and it’s because of you.

Together, we’ve built a campaign that is powered by grassroots energy, and your commitment to our cause is what makes all the difference. We have a long way to go, but with the progress we made in April, I’m confident we’re on the right track.

Now, as we kick off May, the stakes are higher than ever. We’re getting closer to 2026, and Michigan is at the center of the fight for the House. Your continued support is crucial to help us defend MI-03, fight back against dark money targeting my district, and take back the House in 2026.

I’m so grateful for the energy you bring to this campaign, and I’m ready to keep working together to make sure West Michigan stays strong.

Thank you again — we wouldn’t be here without you.

Onward,

Hillary

clean_body: We have a long way to go, but with the progress we made in April, I’m confident we’re on the right track. | = | I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all of your support in April — we finished the month strong, and it’s because of you. Together, we’ve built a campaign that is powered by grassroots energy, and your commitment to our cause is what makes all the difference. We have a long way to go, but with the progress we made in April, I’m confident we’re on the right track. Now, as we kick off May, the stakes are higher than ever. We’re getting closer to 2026, and Michigan is at the center of the fight for the House. Your continued support is crucial to help us defend MI-03, fight back against dark money targeting my district, and take back the House in 2026. I’m so grateful for the energy you bring to this campaign, and I’m ready to keep working together to make sure West Michigan stays strong. Thank you again — we wouldn’t be here without you. Onward, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . body:
| Hi friend,

Some birthdays you celebrate. Some you put to work.

Our friend, Congresswoman Julie Johnson, turns 60 today — and it comes in the middle of one of the closest Democratic runoffs in the country.

More than $100 million in TV ads and two statewide runs were supposed to make this a formality for her opponent. It didn’t.

**Julie’s challenger left Washington, endorsed her for his seat, then jumped back in after two failed Senate bids. He parachuted back in with near-universal name recognition and still couldn’t close this out. Julie forced a runoff because when voters had a real choice, many chose her.**

That doesn’t happen by accident. It happens because Julie has built real trust — she’s principled, she follows through, and people know they can count on her when it matters. That kind of leadership isn’t interchangeable.

**Julie is the only Democratic woman representing North Texas and the only openly LGBTQ member of Congress from the South. She’s taken that responsibility seriously — showing up, following through, and delivering when it counts. In a race this close, that matters. She earned her seat in Congress. She is not a placeholder for someone who walked back in expecting it to be easy.**

This race will be decided in early voting. The base voters are clear, the margin is narrow, and the window to reach them is short.

So we’re putting today to work.
