clean_body: | Hi friend, Some birthdays you celebrate. Some you put to work. Our friend, Congresswoman Julie Johnson, turns 60 today — and it comes in the middle of one of the closest Democratic runoffs in the country. More than $100 million in TV ads and two statewide runs were supposed to make this a formality for her opponent. It didn’t. Julie’s challenger left Washington, endorsed her for his seat, then jumped back in after two failed Senate bids. He parachuted back in with near-universal name recognition and still couldn’t close this out. Julie forced a runoff because when voters had a real choice, many chose her. That doesn’t happen by accident. It happens because Julie has built real trust — she’s principled, she follows through, and people know they can count on her when it matters. That kind of leadership isn’t interchangeable. Julie is the only Democratic woman representing North Texas and the only openly LGBTQ member of Congress from the South. She’s taken that responsibility seriously — showing up, following through, and delivering when it counts. In a race this close, that matters. She earned her seat in Congress. She is not a placeholder for someone who walked back in expecting it to be easy. This race will be decided in early voting. The base voters are clear, the margin is narrow, and the window to reach them is short. name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N St
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
The Life of a Party Chairman: Leading with Purpose, Humor, and Unshakable Resolve
One of the greatest gifts I carry is the ability to find humor in almost everything--even in the whacky world of politics. As the primary heats up, the questions pour in: "What are you doing about...?" and "Why haven't you done...?" I often wish every concerned Republican could walk a day in my shoes. Boredom? Never on the agenda. The pace is relentless, but these concerns roll off my back because I know they come from a place of deep passion for our shared values and the future of our state and nation.
Too often, though, the loudest voices aren't the ones showing up on volunteer sign-up sheets or donor lists. Real change isn't built by complaints--it's built by commitment. And that's exactly what we're delivering. We continuing our work with organizing Days of Action in crucial districts and by hosting trainings on data usage and field programs.
Our printing, mailing, and postage program is firing on all cylinders. We're helping both state and local candidates secure the best possible rates on yard signs, mailers, and postage--saving precious campaign resources so every dollar goes toward winning hearts and minds. We've established a strong rhythm in this primary that will carry us seamlessly into an even busier, more victorious general election. I've learned more about postal regulations than I ever dreamed possible, and I've genuinely enjoyed building relationships with our friends at the Lincoln Post Office who help make it all happen.
This week, we issued a strong press release calling out Senator Meghan Hunt's tone-deaf and inflammatory rhetoric directed at UNK students. In the shadow of a third assassination attempt on President Trump and the heartbreaking on-campus assassination of Charlie Kirk just over seven months ago, the radical Left's continued recklessness is staggering. We will not stay silent while they endanger our leaders, our values, and our communities.
In the CD2 congressional primary, Democrats are flooding the race with money in a desperate attempt to take control of the seat. I've spoken with several media outlets about it, and I remain confident. We have an outstanding candidate in Brinker Harding--a man of integrity, dignity, and genuine connection. While his Democrat opponents trip over themselves trying to "out-left" one another, Brinker stands strong on principle. The contrast between the parties has never been clearer, and with the full support of the NEGOP, we will give Nebraska voters the sharp choice they deserve.
Meanwhile, preparations for the State Convention are in full swing. We're still awaiting to finalize results from nearly twenty county conventions. Leadership transitions are normal in a party as vibrant and active as ours, but the timing--right before the primary--adds urgency. Tracking down county leaders, crafting emails that actually get read, and mobilizing volunteers demands real time and effort. Yet we're doing it: speakers are being confirmed, agendas finalized, and exciting events planned for our June 6th Convention. This will be a powerful gathering of unified, energized Nebraska Republicans ready to take the fight forward. Mediation is another daily reality. Passionate people sometimes clash--over parliamentary questions, constitutional interpretations, or bruised feelings. As State Chair, I step in as mediator because strong convictions are a feature of our party, not a bug. Disappointment and frustration come with the territory when you fight for big things. But we channel that energy into productive action.
At the end of every long day, what sustains me is simple: core beliefs and enduring values. The belief in limited government, individual liberty, strong families, free enterprise, and a Nebraska where opportunity is real and freedom is protected. No matter how tiring the work becomes, I rise each morning focused on a bigger vision--a unified Nebraska Republican Party that stands shoulder to shoulder, working together for what is good, right, and noble.
We are not just electing candidates. We are defending a way of life. We are fighting for the Nebraska we love and the America we know can be great again.
Thank you for standing with us. Let's keep moving forward--together.
Onward to Victory,
For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

| A Message From Senator Pete Ricketts...
President Trump and I have been fighting for you in Washington. And that is what's at stake this fall.
We are delivering real results: the largest tax cut in American history, illegal border crossings at a 50-year low, and an America that leads with strength again. We promised. We delivered. But there is still work to do to fix four years of Joe Biden. That work gets a lot harder if Dan Osborn wins.
In 2024, Democrats spent $38 million in Nebraska to make Dan Osborn look like a moderate Independent. They were lying.
He would have voted against No Tax on Tips, No Tax on Overtime, and No Tax on Social Security. Fox News reported he's funneled almost $500k to himself and his own family. He is a grifter funneling money to himself using shady out of state companies to evade Nebraska disclosure laws. And just last week it was reported that his main campaign consultant is a proud Democratic Socialist, and his other consultant advises Zohran Mamdani.
Dan Osborn isn't a Nebraska Independent. He is a Democrat in disguise, and the people running his campaign are proud of it.
That's why I need your help. Democrats will pour millions into Nebraska again this cycle. They know our Senate seat decides whether or not they have the votes to impeach President Trump.
That's why I need your help. Spread the word about Dan Osborn. Volunteer, knock doors, and visit PeteRicketts.com for a yard sign or to join our team. Grassroots Nebraskans will always beat Democrat money, but only if we show up. I am honored to serve this state, and with your help, we will keep delivering.

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair The Life of a Party Chairman: Leading with Purpose, Humor, and Unshakable Resolve One of the greatest gifts I carry is the ability to find humor in almost everything--even in the whacky world of politics. As the primary heats up, the questions pour in: "What are you doing about...?" and "Why haven't you done...?" I often wish every concerned Republican could walk a day in my shoes. Boredom? Never on the agenda. The pace is relentless, but these concerns roll off my back because I know they come from a place of deep passion for our shared values and the future of our state and nation. Too often, though, the loudest voices aren't the ones showing up on volunteer sign-up sheets or donor lists. Real change isn't built by complaints--it's built by commitment. And that's exactly what we're delivering. We continuing our work with organizing Days of Action in crucial districts and by hosting trainings on data usage and field programs. Our printing, mailing, and postage program is firing on all cylinders. We're helping both state and local candidates secure the best possible rates on yard signs, mailers, and postage--saving precious campaign resources so every dollar goes toward winning hearts and minds. We've established a strong rhythm in this primary that will carry us seamlessly into an even busier, more victorious general election. I've learned more about postal regulations than I ever dreamed possible, and I've genuinely enjoyed building relationships with our friends at the Lincoln Post Office who help make it all happen. This week, we issued a strong press release calling out Senator Meghan Hunt's tone-deaf and inflammatory rhetoric directed at UNK students. In the shadow of a third assassination attempt on President Trump and the heartbreaking on-campus assassination of Charlie Kirk just over seven months ago, the radical Left's continued recklessness is staggering. We will not stay silent while they endanger our leaders, our values, and our communities. In the CD2 congressional primary, Democrats are flooding the race with money in a desperate attempt to take control of the seat. I've spoken with several media outlets about it, and I remain confident. We have an outstanding candidate in Brinker Harding--a man of integrity, dignity, and genuine connection. While his Democrat opponents trip over themselves trying to "out-left" one another, Brinker stands strong on principle. The contrast between the parties has never been clearer, and with the full support of the NEGOP, we will give Nebraska voters the sharp choice they deserve. Meanwhile, preparations for the State Convention are in full swing. We're still awaiting to finalize results from nearly twenty county conventions. Leadership transitions are normal in a party as vibrant and active as ours, but the timing--right before the primary--adds urgency. Tracking down county leaders, crafting emails that actually get read, and mobilizing volunteers demands real time and effort. Yet we're doing it: speakers are being confirmed, agendas finalized, and exciting events planned for our June 6th Convention. This will be a powerful gathering of unified, energized Nebraska Republicans ready to take the fight forward. Mediation is another daily reality. Passionate people sometimes clash--over parliamentary questions, constitutional interpretations, or bruised feelings. As State Chair, I step in as mediator because strong convictions are a feature of our party, not a bug. Disappointment and frustration come with the territory when you fight for big things. But we channel that energy into productive action. At the end of every long day, what sustains me is simple: core beliefs and enduring values. The belief in limited government, individual liberty, strong families, free enterprise, and a Nebraska where opportunity is real and freedom is protected. No matter how tiring the work becomes, I rise each morning focused on a bigger vision--a unified Nebraska Republican Party that stands shoulder to shoulder, working together for what is good, right, and noble. We are not just electing candidates. We are defending a way of life. We are fighting for the Nebraska we love and the America we know can be great again. Thank you for standing with us. Let's keep moving forward--together. Onward to Victory, For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | A Message From Senator Pete Ricketts... President Trump and I have been fighting for you in Washington. And that is what's at stake this fall. We are delivering real results: the largest tax cut in American history, illegal border crossings at a 50-year low, and an America that leads with strength again. We promised. We delivered. But there is still work to do to fix four years of Joe Biden. That work gets a lot harder if Dan Osborn wins. In 2024, Democrats spent $38 million in Nebraska to make Dan Osborn look like a moderate Independent. They were lying. He would have voted against No Tax on Tips, No Tax on Overtime, and No Tax on Social Security. Fox News reported he's funneled almost $500k to himself and his own family. He is a grifter funneling money to himself using shady out of state companies to evade Nebraska disclosure laws. And just last week it was reported that his main campaign consultant is a proud Democratic Socialist, and his other consultant advises Zohran Mamdani. Dan Osborn isn't a Nebraska Independent. He is a Democrat in disguise, and the people running his campaign are proud of it. That's why I need your help. Democrats will pour millions into Nebraska again this cycle. They know our Senate seat decides whether or not they have the votes to impeach President Trump. That's why I need your help. Spread the word about Dan Osborn. Volunteer, knock doors, and visit PeteRicketts.com for a yard sign or to join our team. Grassroots Nebraskans will always beat Democrat money, but only if we show up. I am honored to serve this state, and with your help, we will keep delivering. | | | | == | | == | | | District Updates | | == | == | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. | I’ve spent my career standing up to corruption, even when it’s politically risky. I’ve prosecuted cases...

_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2174%2E259176%2EeqNfle) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2174%2E259176%2EeqNfle)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10878?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Schiff-Deadline_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2174%2E259176%2EeqNfle) Peter, this is Adam Schiff. I’ve spent my career standing up to corruption, even when it’s politically risky. I’ve prosecuted cases. I’ve led investigations and spoken hard truths when it mattered most. Like when I led Trump’s first impeachment. Or served on the January 6th Committee. And I have to be honest — this is one of the most challenging times of my entire career. Donald Trump is threatening our constitutional right to freedom of speech, undermining the rule of law, and chipping away at Americans’ trust in our institutions. Attacks are mounting against anyone who speaks out against this administration — whether you’re a current or former elected official, a journalist, a comedian or an ordinary citizen. And with Republicans in control of both the House and Senate, there are simply not enough checks and balances to stop the rampant corruption and lawlessness. So like I said, this is a very scary time — but not a time to back down. The GOP wants to overwhelm us and keep us from acting. But when we come together, we’re not powerless. We can organize, mobilize, and reclaim our country. [**If you’re with me, make a contribution to my campaign and Blue Amp Action before our midnight fundraising deadline hits. Together we can hit our fundraising goal, flip the Senate, and end this madness.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10878?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Schiff-Deadline_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2174%2E259176%2EeqNfle) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10879?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Schiff-Deadline_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2174%2E259176%2EeqNfle)

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260502-2217-foote&t=1001&akid=2217%2E342411%2EyI9fw_ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, our
movement doesn’t exist without you.

At the Squad Victory Fund, everything we do is powered by supporters like
you — people who believe in bold progressive change and justice on all
fronts: social, racial, economic, and more. You’re the reason we’ve been
able to fight for progressive change, and your voice is what guides us
forward.

Right now, we want to hear from you. Our May Priorities Survey is your
chance to help decide the fights we take on next.

Every response shapes the direction of our movement and ensures that our
work reflects the priorities of the people who make it possible — our
grassroots community — not corporate interests.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-may-202605/?source=em20260502-2217&t=1002&akid=2217%2E342411%2EyI9fw_ ]Will you take our May priorities survey and help drive our movement
forward? It only takes a few minutes, but your input will have a lasting
impact.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-may-202605/?source=em20260502-2217&t=1003&akid=2217%2E342411%2EyI9fw_ ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Your voice matters. Your vision matters. Together, we can continue to
fight for justice and push bold, progressive change forward.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2217%2E342411%2EyI9fw_

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

You’re the reason we’ve been able to fight for progressive change, and your voice is what guides us forward. Right now, we want to hear from you. Our May Priorities Survey is your chance to help decide the fights we take on next. Every response shapes the direction of our movement and ensures that our work reflects the priorities of the people who make it possible — our grassroots community — not corporate interests. [ ]Will you take our May priorities survey and help drive our movement forward? It only takes a few minutes, but your input will have a lasting impact. [ ]TAKE THE SURVEY Your voice matters. Your vision matters. Together, we can continue to fight for justice and push bold, progressive change forward. In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Phil Weiser only fights when it counts for him. Not Colorado.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130617488/618355830/-2054079050?refcode=jtk1395-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQ4ODA0YS0zODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSNZMC_cIf9mie3soa4mLwp5pb-RjSuWxQW2iCyqnk=)
---
Friend, Donald Trump is the worst president in American history.
And we have to fight him with everything we have. I’ve done that. I’ll keep doing that.
**_But here’s the truth: fighting Trump alone is not enough to solve Colorado’s biggest problems._**
People can’t afford to live in our state right now. Families and small businesses are being pushed out. Our budget is in crisis. Health care, housing, child care, and energy costs are squeezing Coloradans every single day.
This moment demands more than lawsuits. It demands new ideas, tough decisions, and real results for Colorado’s future.
And with less than two months until the primary, I want to be clear about what this race is really about: who can actually lead Colorado through these hard times.
**My opponent, Phil Weiser and his campaign have spent a lot of time attacking me. That’s politics. But if he wants to make this race about records, then Coloradans deserve the full picture.**
**→ Phil Weiser only fights when it counts for him, not Colorado.** Before he was running for governor, he joined less than a third of the multistate lawsuits against Trump. Now that he’s a candidate, that number has jumped to over 80%. That’s not courage. That’s calculation.
**→ I’ve done the hard things and I’m ready to do them for Colorado.** I’ve made tough decisions, balanced budgets, led through crises, and made the hard decisions when it mattered. That’s the leadership Colorado needs to take on the affordability crisis and move our state forward.
**Friend, this race is about who can actually do the job best for Colorado.** I’m running because I believe I am that choice for Colorado.
Colorado needs a governor who isn’t afraid of making hard decisions, takes responsibility, and delivers real results for people — not just someone who's looking for political points.
[**Colorado is at a crossroads. Will you stand with me today and make a contribution to help us win this race for governor and build a state that works for everyone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130617489/618355831/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1395-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQ4ODA0YS0zODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPSNZMC_cIf9mie3soa4mLwp5pb-RjSuWxQW2iCyqnk=)

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsFlYb8tSgv_iNH9eUO8IibbLOfX6PT-3gGyMq8W09rTWGkhpOgx1v3_y0wksFDKhC57umKjg75i7zm7NBFpOE9lWw97IYC8yPYy0Kk-UeyQi8kYtPLtV6LYtIE7v0wNmC8wObR3HXvgXjduh1hxJir8ZB1lLIV3flv283L6MXuy79CAZzDqjDwkaTCnX2JCjkujsSvKsDaxLmTfUTBLxLLKHitUpnYqr-8_4NgZtQUWPs2tkVKPTWQ6GK5HivJ6beQzv_rC3JwD2beSWbEQ7ACDvy2GazyjDj2_w7MfIfdUA/4qa/yw915bj9QNGhHePZbs96wQ/h0/h001.UggoVxDC5fHOdkH6zA6OCFBWLeL1Wg9DyeOjVO5S-Ko)Friend — I want to tell you why I’m running, not as a politician, but as a person. I came to this country from Peru as a single mom with just $300 in my pocket. I worked three jobs to keep a roof over our heads and build a better life for my daughter. That experience never left me. **It’s why I became a social worker. It’s why I ran for office. And it’s why I’ve fought to raise wages, expand workers’ rights, protect reproductive freedom, and make sure people are treated with dignity.** Now I’m running for Congress because too many leaders in Washington don’t know what it’s like to live like this. And I believe working people deserve someone who will actually fight for them. **[Can you chip in whatever you can today to help me take this fight to Congress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsFlYb8tSgv_iNH9eUO8IibbLOfX6PT-3gGyMq8W09rTfTVdCpsioUL_iS_P244ONuq183eCQUFgG-E12F1IDQNStPcWljzFEwPMYkF8KmhAuPSvx85DtrPIpOmSmamZcpyiRQv-Y8UCbliGDVsSuch-TDeDAtMOM76Qq4iSkuFQ6rDYP94brmiO1y3z6SlTwM6RsyY5PKWQ_qK0VXIoWb2YnZpyAYyI6Qt7Wbs0-dKPGDMOK3GsvABfxhAIcJCRqxXDMPlVSOEQBkxlKY5VBrKZ89wcH8RlN_GV3TX50xmmg/4qa/yw915bj9QNGhHePZbs96wQ/h1/h001.TWf9uIll7tVxIIzQcR5Ua5410xWyCf-yO5JnJao9D8E)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | — I want to tell you why I’m running, not as a politician, but as a person. I came to this country from Peru as a single mom with just $300 in my pocket. I worked three jobs to keep a roof over our heads and build a better life for my daughter. That experience never left me. It’s why I became a social worker. It’s why I ran for office. And it’s why I’ve fought to raise wages, expand workers’ rights, protect reproductive freedom, and make sure people are treated with dignity. Now I’m running for Congress because too many leaders in Washington don’t know what it’s like to live like this. And I believe working people deserve someone who will actually fight for them. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. I’m sick and tired of Democrats who don’t fight for the people who need help the most. I’ve spent my life fighting for families like mine. With your help, I’ll keep fighting, and I won’t back down. In solidarity, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Guzman for Congress PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Guzman for Congress. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: EMILYs List
subject: A birthday ask that actually matters
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130618237/618358218/1538032825?refcode=WUEFHQ7_20260502_JohnsonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058630&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODI3YjZlMy0zNzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pj7NUUXNYF2bHsjR7ziqDlRWDOxyYHRDHpHLZ8FoL6g=) Hi Peter,

Some birthdays you celebrate. Some you put to work.

Our friend, Congresswoman Julie Johnson, turns 60 today — and it comes in the middle of one of the closest Democratic runoffs in the country.

More than $100 million in TV ads and two statewide runs were supposed to make this a formality for her opponent. It didn’t.

**Julie’s challenger left Washington, endorsed her for his seat, then jumped back in after two failed U.S. Senate bids. He parachuted back in with near-universal name recognition and still couldn’t close this out. Julie forced a runoff because when voters had a real choice, many chose consistency.**

That doesn’t happen by accident. It happens because Julie has built real trust — she’s principled, she follows through, and people know they can count on her when it matters. That kind of leadership isn’t interchangeable.

**Julie is the only Democratic woman representing North Texas and the only openly LGBTQ+ member of Congress from the South. She’s taken that responsibility seriously — showing up, following through, and delivering when it counts. In a race this close, that matters. She earned her seat in Congress. She is not a placeholder for someone who walked back in expecting it to be easy.**

This race will be decided in early voting. The base voters are clear, the margin is narrow, and the window to reach them is short.

So we’re putting today to work.

**If you’re able, split a $60 donation between EMILYs List and Julie's campaign for her 60th birthday, or step in at a level that reflects what’s on the line:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-johnson-split](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130618238/618358220/1538032825?refcode=WUEFHQ7_20260502_JohnsonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058630&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODI3YjZlMy0zNzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pj7NUUXNYF2bHsjR7ziqDlRWDOxyYHRDHpHLZ8FoL6g=)**

What comes in now goes directly into the final push to reach the voters who will decide this race. **To reach them in time, it has to come in before early voting begins — and we don’t have days to spare.**

Let’s finish this the right way.

Thank you,

EMILYs List

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Trump’s Supreme Court is dragging us back to the dark and ugly days of Jim Crow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
It’s time to raise our voices more than ever, louder than ever.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130619692/618360158/728217554?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5640-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAxMTA2Ny0zYTQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mp4w2_Q2RcP63XvpOrS2ULfsqAvt613kRwx2-jSSz-M=&emci=c7d34b08-c344-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=f9011067-3a46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1586379)
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw what I said on _CNN_ and _MSNOW_ : We just witnessed a devastating blow to American democracy.
Donald Trump’s Supreme Court has gutted the Voting Rights Act. The protections that Dr. King marched for. The protections made possible by civil rights protestors who spilled blood in pursuit of a more perfect union.
**They are dragging us back to the dark and ugly days of Jim Crow. **
Trump and his allies are doing everything in their power to squeeze the voices of the people out of our democracy – raiding election centers here in Georgia, threatening to deploy ICE to polling places, and attacking your ability to vote by mail.
These are the folks who have taken your money through Trump’s tariffs. These are the folks who have taken your doctors and your healthcare. And now they’re trying to take your voice – all so that you won’t be able to hold them accountable at the ballot box.
**In the wake of this massive assault on our democracy, we cannot remain silent. The answer to those who are trying to take your voice is to raise your voice louder than ever before. We need to send a clear message that our democracy does not belong to politicians who are trying to pick their voters. It belongs to the people.**

# [My statement on Gov. Lee calling a special session to redraw Tennessee's congressional districts at the behest of Donald Trump and Marsha Blackburn](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5963603&post_id=196223305&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MjIzMzA1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc3MzUzOTYsImV4cCI6MTc4MDMyNzM5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTU5NjM2MDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mA5lSz2slz3EsrT8yx-BxnvPdv2Bgga1AO5OUEhB1Fw)
### Being deeply unpopular and afraid to lose will lead folks with no integrity to cheat. We have the people power to stop them!
| | [Michaela for Tennessee](https://substack.com/@michaelafortennessee)
---
| May 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@michaelafortennessee)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5963603&post_id=196223305&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MjIzMzA1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzczNTM5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzgwMzI3Mzk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTk2MzYwMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ALr8nmieNGPJaX0RRh4B_bLofBSMEdr1cJzPmk0pq2Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWljaGFlbGFmb3J0ZW5uZXNzZWUvcC9teS1zdGF0ZW1lbnQtb24tZ292LWxlZS1jYWxsaW5nLWE_._F3bX38wXab3ank2m065mJyr7XocAi2vboTjUKWQEmc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/michaelafortennessee/p/my-statement-on-gov-lee-calling-a?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

While Tennessee Democrats are talking to voters, fighting for workers, striving to lower costs and raise wages, and fix our broken healthcare system, **Governor Lee has called a special session at the request of Donald Trump and Marsha Blackburn - not Tennessee voters - to redraw our congressional maps just six months before the election.**
This administration knows that they are unpopular. Donald Trump promised lower prices, no more forever wars, and to drain the swamp of corruption. What he and his enablers in Congress have given us is another costly war in the Middle East, prices that go up every single day, and the most corrupt administration in history.
But rather than change their policies, they are trying to rig the game - and Governor Lee is happy to help.**I urge our Republican lawmakers in the Tennessee Assembly to demonstrate courage in the face of pressure and reject this blatant, chaotic power grab.**
Tennesseans are no strangers to our state assembly carving up our communities to disenfranchise us and weaken the power of our vote. Republican lawmakers used their supermajority in 2012 to redraw the state maps to entrench their power. They split Nashville in 2022 and erased a Democratic seat. Now they are coming for Memphis, targeting Tennessee's only majority-Black district to silence Black voters before they can be heard at the polls.
They can redraw the maps to try to weaken our voice - but we will keep showing up. If they spread us out across even more districts, thereby weakening their own margins, Tennessee voters _regardless of party_ will make them regret this choice at the ballot box on November 3rd.
**On Tuesday, I will be driving to Nashville to protest this special session and redrawing of the maps.** I urge my neighbors in East Tennessee who are able to do the same.
**What you can do now to fight this:**
* Find your TN Representative using the[ Find My Legislator](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8f5634a7-254c-4ff8-afc4-e642bf2e809c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) tool.
* Call and email until your voice is heard! Tell them you oppose redrawing our state's Congressional maps, and condemn this act of chaotic distraction during an election year.
* Flood your Representatives' social media accounts with comments and DMs expressing your opposition to this redistricting effort.
* Share this information and call to action with your community - on social media and in personal calls, texts, and emails - and encourage them to do the same.
* **Don 't forget to VOTE in the City + County Primary on May 5!**

To voters in TN-02: if the lines get redrawn and you are no longer in my district, I want you to know that I am still fighting for you and we are still in this together, regardless of what any map says.
Voters are supposed to choose their representatives, not the other way around. The cavalry isn't coming from somewhere else to fix this -_we are_. **I 'll fight tirelessly to end partisan gerrymandering when I'm in Congress, and I will fight tirelessly against it now.**
Paid for by Michaela for Tennessee
Michaela for Tennessee
P.O. Box 9116
Knoxville, TN 37920
United States

name: Tim Walz
subject: Showing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Small Town PAC, [smalltownpac
body:
If we want to win in more places, we’ve got to be willing to show up in more places.
#
Peter, Tim Walz here.
Small Town PAC launched to put power back into the hands of our neighbors and help Democrats expand the map.
This weekend, I’m in Portland, Maine to headline the Maine Democratic Party dinner and help kick off their convention on Sunday morning — because if Democrats want to win in more places, we’ve got to be willing to show up in more places.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=stp-ms-em-20260502.5K6Z2x&amount=5&refcode=em20260502-575&t=1&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)
Maine has one of the top U.S. Senate races in the country this year, and replacing Susan Collins is going to take exactly the kind of work too many people in politics are too quick to skip past: showing up early, standing with Democrats on the front lines, and making our case in communities that matter.
_**That’s what Small Town PAC is here to do.**_
We’re here to help build power in more communities, support the fights that matter, and make sure Democrats are competing with a message that actually connects with people’s lives.
[**If you’re able, will you chip in today to help us keep building Small Town PAC so we can keep showing up in the communities that will decide the future of this country and support Democrats doing the hard work on the ground?**](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=stp-ms-em-20260502.5K6Z2x&amount=5&refcode=em20260502-575&t=2&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=stp-ms-em-20260502.5K6Z2x&amount=5&refcode=20260502-575&t=21&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)**
I’m grateful,
— Tim Walz

Tim Walz started Small Town PAC to build a Democratic Party that invests in small towns and delivers a message that resonates with rural America.
Together, we're finding and recruiting thoughtful, hardworking people to run for office, and supporting a new generation of leaders who truly reflect and understand their communities.
**[It’s time for Democrats to expand the map and put small towns back at the forefront: pitch in now to help build our movement from the ground up.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stp-ms-em-footer?refcode=em20260502-575&t=22&refcode2=575_34582_jXHM4N&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stp-ms-em-footer?refcode=em20260502-575-&t=23&refcode2=575_34582_jXHM4N&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.timwalz.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_stp/?t=24&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.timwalz.com/signup/update-your-information/?t=25&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.timwalz.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_stp/?t=26&akid=575%2E34582%2EjXHM4N)

Paid for by Small Town PAC, [smalltownpac.com](http://smalltownpac.com). Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

Just last week, Seth held a town hall on the Cape, and the room was completely packed. People came with real questions about housing, healthcare, and what's happening with this administration, and Seth stayed until he answered every single one of them.

clean_body: And so much more. | | Hi there, A quick update from the campaign trail | = | = ---|--- Just last week, Seth held a town hall on the Cape, and the room was completely packed. People came with real questions about housing, healthcare, and what's happening with this administration, and Seth stayed until he answered every single one of them. Fun fact: Seth has averaged roughly one Listening Tour event every 5 days since joining the campaign. Our opponent’s average is one every 63 days. = For the second quarter in a row (both quarters of this race), Seth outraised our incumbent opponent. People from every county in the Commonwealth and every state in the country are putting their money behind this campaign because they believe in it. = Seth made national news by banning his own staff from using prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi, and he's pushing legislation to ban betting on wars, elections, government actions, and human casualties. And when Trump posted unhinged threats on social media while troops were in harm's way, Seth called the president unfit, demanded Congress come back into session, and called for impeachment proceedings. On Iran, he's been clear from day one: this war was built on Trump's own mess, and he doesn't get a victory lap for trying to clean it up. That all happened just last month. More coming in May! — Team Moulton = P.S. Want to see what May looks like in real time? **Subscribe to defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today](https://substack.com/redirect/e6e5582b-8fc8-46d1-b585-f52a6cbd9ccb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
[Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/e6e5582b-8fc8-46d1-b585-f52a6cbd9ccb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Few things are "unprecedented" which is a favorite adjective of politicians in an attempt to add gravitas to the routine and mundane. "Wall Street launched an unprecedented lobbying attack to...(blah blah blah," **[shrieked](https://substack.com/redirect/7bbe3f28-d0e0-49a2-b354-219807923dab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Senator Elizabeth Warren recently at a Banking Committee hearing.
Ah, yes, the unprecedented, the never-before seen, the unicorn, of... Wall Street lobbying.
Most of our life has a precedent. Much of the news cycle is a rinse and repeat, but one event this year is: an American Pope.
And Pope Leo the American, needs to figure it out.
How does a man from the most powerful nation on earth _sine qua non_ transcend it to become Pope for the entire world? The Church is accustomed to Italians, though there has not been an Italian pope in nearly half a century. Saint Pope John Paul II was Polish. Fun. Pope Benedict was Bavarian. Great. Pope Francis was Argentinian. Yikes. Pope Leo... American? The guys who run the world? The guys who own the world? That has some heft. That carries deep cultural and geopolitical connotations. An American Pope is... unprecedented.
It would have been easier for the world if he were Canadian, the turkey on white bread with mayo of the sandwich world. Totally fine... safe. Good. Predictable. Uneventful.
The world does not need an eventful Pope. Leo seems to be soft spoken, pensive, kind, and reserved. Those are wonderful, qualities. Now, may he learn to be... quiet.
Holy Father, with all due respect from a life-long (though struggling and alienated) Catholic, stay in your lane. Your ongoing feud with the American President is not helpful.

## Finally coverage of Trump's White House by reporters who don't hate America!
**Subscribe for:**
* Real News
* America First Policy
* Bold Opinion Editorials
* Must-see Video

We are taking back this media landscape one day at a time. Support independent media, **[subscribe to The American Mandate!](https://substack.com/redirect/d5cdcfa5-3518-40aa-906e-e4506cf0d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [The American Mandate](https://substack.com/redirect/4a83b51d-3e8c-49dd-9d1d-7f1eec4ecaa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[Making America Great Again one post at a time](https://substack.com/redirect/4a83b51d-3e8c-49dd-9d1d-7f1eec4ecaa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---|---
* * *
* * *
The Pope cannot opine on every world issue. No one can. The world is too big, and the issues are too vast. There are 130 ongoing conflicts across the globe right now. Ukraine, for a while, seemed to get all the attention, but the Gaza / Palestine people never seem to shut up. But here's one where an estimated 10,000 people have been massacred, and another 600,000 displaced: the civil war in Mali.
This is probably the first you have even heard of it. The Pope has yet to comment, and he was just in Africa for 11 days.
And because of this, because of the vastness of the world and the ubiquity of evil, the Pope needs to be careful about his wartime opinions.
The Church was relatively quiet when Iran slaughtered 30,000 people in January of this year. The Church was relatively quiet the last few years as Iran fomented terrorism via Hezbollah, Hamas, and the Houthis, and for the sake of argument, I will give Leo the same pass as Mali: too much going on, not enough hours in the day, to opine on everything.
He cannot take the bait and opine now because this one is "bigger". It's all big. Every life is sacred. Every injustice is wrong. Every evil must be battled. The Pope cannot pick and choose which wars to oppose less people assume those passed over matter less. They all matter.
It was reported that Obama's political advisor David Axelrod and an "entourage" had an audience with the Pope the day before his criticisms of President Trump began. That was a bad move. A very bad one. And whomever on his staff allowed that meeting to go through should be fired. Their job is to protect the Pope from these types of meeting, from the semblance of impropriety, from worldly agenda, and they failed him.
Popes are not allowed such mistakes.
The Pope made himself a political figure by meeting with political operatives and making political statements. When he told Americans to "contact your congressman" he gave a [political call](https://substack.com/redirect/991f235c-8412-431d-97d9-7cbf7a82ddda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to action. When he said Trump's actions in Iran "violates international law" he offered an appeal to political hierarchy. And, the bad optics part, no such comments were made about the other 130 ongoing conflicts. Which means the Pope is picking and choosing, making a political calculation.
This is not good. For the love of God, Pope, you are the Pope, now. Time to speak like it.
"Trump started it". Eh, Trump starts a lot of things, and he finishes them. We know who Trump is, it's gotten him elected three times (**see what I did there?**) and Trump's trumpism has made him the most popular (and most hated) political figure in modern history. And Trump, though not always in his life, but certainly now, IS a politician. He is the president. Political calculations are his job. Words are his currency.
Do we want the American president to say "Yes, Pope" and apologize? No. In just the same way the papacy is weakened when the Pope acts political, the presidency would be weakened would the president act deferential.
* * *
* * *
**Subscribe to defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/e6e5582b-8fc8-46d1-b585-f52a6cbd9ccb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/e6e5582b-8fc8-46d1-b585-f52a6cbd9ccb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
So, what is a Pope to do?
Elevate. Elevate the matter to God, where it belongs. Elevate the matter to His justice and mercy, to original sin as the root of all evil. Elevate the matter to a call for peace rooted in truth, not a call to a Congressman to register opposition.
Suffer. Suffer the silence of your inability to act like an American and spout off your opinions. Suffer for the souls lost in war and death. Suffer for the injustices of man against man, where despite 2000 years of Emmanuel - God with us - the world seems incapable of acting Godlike.
Pray. Lead prayers and calls for prayer. Ask school children to pray The Angelus at noon, like I did in school as a child. Ask Churches to pray every Sunday for peace. Give an example of prayer by praying publicly and perpetually.
And be quiet. You do not know the details of this war, and I'm guessing the Vatican's central intelligence is just three rotund nuns guarding a pasta recipe. Accept that there are things, ungodly things, that you do not want to know, and so you you elevate, you suffer, you pray, and remain silent.
That is what we need from every Pope, not just the first - unprecedented - American one.
Final note, Holy Father, as I'm sure you're reading this (heck, I get nearly a million readers, it's not impossible): a strong America is good for the world. A strong Church is good for the world. Maybe God has called you in this time, this very specific time, because that is your mission: to be the American Pope, the Pope of strength, of might, of power, of freedom, of righteousness. Maybe God has called you, in this time, this very specific time, to Make Catholicism Great Again, to make the Church strong again, to make Christ reign again.
Maybe the reason why the Church has not conquered the world, maybe the reason why Pax Americana has not brought order to the world, is that we have never had the two most powerful people on earth, the Pope and the President, be American.
You do now. An American Pope and an American president with millions of American Catholics and Christians eager to build the kingdom of Christ.
Now, that, Holy Father... would be unprecedented.
**Honor and courage.**

Maybe God has called you in this time, this very specific time, because that is your mission | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A strong America is good for the world. A strong Church is good for the world. Maybe God has called you in this time, this very specific time, because that is your mission | | | May 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Subscribe to defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism. . Few things are "unprecedented" which is a favorite adjective of politicians in an attempt to add gravitas to the routine and mundane. "Wall Street launched an unprecedented lobbying attack to...(blah blah blah," Senator Elizabeth Warren recently at a Banking Committee hearing. Ah, yes, the unprecedented, the never-before seen, the unicorn, of... Wall Street lobbying. Most of our life has a precedent. Much of the news cycle is a rinse and repeat, but one event this year is: an American Pope. And Pope Leo the American, needs to figure it out. How does a man from the most powerful nation on earth sine qua non transcend it to become Pope for the entire world? The Church is accustomed to Italians, though there has not been an Italian pope in nearly half a century. Saint Pope John Paul II was Polish. Fun. Pope Benedict was Bavarian. Great. Pope Francis was Argentinian. Yikes. Pope Leo... American? The guys who run the world? The guys who own the world? That has some heft. That carries deep cultural and geopolitical connotations. An American Pope is... unprecedented. It would have been easier for the world if he were Canadian, the turkey on white bread with mayo of the sandwich world. Totally fine... safe. Good. Predictable. Uneventful. The world does not need an eventful Pope. Leo seems to be soft spoken, pensive, kind, and reserved. Those are wonderful, qualities. Now, may he learn to be... quiet. Holy Father, with all due respect from a life-long (though struggling and alienated) Catholic, stay in your lane. Your ongoing feud with the American President is not helpful. | | ---|---|--- Finally coverage of Trump's White House by reporters who don't hate America! Subscribe for: Real News America First Policy Bold Opinion Editorials Must-see Video We are taking back this media landscape one day at a time. Support independent media, | ---|--- The Pope cannot opine on every world issue. No one can. The world is too big, and the issues are too vast. There are 130 ongoing conflicts across the globe right now. Ukraine, for a while, seemed to get all the attention, but the Gaza / Palestine people never seem to shut up. But here's one where an estimated 10,000 people have been massacred, and another 600,000 displaced: the civil war in Mali. This is probably the first you have even heard of it. The Pope has yet to comment, and he was just in Africa for 11 days. And because of this, because of the vastness of the world and the ubiquity of evil, the Pope needs to be careful about his wartime opinions. The Church was relatively quiet when Iran slaughtered 30,000 people in January of this year. The Church was relatively quiet the last few years as Iran fomented terrorism via Hezbollah, Hamas, and the Houthis, and for the sake of argument, I will give Leo the same pass as Mali: too much going on, not enough hours in the day, to opine on everything. He cannot take the bait and opine now because this one is "bigger". It's all big. Every life is sacred. Every injustice is wrong. Every evil must be battled. The Pope cannot pick and choose which wars to oppose less people assume those passed over matter less. They all matter. It was reported that Obama's political advisor David Axelrod and an "entourage" had an audience with the Pope the day before his criticisms of President Trump began. That was a bad move. A very bad one. And whomever on his staff allowed that meeting to go through should be fired. Their job is to protect the Pope from these types of meeting, from the semblance of impropriety, from worldly agenda, and they failed him. Popes are not allowed such mistakes. The Pope made himself a political figure by meeting with political operatives and making political statements. When he told Americans to "contact your congressman" he gave a to action. When he said Trump's actions in Iran "violates international law" he offered an appeal to political hierarchy. And, the bad optics part, no such comments were made about the other 130 ongoing conflicts. Which means the Pope is picking and choosing, making a political calculation. This is not good. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, and right now, we are still dangerously short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Having the support of people like you means the world to me. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired) United States Navy ** Paid for by Eileen for Colorado Eileen for Colorado 9249 S Broadway #200-172 Highlands Ranch, CO 80129 United States Contributions or gifts to Eileen for Colorado are not tax deductible.

We kicked off in Northern Virginia with a great event in McLean then headed on to Fredericksburg, Richmond, Norfolk, Danville, Lynchburg, Charlottesville, Harrisonburg, finishing up in Loudoun County. I was honored to be joined by my friend Tim Kaine, members of our Congressional delegation, several other statewide and local elected Democrats, and thousands of Virginians who are fired up about this year’s midterm elections.

**We saw tremendous enthusiasm everywhere we went – and across all of these events, I heard the same things from Virginians:**

Folks are fed up with this irrational and irresponsible president. They’re exhausted by the chaos this administration is spreading here at home and across the world – particularly this president’s war of choice in the Middle East. And they’re ready to elect Democrats who will put some guardrails on this administration, bring down everyday costs, and demand transparency and accountability in Washington.

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: NATIONAL CALL MONDAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court just gutted voting rights. Now what? | |
---
Peter, Last week, the Supreme Court made its long-awaited ruling in _Louisiana v. Callais_. **With a stroke of the pen, the MAGA justices gutted voting rights and set racial gerrymandering loose on America.** Time and time again, the captured Supreme Court has chipped away at our rights, rigged our system, and stolen power from the people. They expect us to sit down and take their all-out attack on our democracy. **But we’re not staying silent. We’re organizing. This Monday, May 4th, United for Democracy is convening hundreds of allies for a national rapid response organizing call.** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-z9DmtkY7tBDptqTYp0BTm3BbstoK85PgTgTRU4JpN702Qmq9M7Feo1nVWkawra8qGoDndbGpnJwqE3fJTIclHgva3jdGjNAXTmpoTKTZnn1MGgIJSkBfsuD3pmXhd8hiPae6XG3GBxeQ98N9EJ7oMvBRdOdhPV1E0As_Sb9K0lTaueTbwHs-N882oa90Mt90QrAYAVkyARJ85VL_0ew7UdDesfJ82c1uigRr3RLCprOtpxwNyr8s9DsgSjJk-aausvVdWL4LBE7D35BqbAAuL/4qa/0ebBM_a9TsaJFNcXd1GelQ/h0/h001.MS8coAMLIRBxzyjAly_4OYOimpj459VI51YcESYq-Mc) [**Join us at 8:00 pm ET on Monday to get in the fight to take our power back! You’ll join activists, experts, and organizers across the country to make a real plan and take real action.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-z9DmtkY7tBDptqTYp0BTm3BbstoK85PgTgTRU4JpN702Qmq9M7Feo1nVWkawra8qGoDndbGpnJwqE3fJTIclHXOcT-FrpL4CfczFkam_3H_lg0bMcpzao1XBx6YRchxULO-X1MegKRtL6gPvLz3yWxhVoAca3mfbUT9qFJJIpq8E5QxU31wP7myH3MzK7EJYKhsJ6OZLEy3MH8fQNRZ7N6v1Z0W0g6i2gJEaiTqNUiJBLQIIqVDp7Q_hFD9V0KR1PWbCohhKjTNDYepNhlQGG/4qa/0ebBM_a9TsaJFNcXd1GelQ/h1/h001._SGN-56yJpNmrapbloCYgvtFeia0HwAZvM-Xe0t3mjE) [JOIN US](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-z9DmtkY7tBDptqTYp0BTm3BbstoK85PgTgTRU4JpN702Qmq9M7Feo1nVWkawra8qGoDndbGpnJwqE3fJTIclHRLIVcz7jHsHG5nD_MgcQPV6Im4fzJMmKVHdVSUI4PHIVCjE_yq0b2JziYsZ9ddYiCVpnexbHT5OKpRvKh5_c3izLE1UosGG2NIva0tpiD9iforOokXC3UEBWUWniPKDKpBiuFGY66OW8bcrVTC8seaYALyy0HzyDKqqEyMIVW14CSnOaqEHrmJmJpLMBMSF4/4qa/0ebBM_a9TsaJFNcXd1GelQ/h2/h001.wcfoyU3IxWf516trp0M-0rIqhyjFUKTIllqi9nyt5AE) [**Can’t make the call Monday? clean_body: The Supreme Court just gutted voting rights. Now what? | | Peter, Last week, the Supreme Court made its long-awaited ruling in Louisiana v. Callais. With a stroke of the pen, the MAGA justices gutted voting rights and set racial gerrymandering loose on America. Time and time again, the captured Supreme Court has chipped away at our rights, rigged our system, and stolen power from the people. They expect us to sit down and take their all-out attack on our democracy. But we’re not staying silent. We’re organizing. This Monday, May 4th, United for Democracy is convening hundreds of allies for a national rapid response organizing call. United for Democracy has been preparing for this ruling for a long time. Experts warned us that this case could represent not only the final gutting of the Voting Rights Act, but the ultimate rigging of our elections. That’s why we jumped into action educating the public, speaking to the press, making rapid-response viral videos, and organizing all the allies we’ve been working with in the lead-up to this moment. But we can’t do this alone. We need people power and momentum strong enough to** force those in power to build an economic, political, and justice system that represents the people—not the wealthy, not the powerful, and not the wannabe dictator. We need all of us to join the fight.** Thank you for standing up for voting rights, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Justin Story
subject: Spirit Employees Kept Their Spirits High Until the Final Door Closed: Democrats Blocked Free Market Merger, Costing 14,000 Jobs
body:
Spirit Airlines shut down operations last night at 3 a.m., ending its run as the ultra-low-cost carrier that made flying affordable

| | | | | [|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/GylliH5UTIG?e=90ad5fc3c5&c2id=d60c3f7cebee07fc4dcb3011da999329)
| | | | | |
**PRESS RELEASE**

**Spirit Employees Kept Their Spirits High Until the Final Door Closed: Democrats Blocked Free Market Merger, Costing 14,000 Jobs and Hurting Florida Families and Tourism**
---
|
---
| | May 2, 2026Contact: [Justin@VoteJustinStory.com](mailto:justin@votejustinstory.com?subject=&body=)
---
| | **ST. CLOUD, FL** — Spirit Airlines shut down operations last night at 3 a.m., ending its run as the ultra-low-cost carrier that made flying affordable for everyday Americans.Until the final passenger stepped off the plane, Spirit’s dedicated employees performed with unmatched professionalism. Pilots, flight attendants, agents, mechanics, ramp workers, and every team member cared for customers with dignity and excellence in those final minutes. They showed up and delivered despite the uncertainty created in Washington, true professionals who deserved better.
This bankruptcy is the direct result of Democrats in Washington stopping a free market solution. The Biden administration’s Department of Justice blocked Spirit’s proposed merger with JetBlue in 2024, a deal that would have protected approximately 14,000 American jobs and preserved affordable flights for families nationwide. Now those jobs are gone, service has ended, and Florida’s tourism economy faces another setback. Spirit’s crew base at Orlando International Airport (MCO) meant the loss of hundreds of good Central Florida jobs for pilots, flight attendants, mechanics, and agents, on top of the more than 6 million passengers Spirit brought through MCO each year. Families planning vacations, Orlando visitors, and local businesses relying on strong traveler traffic will now see higher fares and fewer options.
“As a retired Marine fighter pilot and commercial airline pilot myself, I’ve lived and watched government interference limit choices in this industry,” said Justin Story, Republican candidate for Florida’s 9th Congressional District. “Our union brothers and sisters remained consummate professionals until the last bag wheeled off the jet bridge and the doors closed on another chapter in commercial aviation. Experts warned back in 2024 that blocking the JetBlue merger would weaken Spirit and lead to exactly this outcome, lost jobs, higher fares, and less competition. But Biden and his allies, including my opponent Darren Soto, ignored those warnings and stopped the free market merger that would have protected 14,000 jobs and kept fares low for Florida families. Their decision hurt our tourism-driven economy and left working people with fewer choices. In Congress, I will fight to reduce regulatory barriers and support policies that put American workers and travelers first.”
Darren Soto and the Democrats own this outcome. Their decision to block a private business merger has real consequences for the middle class they claim to support.
Florida families and businesses need leadership that respects free market principles and protects jobs. It’s time to get government out of our economy and stop politicians from picking winners and losers in business.
To learn more about Justin Story, visit [https://votejustinstory.com](https://us.list-manage.com/u4D3vjJXJKP?e=90ad5fc3c5&c2id=d60c3f7cebee07fc4dcb3011da999329 "https://votejustinstory.com")
###
---

Four years ago today, the draft opinion of the _Dobbs_ decision was leaked to the public, and we found out the Supreme Court was going to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. Weeks later, they did just that — setting off a chain of events where millions of Americans were stripped of personal choice and reproductive healthcare. Now, we continue to live with the horrific consequences. Republicans have introduced bills in states across the country restricting reproductive care, and countless women have experienced the devastating impacts. And Republicans have gone even further by trying to undermine our freedoms by attacking access to IVF, contraception, and more. I’m fighting back in Congress to stop these attacks on our bodily autonomy and pass legislation to restore reproductive healthcare nationwide and defend access to contraception. The stakes are high this year, and to fully protect our freedoms, we need to stop Republicans and their extreme agenda. That means we need to win back the House. This is a fight for our rights, our bodies, and our futures — and I’m not backing down. **[Will you help me continue fighting for reproductive freedom by chipping in $10 or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130623314/618366218/-501591789?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_050226_B1_Dobbs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2MDQ2Zi0zZjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSGsxdBC8m1Jk5haROBo5nz7BAXAAS-kb99G-Kc8C_c=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

And Republicans have gone even further by trying to undermine our freedoms by attacking access to IVF, contraception, and more. I’m fighting back in Congress to stop these attacks on our bodily autonomy and pass legislation to restore reproductive healthcare nationwide and defend access to contraception. The stakes are high this year, and to fully protect our freedoms, we need to stop Republicans and their extreme agenda. That means we need to win back the House. This is a fight for our rights, our bodies, and our futures — and I’m not backing down. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I called on Greg Abbott to temporarily suspend the state gas tax.
body:
As governor, I will speak up, I will take action, and I will fight for working Texans every single day.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Last week, I called on Greg Abbott to temporarily suspend the state gas tax.
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260502_1_gastax.ktc5-K&refcode=em20260502-1043&amount=5&t=1&akid=1043%2E299639%2EqT9r6Q)
Because right now, Texas is in an affordability crisis.
Working-class families are stretched thin, and overnight gas has jumped by more than a dollar in some places. That’s not just a “market fluctuation” to Texans trying to get to work, pick up their kids, or make it to a doctor’s appointment. This is a serious hit to their wallets.
Texans are the hardest working people in the country, Peter. In fact, we work more than the average American. But still too many working people aren’t able to make ends meet.
Abbott has emergency powers. He can use them to give Texans some immediate financial relief by suspending the gas tax — _so why won’t he?_
_Because this is what Abbott does._ When something looks good, he takes the credit. When things get hard, he stays silent, or he points the finger at someone else, while we all have to pay the price — **and right now, we’re _all_ paying it at the pump.**
I’m running for governor because our state doesn’t have real leadership right now. I will speak up, I will take action, and I will fight for working Texans every single day, not billionaires who think they run the state.
**[If you are with me, will you chip in $5 or any amount today to help power this people-driven campaign?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260502_1_gastax.ktc5-K&refcode=em20260502-1043&amount=5&t=2&akid=1043%2E299639%2EqT9r6Q)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260502_1_gastax.ktc5-K&amount=5&refcode=em20260502-1043&t=21&akid=1043%2E299639%2EqT9r6Q)
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260502-1&t=22&refcode2=1043_299639_qT9r6Q&akid=1043%2E299639%2EqT9r6Q)

Thank you.

With your support in April, I'm proud to share that we met our end-of-month fundraising goal and are better prepared for the fights to come.

When I ask you to donate to my re-election campaign, it's not for no reason. I'm walking the walk – here's what I've been up to lately around IL-13.
* **I secured $2 million in federal funding for Brooklyn, IL to help transform an old building into a vibrant community center.** Brooklyn was the first Black incorporated town in the nation, and this funding will create a place for the community to learn, to gather and to thrive, and bring jobs.

* **I was honored to give the keynote address to 400 attendees of the Gutsy Women Gala in St Louis.** These women work tirelessly to support pro-choice, pro-women candidates in our area and beyond.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130624200/618369376/-1967985835?refcode=em-5.2.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2NTYyMS00MDQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cC8q7PBxqe7JcuenY8ZlmDgy_nCeI9MqcaIW1JBvP4=)
* **I joined the No Kings Rally in Edwardsville.** I was proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the community and use our voices to speak out against what's happening under the Trump Administration.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130624202/618369378/-1967985835?refcode=em-5.2.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2NTYyMS00MDQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cC8q7PBxqe7JcuenY8ZlmDgy_nCeI9MqcaIW1JBvP4=)

Protecting working families and delivering results for our communities is the core of why I'm in Congress. **[Your continued support helps me stay there and push back amidst the chaos of the Trump Administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130624203/618369380/-1967985835?refcode=em-5.2.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2NTYyMS00MDQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cC8q7PBxqe7JcuenY8ZlmDgy_nCeI9MqcaIW1JBvP4=)**

Thank you,

Nikki

name: Justin J. Pearson
subject: Trump is calling to eliminate my district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now.
| Donald Trump conspired with the MAGA Gov. of Tennessee to try to eliminate my Democratic majority-Black district.

**But our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now.** We must honor their legacy by standing up, by showing up, and by refusing to be quiet when the foundation of our democracy is being chipped away.

That’s why I’m asking you to join me now — not with despair, but with **determination.**

[I'm personally asking you to consider splitting a $10 donation to the Voter Protection Project and toward our new $100,000 Defend District 9 goal. Your donation and support now does more than just support our People-powered campaign for Congress — it truly powers our new mission to save this district from total elimination in a corrupt Republican power grab.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108570?t=6&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108570?t=7&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)
---
After the shameful Supreme Court decision that gutted the strongest protection against discrimination in voting secured by the Voting Rights Act of 1965, it's clear that Republicans understand something simple: **the more People are allowed to participate fairly in our democracy, the harder it is for them to hold onto power.**

I spoke to the New York Times about this and here is what I said:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108570?t=8&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)
Republicans are going to do what they’ve always done — rewrite the rules to their advantage, abuse the law, and disenfranchise every community they can to silence dissent, suppress votes, and take away representation.

[If you can, please split $10 toward our new $100,000 fundraising goal to defend district TN-09, and continue building the People-powered Movement that will never back down from the GOP’s authoritarianism.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108570?t=9&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Justin Pearson and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108571?t=10&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108572?t=11&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108570?t=14&akid=24141%2E878179%2EuqFKUF)
The only way they'll stop is if the People fight back so loud that they can't silence us.

In Love & Service,

Justin J. Pearson

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Special Invitation for You
body:
We’re winning BIG for election integrity and the rule of law thanks to your generous support. As you know from my prior updates, our team has already notched a landmark Supreme Court victory for clean elections this term – and we are eagerly awaiting the High Court’s decision in our historic lawsuit against Mississippi; a decision that could end the counting of ballots received AFTER Election Day nationwide.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,
As a loyal reader of my updates, you KNOW Judicial Watch has been putting up BIG WINS for election integrity like:

* **Removing****over 6 million ineligible names** from voter rolls across the country - we just crossed this milestone after years of heavy lifting.

* Already notching one landmark _Supreme Court victory_ for clean elections this term.

* And now awaiting the High Court's decision in _another_ historic lawsuit that could **end** the counting of ballots received AFTER Election Day nationwide.

What you may not know is the secret which powers our victories.
_Consistent support._
Consistent followers like you who regularly read and share our content along with consistent support from everyday donors who want to make a _meaningful difference_ in the fight for fair and honest elections.
As you know, our Soros-backed _anti-election-integrity opponents_ have practically _unlimited resources_ to combat our work at every turn.
And they are **relentless** in their corrupt efforts to _undermine_ honest elections. It's a huge challenge.
**But, Fellow American, YOU can make a difference in helping us overcome the billionaire-funded opposition and put up MORE BIG WINS for clean elections.**
How?
By being consistent and fighting corruption _a little_ every month with a small recurring donation.
**That 's why I'm offering you a special invitation to join _[Judicial Watch's Amicus Society](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81234&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)_ as our newest monthly donor, Fellow American. **
| [JOIN THE AMICUS SOCIETY](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81234&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)
---

**Why Do Monthly Gifts Make a BIG Difference?**
In a word. Consistency.

The consistent revenue stream from automatic monthly donations allows us to quickly and confidently respond to corruption and election integrity threats in _real-time_.

Without the consistency of recurring monthly donations from our **Amicus Society** members, Judicial Watch would **never** have been able to earn the wins I mentioned at the top of this email.

Our **Amicus Society** members are proof that the Soros-backed opposition CAN be defeated when thousands of patriots commit to fighting corruption with a recurring donation of as little as $10 each month.

**How Does It Work?**
Monthly giving is not only _powerful,_ it's extremely EASY for you to do.
