name: Wes Moore
subject: Leave no one behind
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)
Peter, it's Governor Wes Moore.
Five years ago, I had never run for political office. I was a former Army Captain, a dad to two young kids, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.
But I knew more had to be done. While career politicians were saying that everything was great, **I was hearing from folks all across Maryland who were feeling left behind.** So I ran for Governor with a mission to make Maryland a state that serves all our people -- and won. (And I'm not done yet!)
**Our mission must continue this year.** I'm running for re-election so we can keep building on the progress we've made on jobs, education, public safety, and more. There are tough fights on the horizon, and there's so much more for us to accomplish together.
[**I'm asking you to join our team by chipping in $5 or $10 right now. Every dollar we raise helps defend this seat and build a campaign that's ready for the challenges ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20260502-1?refcode=em-20260502-1&refcode2=1353_1086043__2qmAV&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20260502-1?refcode=em-20260502-1&refcode2=1353_1086043__2qmAV&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)**
We're making real progress -- investing historic amounts in public education, bringing down costs for working families, and making our communities safer.
But we're still in the federal government's line of sight. Donald Trump has attacked me before, and he and his powerful GOP allies are going to do everything possible to flip our state back to red come November. This election could be an uphill battle.
**This powerful team has never backed down from a fight and I know you are not about to start now.** We have to hit the ground running, because our momentum now determines how we're able to run the rest of this campaign.
[**Please, chip in $5 right now so we can defend this seat. Every donation helps us start the next phase of our campaign strong and fight back against Republicans' advantage.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20260502-1?refcode=em-20260502-1&refcode2=1353_1086043__2qmAV&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)
It's time for us to come together again, across regions and party lines, to prove to a dysfunctional Washington that there's a better way forward.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20260502-1?refcode=em-20260502-1&refcode2=1353_1086043__2qmAV&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260502-1&t=2&refcode2=1353_1086043__2qmAV&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)**
**[Volunteer »](https://support.wesmoore.com/a/volunteer?source=em-20260502-1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1353%2E1086043%2E_2qmAV)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Exactly one month until voters decide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41261%2E3422442%2EdF6jVm)
Peter,
In exactly one month, California voters will decide who moves this fight forward.
Katie is up against a self-funded billionaire who’s poured more than $147 million into his own campaign, candidates who take money from Big Oil and corporate PACs, and two MAGA Republicans.
_And with only the top two advancing, regardless of party, every vote matters._
The next month is about reaching every undecided voter we can and showing Californians there’s only one choice worth fighting for.
That’s why we’re going all out by taking the Whiteboard Warriors Tour across the state, getting our message on the air, and meeting voters where they are.
Katie is fighting for what working families actually need: **single-payer health care, affordable housing, free child care, tuition-free public college—not what billionaires and corporate donors want.**
She doesn’t take corporate cash or empty her wallet trying to fuel her own campaign. She’s powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter.
But taking on this kind of opposition takes resources, and with just one month until voters make this critical decision, we need this team stepping up.
**[Can you chip in today to help us reach more voters, grow this people-powered movement, and make sure Katie earns a spot in the top two next month?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260502_1_ak.yT3Fys&refcode=em20260502-41261&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41261%2E3422442%2EdF6jVm)**

Thank you,
Team Katie

clean_body: This isn’t a mass email. | Fellow American, Here's why: When we reviewed the latest batch of Voter Verification results from Operation Red Strike, we noticed your responses were And honestly? That surprised us. Based on everything we know about your engagement history, you're exactly the kind of patriot whose opinion be shaping our 2026 playbook. But right now, it isn't. | We've asked the data team to hold your file open for so you can go back in and finish. After that, if it is still incomplete, it gets archived - and your input won't be included in the final strategy report that goes to Chairman Hudson. | We're reaching out because Let's get this done. -ORS Data Team | | Paid for by Operation Red Strike, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Hudson for Congress and NRCC. 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 | This email is sent to %%Emailc%% by Operation Red Strike. By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from Operation Red Strike. Operation Red Strike is happy to help at 301-244-9479. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. . | Thank you for supporting our mission Friend! Emails like this are the best way for Operation Red Strike to break through the Mainstream Media and Liberal Lies. It's up to you to ensure Operation Red Strike has the resources we need to go on offense and defeat the Left add info@emails.redstrike.us to your address book ASAP. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step-by-step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , ,

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I'm genuinely sorry >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.
| I am genuinely sorry,.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all.
And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgment of my contribution.
It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently.
This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. [You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=54f2fa8b2d7c4f74a40e7cb52e637e9e&_e=1UFAYvMuWYdgaskebc0DKpUKbNQ-H_nfMGnhsolvJVIyDmEHCrFwAwU075ntQdWQl1ArYFV3_-U1y8GkMjQU5cJs3uUfmLanubeU8K4RQMOai0XxpDKLYNsOWMO6BnPhWD_zDsbNjdBh59MViD96jD6sIg8XT0I18CN6CoUvrjyRh27i1h-kO0d4PjE9iMKsSU85NhDTRJgfCrLLGcRxk3g9fqkZwREVKenXFkn9ZvsZWCFeK1-fXa48JHmXjuZbtvHHAoXjESiefgkO_OGF7GHA-6v0KznNmf_dIu4e_FxOs4WG9f567-a8fVzzPpcJUnqCpvcDMH0yG5mY2ORdRKtupG2tbf8Wcwt-Zd2GQUcGjYAQYAtls0ZOwE3A5Bts_yRSkd9zPtaz_xytKT_2jXChwFDNxzkMVO23HMpyWMRuSYVyVahJSzofe0Fbr7lL4Eu2ADA0532MlHPNwP09RR-ZRTv5TkZnqNDGOFGCb3GcEmZACenzRzO8VgRMoyB5dzIuheOtV0D2LYyEHSYX3zJrfHN6Qkn1V9Ww6kV3azrCXdl6pIia5rI7J-yNNFKlok2tlSXlPd43FZZcTeKAR2wDmPt6fN77R8wTAt4q9K-BiaNjtsSUHWs8AtmjVcr7waDTL29yGOdCvLP7fJ3TuQXpLamq07S4aob-_HCXODx46B36obs1BeFvCMGvwWcqCSyq3Vvmn-RgLQGSDFFwQObjTqRguFi7zsLwaItqneg%3D)
Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.
They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They're ALREADY dragging President Trump into court.
[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=54f2fa8b2d7c4f74a40e7cb52e637e9e&_e=1UFAYvMuWYdgaskebc0DKpUKbNQ-H_nfMGnhsolvJVIyDmEHCrFwAwU075ntQdWQl1ArYFV3_-U1y8GkMjQU5cJs3uUfmLanubeU8K4RQMOai0XxpDKLYNsOWMO6BnPhWD_zDsbNjdBh59MViD96jD6sIg8XT0I18CN6CoUvrjyRh27i1h-kO0d4PjE9iMKsSU85NhDTRJgfCrLLGcRxk3g9fqkZwREVKenXFkn9ZvsZWCFeK1-fXa48JHmXjuZbu9PAR-2jMt5VdwolEBbJhV9ii_cd4y5PzeyZkDVu8VufCbQwgngZ4VgpOwWrb6d87_IRY4-Q034QlZUzZtXyF1c1MZlEuNOVt-fKE3iH2QRfYQrXoOGhDy2GXDLbIpAELDzBk_AUUsNnKAmfhM9yrIjSqSXQZfUGxnGB7-kmevkYD08XClWNBcd7qnTbttarpUui9mu6XFDLvxpHB6qT62HIn_WRe5hWMKMzNph9xJeH6RBoLhicAVTSWvt7u4EV_8ORJe37BxotXCz7ZxIwaeXbwikrA4LQu9LYkglg0HCOMhX_djLDEhT22giuQm7OCK5T9TwDlFfuyiYMyv1uwv5E4WHzuxuxJ9jtBC1Tdkj468ianB6QEEXwYc_MM4NLw8PLfpvy9HHhxOuZ74bWLaLS_54yV2GHnMlPhUZ3toQA70WFny7ahjbpijgnELaQ0SWMCVeZNx9Mv7zBLHuUD8QQtNtI32CRslEjDhAVum0%3D)
If you can't afford to pitch in right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating.
BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.
We have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.
[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our major deadline?](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=54f2fa8b2d7c4f74a40e7cb52e637e9e&_e=1UFAYvMuWYdgaskebc0DKpUKbNQ-H_nfMGnhsolvJVIyDmEHCrFwAwU075ntQdWQl1ArYFV3_-U1y8GkMjQU5cJs3uUfmLanubeU8K4RQMOai0XxpDKLYNsOWMO6BnPhWD_zDsbNjdBh59MViD96jD6sIg8XT0I18CN6CoUvrjyRh27i1h-kO0d4PjE9iMKsSU85NhDTRJgfCrLLGcRxk3g9fqkZwREVKenXFkn9ZvsZWCFeK1-fXa48JHmXjuZb6Ys6yWUdCwqSMCUn5lx_rTNbwobbxmkg9iBk3ebUg0p8ZbzhRiiuu5y8ocNKC6m-L8r0sxb-j92ASFDPkX12CzeshidW7pPzvO778d09sFXr38uZzhQMeWrd9HycgED8-FI6yCJXD4pKHQRqY2PtHSEwccnea96VxII9Dc2CPs4BMj3F_QjrsNG4-gPQvBPRTD3L_dEwD_bzI2Igwv_gdL2yW2KK4ABAYg3j7ZszLWsBUQcBQSbp405dwAJW-h7gegmy1jFW4c7IACbV_qoH0r3z4y76Kb0pmkN7if9R_0f5lISOEPx9wBQiUecFqA1289s0hdI0UkUKSM3OAG7iWNQOP4tyajLBK6GAc_naa63-zJASeMk-ZK5v7N0MxzyINLrh7O128x_ZW65RpNlnYvc7Z1RxDFe9VFgu3JJIkJ6aZWmmwWf9xi2MvDtUsA6GVfeyU81yVkaPVHXf5CXO_LUFyf2oBG2qYcFk-TFMNTA%3D)

clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | I am genuinely sorry,. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all. And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgment of my contribution. It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They're ALREADY dragging President Trump into court. If you can't afford to pitch in right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. We have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! | | Dear Friend,

How much do you know about the Electoral College?

It's an important topic, and one vital to our nation's future.

You see, a movement is growing, led by progressives but supported by many well-meaning Americans, to change the way we elect our president.

**Their goal: to get rid of the Electoral College altogether, and "move beyond" the Constitution and Declaration. **

**That 's why I hope you'll take our National Quiz on Presidential Selection today.** It's a quick and engaging way to test your own understanding of how our presidents are elected.

**You can take your quiz by using the secure link below:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale-college-national-quiz-on-presidential-selection](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/abG42LMpMGCQc_jeq8HixRVuJ8SbtZjffhwBzOlRgHuWnD8G_ksCY1L1PTfhsEiV1zwQks-aQNFeNbtur5ua-gCFhRoWRkfwkGe_LOTLvQGxx49kccGWDixSNKv8oUvl0T-YJYN4FPIJed0QZJyKWpuG0rEgwSr7iRHChrK-x9w2Rd-t1ikEmEsaIQL2FJ24IdMs1t7qRXni-SHzOeRLu_HhoO7Ib_jAW_6SMpHMDj3gT73vCdqXDjos-hvlbTqQ8sLQcZ4CYYiJIQL5mCgC_qo2Zrh_ZESybJNBQXUzmSoPzZDudZcT5uUddJ9ECh8FYRw1BGzDjcg-pT8aTVoOX-XWY_aMn7duPX7U_W7RttwhQUyYXcqOGkjEWgQ4IHqJq5C_ZpvxoFiu8ahJ3lJy0OAsl5RtI8AYh411yNmYjbV0vewa1N9g8l3uS3hiIpbXUEXd27Xc7_cWcM6UAqKU4ypepe2WkbRCoiIDl5SxZSgVPkaR4yq7Ou2ELGk47NGLch8vwX6VAlVFMvUSQRvRYkoRAvjX5wW7EH5vdvyJxPmM2Gb36bbu3btD-LPXrArxIzeaj_Pw3q_KOaBbHFdgj1gHAcd98TFOUIAZS3WyAntdw2zs2Bg-lDw_-BmJGRLlqCbkxyXWJQ4W7kacKrFfSRrxGcPf4pVkTLqqS3PpvNH0yOUCOmOJI4pPkY5CWWlP6m_gVDuNWBrB6J-5Q_X898Xyao8jvZFstt2uhrOalLQiLgP2tvtQAc93KAykxw6vCUFSI5y6ihRH6VWU4Zja_mJqU5to6b1pd4793dCH8raXR1LjpDX_1p1bApC6fHXfNg/z_yo54n_ebGIUQz2WhvtmKj9lfvGmVNG/20)

For most of our history, the Electoral College was uncontroversial. It was understood to be a safeguard for free and representative government.

**But today, dozens of states have joined together to undermine this key constitutional protection.**

The push to "move beyond" the Constitution stems from the failure of too many schools to teach American civics properly. Many citizens today don't fully understand the importance of the Constitution and the Electoral College in preserving liberty.

To counter this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, **reaching and teaching millions** of Americans in all 50 states.

When you take the **National Quiz on Presidential Selection** , you'll gain a clearer understanding of how the Electoral College upholds liberty--and you'll have the opportunity to **share this** information with your fellow Americans.

So please take your **National Quiz on Presidential Selection**. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

**You can take the quiz using the secure link I 've provided below: **

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale-college-national-quiz-on-presidential-selection](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/SfcIt5k19ab505Jz7GrZCPtLIxf6gC8toPUAST_g4U-9PRH28tcBojaTUAlV5ckvE4v5O_A98vTbWfdd88wnls2HzEWZAoUlDT10PZZKCXXCU4K6ZPp5OV5-kyCKL3RlNcGLjS4DIiT1gVn-uEQ9FFveUH0UJZk6CZ-l6LRWlmF5tEgNAfCcZVRl0WuO97RqjXKVATkhPZvWGfplCUriMRfG5I0qLkjQ6XgHms3lHys7q93qZPVgeBNylr9BGQIfLlGlxfGwSWou5Wdl7IG6RFSJ12-shIk5OA_trafnVfXsaxugLezmr3lGi4P-lcdsBj10kV63t4hPEirx2mTE4iyHpBg3zrTlOWJytQLh6D8r3NjEai9UbTCXmuLEoRP0FJplnC55UgYHIULuQAqUObjtbmKzQ2IB0fkZmOhxPNaCuNJvVNs-6gBamLsmtbqPRfRCxIEc8FPgSShM0udHni0upQSTQojsIlh5Sr368I8kaDam7n_uaV3I7mr-ZD_gxKyN6mziowHCJusPFt-XSGnZZjefGyL0nK8Syd3CRi_j3OndaDxOSLjBc-2aTax2inlVRTYlmSU8Na0asxpgAlIjqiVf-pZPT7AEWbihgwp4vWVrKWuE7kBhLKjq_lj2FAhxR3k3PKbzBeOcDkCkefVwDVFs-exa8XMjFZzYVIoBQ2OtWAx6yPonffnjyxNbbZrc1KlKHZG4UPW198-yw3V6QYU8HyemK7cttOEy7SK13TtkdvX0w92MOxQXdSdIWuf9_UCZO1Zvq3Z2MBbnpMLAHCE7QSAzYEWtvduzGQ2NVQ8po0u32SjXn9GqW0z2Iw/JhOk2hmoZztaTRWqTRjy_2oXnb2ZaqmQ/20)

**As a thank-you for taking the quiz, I 'll send you a free 12-minute video with a Hillsdale College professor that explains the history and purpose of the Electoral College. **

The video provides a concise, engaging, and insightful overview of the Electoral College and its significance. It would be a great resource to send to a friend or a family member!

One other thing.

Hillsdale refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly through student loans or grants--so that we can pursue truth and defend liberty independent of meddling bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. That's why your support matters so much.

So, after you take your quiz, please also consider giving a **tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, or even $100** to help us share this video with millions of Americans--especially young people who don't understand how the Constitution preserves liberty through the Electoral College. Your gift also funds our other nationwide educational outreach.

Thank you for standing with Hillsdale College in the effort to educate Americans about the Constitution and safeguard the principles of liberty. Good luck on the quiz and enjoy your video!

Warm regards,

Bill Gray '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you know a young person who cares about civics and the Constitution, please share this email and the quiz with them! Every response helps us expand our efforts to **reach** and **teach** Americans of all ages about liberty and the Constitution. Thank you!

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale-college-national-quiz-on-presidential-selection](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/syjJRALWpDiTAQE4nD4S6EpRxo_9iIQQaAeEepi9U3EV6OOfF8Tz0EtTqfNlv7ipDwoCNzyOR0sr9vLJV69_cQl_7u9OCDVL505diE8jzlmFb5dJtHrls4wYUjcbobrSLmAkDidN_zpDEJPAKY1M1THU2pehp5i2P3fl_PgCJ-siPmEAmzIjKyAdu_iAwxD6J_NOdeDKAJ3DlsVETCfTl2ecSo-JV9vCFrcNylTNPALSK5QHEadOWT8KYFxpYZseJKMt0EkHZcSUfCp6Ecy4vFmScwyWiUjfpfADT90O4-N69uu0hg02VlLTCDRjXegQnhsiTI8P2zJYAaQyDGsTBoKnbGFEtReUPiNtFBTvIQEacF7r9ZO7V4K16XufkpLnxAwV4zurLzauD_Mv1eIaUP9IGanYGiG-J6r0BaMh3jFJKJjuS3HF0mjouWZWC-5sP8AmBHTtAaAU7IKHCHYO_E24L1a31-tIiX9grAKz9yDrQybnbsoqDe4V0PuJ9sZGi0NVE-CAr73GKsyCYdm6OSm0QVXZa8Tei0TkrBkFGRBaekyfPsVMYsz_Q5emOiWpr6wXGmsud0EPFQkX9KcS-4N6XUwoUnn9RtuIGtUVGSgLxSQEWmIJPspuGZ7tMDnIU8Jg20EjyIgLUbl8FwfNXmjWONdHNLr7WhURtnOyURNxZro_Ahlntb2h9thuYA5eQvLSbZVc94bbH9YkB5wud-YKu9c23Kd_ZRPMSdyNqfOYBR_ajWDJv3n_zkOSgrBT-LJorDqe2Mq1KPJPGarawk8FnsvcE06O3gHbF_DKAwXEgolBkn9fuKEcuDW1FichRg/z3JDkhOpHEXCvS2ajmnTsg0mY7XlEEMs/20)

name: Team Chrissy
subject: Pennsylvania's primary election day is almost here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
The primary election is on May 19, and the last day to register to vote is May 4.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130627329/618381249/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkM2U1ZS00ODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6qdL60-IveS8Fc8ksFhKvBH1PRYcQVUrmZwq672etU=&emci=7ddfbef4-9445-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ec7d3e5e-4846-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21278485)
---
Remember, Derek: Pennsylvania's primary election day is right around the corner (17 days away!) – and the choice we make now will determine the momentum we carry into November.

_**Here are some important dates to mark on your calendar:**_
* **May 4, 2026:** Last day to register to vote for the primary
* **May 12, 2026:** Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot
* **May 19, 2026:** Primary election day, polls are open from 7 a.m. – 8 p.m.

Chrissy will be on the ballot, and she is hoping she can count on your vote!

This is the first step toward keeping PA-06 a seat that works for working families. We can’t take anything for granted, which is why we’re asking you to make a plan today.

Please, take a moment to ensure you and your family are ready. If you’re already set, pass this info along to a neighbor who might need the reminder!
Thank you,

Team Chrissy
P.S. If you have questions about how or where to vote or register, please **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130627335/618381254/108146999?source=jtk1258-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkM2U1ZS00ODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6qdL60-IveS8Fc8ksFhKvBH1PRYcQVUrmZwq672etU=&emci=7ddfbef4-9445-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ec7d3e5e-4846-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21278485)** to visit the Pennsylvania Secretary of State website for more information.
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130627349/618381266/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkM2U1ZS00ODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6qdL60-IveS8Fc8ksFhKvBH1PRYcQVUrmZwq672etU=&emci=7ddfbef4-9445-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ec7d3e5e-4846-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21278485). subject: 'We forgot that freedom isn’t free' by: Gigi Butler
body:
Freedom doesn't disappear overnight--it fades when good people get comfortable and stop fighting for it.

| |

# ['We forgot that freedom isn't free' by: Gigi Butler ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196128615&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTI4NjE1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc3NDE0NjIsImV4cCI6MTc4MDMzMzQ2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xvpYIsCiy0v5YqyYuLU2LUCga0YwvQ0Vl2-vrRDeMSA)
### Freedom doesn't disappear overnight--it fades when good people get comfortable and stop fighting for it.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| May 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/783ba20c-f083-4341-8387-d91cbf200900?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I sat up until 1 am on the morning of November 5th, waiting on pins and needles, more nervous than I think I have ever been. I was praying harder than I had done in a long time.

After I finally drifted off to sleep awhile, at 4am it was like a clock went off inside of me and I jumped out of bed and turned on the TV. An overwhelming win for Trump!

I honestly haven't felt this joyous since 2016. It even had a deeper meaning and more desperation this time around and much more at stake. It's like millions of people had finally woke up and realized this country we had grown up in is almost unrecognizable.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196128615&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTI4NjE1LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc3NDE0NjIsImV4cCI6MTc4MDMzMzQ2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xvpYIsCiy0v5YqyYuLU2LUCga0YwvQ0Vl2-vrRDeMSA)
Covid had been our smelling salts or a splash of cold water to the face that jolted us lazy Christians out of a stupor. We thought "wait a minute!" What is happening to our freedoms we once had and have been taking for granted. Or how about our safety or the ability to pay our bills? What the Heck Happened?

We got lazy and complacent. We forgot that freedom isn't free and we have to fight for it and stand strong

Thank goodness some preachers like Dutch Sheets, Tim Sheets, Kent Christmas, Allen Jackson or Kenneth Copeland to name a few. They woke up and started guiding their flocks.

Us lazy middle of the road so called Christians had to start praying, take a stand and risk some blowback. There is a powerful remnant that is leading the charge.

I am so grateful to be alive in this time. I have an overwhelming sense of pride and gratefulness.

Americans stood up to the establishment and spoke.

I bleed red white and blue.

I took the time to reflect on Psalms 40 tonight. I waited patiently on the Lord and he heard my cry. He lifted me out of the slimy pit...

If you get a chance read it. It is so timely for right now.

Blessings!

40 I waited patiently for the Lord; and he inclined unto me, and heard my cry.
2 He brought me up also out of an horrible pit, out of the miry clay, and set my feet upon a rock, and established my goings.
3 And he hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God: many shall see it, and fear, and shall trust in the Lord.
4 Blessed is that man that maketh the Lord his trust, and respecteth not the proud, nor such as turn aside to lies.
5 Many, O Lord my God, are thy wonderful works which thou hast done, and thy thoughts which are to us-ward: they cannot be reckoned up in order unto thee: if I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be numbered.
6 Sacrifice and offering thou didst not desire; mine ears hast thou opened: burnt offering and sin offering hast thou not required.
7 Then said I, Lo, I come: in the volume of the book it is written of me,
8 I delight to do thy will, O my God: yea, thy law is within my heart.
9 I have preached righteousness in the great congregation: lo, I have not refrained my lips, O Lord, thou knowest.
10 I have not hid thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared thy faithfulness and thy salvation: I have not concealed thy lovingkindness and thy truth from the great congregation.
11 Withhold not thou thy tender mercies from me, O Lord: let thy lovingkindness and thy truth continually preserve me.
12 For innumerable evils have compassed me about: mine iniquities have taken hold upon me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of mine head: therefore my heart faileth me.
13 Be pleased, O Lord, to deliver me: O Lord, make haste to help me.
14 Let them be ashamed and confounded together that seek after my soul to destroy it; let them be driven backward and put to shame that wish me evil.
15 Let them be desolate for a reward of their shame that say unto me, Aha, aha.
16 Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: let such as love thy salvation say continually, The Lord be magnified.
17 But I am poor and needy; yet the Lord thinketh upon me: thou art my help and my deliverer; make no tarrying, O my God.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

name: Jason Crow
subject: A reckless decision that puts us and our military at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I served three combat tours as a paratrooper and Army Ranger. I know firsthand what it takes to keep our troops ready to fight, and I know what puts them at risk.

Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth just eliminated the military's flu vaccine requirement, ending a commonsense mandate that has been in place for nearly 70 years. He called it "overly broad." I call it reckless.

Vaccine mandates have been a part of military service since George Washington put one in 1777. Vaccines are not politics for those of us who have led troops into harm’s way. They keep servicemembers healthy, on duty, and ready to fight when called.

I need you to join me in speaking out. Please add your name to my petition calling for Hegseth to rescind this decision. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2605-flu-vaccine]

PROTECT SERVICE MEMBERS [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2605-flu-vaccine]

Defense Secretary Hegseth’s decision to end the universal flu vaccine mandate abandons the principle of military readiness. Saying it restores “freedom” ignores the real costs: more sick days, more hospitalizations, and a weaker force at a time our country faces real threats.

Our adversaries do not take days off. Our military cannot afford to either. I spoke out immediately, and I will keep fighting decisions that weaken our national security.

I need your help to make sure our leaders hear from veterans, military families, and concerned citizens who understand what military readiness really means.

Join my effort to demand the Defense Department restore the flu vaccine requirement so our forces stay healthy, ready, and able to defend our country: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2605-flu-vaccine]

PROTECT SERVICE MEMBERS [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2605-flu-vaccine]

Thanks for standing with our troops. I'll continue to push back and hold this administration accountable.

Jason
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

**** Democrats have introduced articles of impeachment against Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for going to war against Iran without Congressional approval and for his broader leadership of the Department of Defense. Let’s list all of the scandals Hegseth has been in for the little over a year of his tenure:
* Sharing of details about U.S. military operations in Yemen in a private Signal group chat.
* Accused of “double-tapping” military strikes and killing survivors.
* Obstructing constitutional oversight by withholding information on the Venezuela and Iran operations.
* Firing generals and other military leaders who disagreed with him over the Iran War.
* Removed several women and people of color from prominent leadership roles.

The list goes on and on. The American people are ready for new leadership, and we are turning that energy into action. **Cedar Key Progress is planning to expand our billboard program to the Minneapolis area**** _(Hegseth’s hometown)_****, energizing voters to demand Hegseth’s impeachment.** **** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHCZ2G7R8D7CbB16kcods1ICVusRHuMgCDk1a4H7aIE4Loy5vFvHkQAaRQHXa42zh92GvnuIaCr3t9HBtOF9FUt3RmFah4ppsK9t9LQs-C51_MqF_DoFpALG6Kv_VKihEFV1ACUnfNaJRuNs_GJ2ZRkXX3fe5ggLe3Ne27ouys73AiFr6K4_Wfvj5i4BWrzDHszo1HoWvFg2dLPfvG_NeRTQKe6vyWOIXw_lfWtYZCQfsdnDUqGqXKwiouzyKeIBOoCxbQbi8lAtIORmgs1soGvdge9vpnUskcVr_LUWc3ZPUeWTJ9UFlgX3JhwKKkBVn0IiHWw_ONToivi4rqiTz4xbRVca8awn_CvRY4_Bq8Ihii1hBA2mWwYWIvCcTKO3pdqrI-q0gA8vRh0V9pua8uJA/4qa/AXa0r74-ReuS0m2o3aqhkw/h2/h001.NtPRSoUZbYnh48dP74fBDsAs3T4pFiZLZd7IcI2H73g)

clean_body: | | | We need the country to support Hegseth’s impeachment. Democrats have introduced articles of impeachment against Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for going to war against Iran without Congressional approval and for his broader leadership of the Department of Defense. Let’s list all of the scandals Hegseth has been in for the little over a year of his tenure: Sharing of details about U.S. military operations in Yemen in a private Signal group chat. Accused of “double-tapping” military strikes and killing survivors. Obstructing constitutional oversight by withholding information on the Venezuela and Iran operations. Firing generals and other military leaders who disagreed with him over the Iran War. Removed several women and people of color from prominent leadership roles. The list goes on and on. The American people are ready for new leadership, and we are turning that energy into action. Cedar Key Progress is planning to expand our billboard program to the Minneapolis area (Hegseth’s hometown), energizing voters to demand Hegseth’s impeachment. ** Democracy is about raising our voices and our representatives listening to us. If Speaker of the House Mike Johnson won’t allow this to come to a vote, we need an absolute majority of representatives to bring the impeachment to the floor. Help us demand** true accountabilityfor Hegseth. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cedar Key Progress, please .

Republican David Pan Accelerates Drive for Congress for CA 46th CD

| | | | | [](https://eot.davidpanforcongress.org/f/a/SgQkwrz5lCOAdWs0AypBbg~~/AAAHURA~/Yvxhwdj9T315axXxR4Tr8mcLW-rIlFgLyOGruKty66t2dvxA7Lpu0nltfypD5sl-2EcbPegvtBHSKJ5lsg6ddiQyQFyG5GDzPj6tOy3z6bH6jIi7_2pKq5iUt_thqPoF1PlOaFLh3DYkj_k7xExX9bshA_erNp-DYExdCnNdj6M~)

| | Santa Ana, CA—A spokesperson for the New Majority of Orange County wrote on Monday, April 27, 2026: “Our Board of Directors voted unanimously to endorse your candidacy for Congressional District 46. ... Thank you for your leadership and commitment to our organization’s core principles.” The New Majority describes itself as a network of business executives and community leaders “committed to responsible, pro-growth” policies in government. David Pan said he was “gratified and honored” to be endorsed by this group of “prosperity-focused” civic leaders. Pan has also been endorsed by California Republican Party, Orange County Republican Party, California Congress of Republicans, California Republican Assembly, and Reform California, as well as numerous current and former officeholders. See [here](https://eot.davidpanforcongress.org/f/a/CfLCKoKF8CRrs8qt92dhsQ~~/AAAHURA~/QlFLc9v4Etk9X85z7zok1QGQzDFu2kbYb_t7SZo1cdHS6euEDixGq4TM_GZgRMEV-E1EhVOo_IVLbjanndKtoQBo3wMTj8KCcWSc5rikNtwZms9IN_5S7vMIu6GrzHQ77_AU_WpnUDj2vZbjT3feHoSJM0AY-4dDqiG3yMMNxaC3f6EQe_UvTJV-uEazhyoL). Pan is running to ensure public safety, maintain secure borders, empower school parents, transform welfare, and reduce the size and scope of government. For further details, see[ here](https://eot.davidpanforcongress.org/f/a/gqvQ3qWi2Es4mS2Xxnca1A~~/AAAHURA~/DzFdgcd2yo2sPtjf1wC06KVSRxbqHipOtm1A0Gt85IHjtSb6pRCaf9ilLrX4bCoJ4-WJh9ZEleBppS75sW_n7yx9RsdXgPfJcHrucYWNPBL0m-1u3LMgvSHwnoc8sd3lNZXNqjMnjWXvOyl_0vSq42NyY45H3RI0eqdfX6iIg_e2c_tIlSFAW1_1Kq4Cgpmz). Pan is a professor of German at the University of California at Irvine. Pan worked as a management consultant at McKinsey and Company in Los Angeles He has also taught at Washington University in St. Louis, Stanford University, and Pennsylvania State University. He is the editor of the scholarly journal [_Telos_](https://eot.davidpanforcongress.org/f/a/2NLIr_CFVrS_hVP39d0lEA~~/AAAHURA~/RoJqzWP1gREtvZv7otEkkNZB_ZjqQhTP_VxygF7SuplsYBeMRo5P39grHPtY5wKa9eNYowrDjE3bVc3vDvucy9KiJHIX4OH9bHiBouWivu7BC-LQPoafVlYdDH8N_W81Hkby0vXEmz5Oag9rCtQJg5htES_iekmmQ0KLgdrNSmU~). He has a B.A. from Stanford University, and an M.A. and Ph.D. from Columbia University.

David Pan

| We beat Trump’s election-rigging scheme once. California Democrats passed Prop 50 by a landslide — stopping Trump and Republicans from stacking the deck and proving that when we organize, we win. **But in a new decision this week, the Supreme Court just handed them a second chance.** By gutting the Voting Rights Act, Trump’s justices have opened the door to rig congressional maps across the country — specifically diluting Black, Latino, AANHPI, and Native American representation and locking in Republican power before a single vote is cast in 2026. Republicans are already preparing to redraw maps and push new voter suppression laws. Here in California, we’re facing a voter ID ballot measure designed to silence voters at the ballot box. **[We stopped them once with Prop 50. We can do it again. But only if we act immediately. clean_body: We passed Prop 50, now the courts revive election-rigging | = | We beat Trump’s election-rigging scheme once. California Democrats passed Prop 50 by a landslide — stopping Trump and Republicans from stacking the deck and proving that when we organize, we win. But in a new decision this week, the Supreme Court just handed them a second chance. By gutting the Voting Rights Act, Trump’s justices have opened the door to rig congressional maps across the country — specifically diluting Black, Latino, AANHPI, and Native American representation and locking in Republican power before a single vote is cast in 2026. Republicans are already preparing to redraw maps and push new voter suppression laws. Here in California, we’re facing a voter ID ballot measure designed to silence voters at the ballot box. = = Let’s be clear about the stakes: ✔️ When we passed Prop 50, we proved that grassroots organizing can stop election rigging in its tracks. ❌ If we don’t respond now, Republicans will use this Supreme Court ruling to rig maps nationwide and tilt the playing field before campaigns even begin. There is no waiting this out. The other side is moving fast to take advantage of this decision. They’re counting on us to be discouraged and distracted. But we are NOT going to be distracted. We are going to defeat the GOP’s attempts to suppress voters with voter ID requirements in California, expand our voter protection efforts to ensure every eligible voter can cast their ballot, and scale grassroots organizing to compete in key House races and retake the majority in 2026. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Chaz Molder
subject: Andy Ogles doesn't want to earn your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
He wants to pick new voters instead.

| | | | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court issued a major ruling this week on congressional maps. Within hours, Andy Ogles was calling for Tennessee to redraw ours. Let me be clear about what's happening here. This isn't about making sure Middle Tennessee has better representation, and this isn't about fairness — it’s about Andy Ogles trying to save his own job. [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/cDiTOzOg5TpiJfl7hNVWrQ~~/AAUS1hA~/otSyOcQCpN1BE2ortDL67ygjJG5WmUFTcD0eDWRr0nu_4P32a5ZEHtEbWPxOQ0V-0-P4iR0DM4fCv92LTN0OqCExRHdMGw2-ho2X-FCvHtUH6Xy6-eNzfjeFygQ-dc8h8AIUZdr99Gyz8q84bc-CAaqH42lbplK8TXI4mUW0D8ryzKyd2a2FUQHUI-9PCU8hdLEWLZanGjTIi9nHuP8nyPCwmSpZ46cV2dCEy-_MHO1Wfg2h7Pe7udSp9JKuLHke) He sees the polling, he sees the fundraising numbers, he knows _The New York Times_ just wrote about how vulnerable he is, and he knows this race is ours to win! But instead of doing what any normal person would do, which is work harder to earn the trust of the people he represents, he's trying to change the map so he doesn't have to. We used to call this moving the goalposts in backyard football. **That tells you everything you need to know about Andy Ogles. When the job gets hard, he doesn't rise to the moment. He tries to rig the game.** I've spent almost eight years as mayor of Columbia. I've never once tried to pick my voters. I've tried to earn their votes: Democrats, Republicans, independents, people who've never voted before. That's how it should work. **If Andy Ogles spent half as much energy working for the people of Middle Tennessee as he does trying to protect himself, this would be a different district. But he didn't. And that's why we're here.** We knew this race wasn't going to be easy. Now they're trying to make it even harder. That means we need to be ready for whatever comes next. name: Maine Update
subject: Democrats in Maine have consolidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the HER Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
This is about dignity in the workplace and in our health care system. |
---
Peter, ask someone you love about their experience with period pain, and odds are they have a horrific story about crippling cramps or pain. I’ve been there — and I want to share how I’m turning this pain and struggle for _millions_ of people into real action. **2015:** I was living in New York, working at the UN on climate policy. One day, I passed out in my local bodega and woke up to find two paramedics getting ready to load me into an ambulance. I had passed out because of period pain. **2020:** I was back in Arizona, running to become the _youngest woman ever_ elected to the Phoenix City Council, and I was still fighting every month to get through periods that often found me curled up in a fetal position on the bathroom floor because of the pain. **2022:** The Trump-appointed Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and I led the passage of a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care. **2025:** I was sworn in as the **youngest woman in the 119th Congress** — part of a new generation of leadership. **2026:** I’ve held the powerful to account: demanding answers for Epstein survivors, and exposing corruption and insider trading at the highest levels. Throughout all of that, I have had to fight my body every month, working through the pain that sometimes feels like barbed wire wrapping around my insides. And I am far from the only person who has experienced this. But now I’m a member of Congress, and I can do something about it. I’ve introduced a package of bills called the HER Agenda, common-sense bills designed to close the gaps women have faced for decades: providing 12 days paid leave for reproductive health needs (menstrual pain, menopause, fertility care, procedures); directing HHS to study barriers and expand evidence-based pain care; directing NIH funding and trials for Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder, a severe form of PMS; and a congressional acknowledgment of how medical neglect and stigma have harmed generations of women. These measures address longstanding gaps and inequities in women’s healthcare, with a focus on autonomy, pain management, and workplace protections. **This is about dignity: dignity in the workplace, and dignity in our health care system.** [**Will you sign on to be a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130628980/618387002/748640320?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI3ODg5Yi00YTQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEEDVSyYblrW1_Rwj8H90VB8_CF27ZfQvzM86WxTQCY=&emci=fd27889b-4a46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ff27889b-4a46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=45157234) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130628981/618387003/748640320?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI3ODg5Yi00YTQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEEDVSyYblrW1_Rwj8H90VB8_CF27ZfQvzM86WxTQCY=&emci=fd27889b-4a46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ff27889b-4a46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=45157234)
---
When you sign on, you send a message to employers, Congress, and HHS that health policy must match people’s lives.
Thank you for standing with us to make health care humane and equitable. Your voice — and your name — will move this legislation forward.
Thank you!

clean_body: This is about dignity in the workplace and in our health care system. | Peter, ask someone you love about their experience with period pain, and odds are they have a horrific story about crippling cramps or pain. I’ve been there — and I want to share how I’m turning this pain and struggle for millions of people into real action. 2015: I was living in New York, working at the UN on climate policy. One day, I passed out in my local bodega and woke up to find two paramedics getting ready to load me into an ambulance. I had passed out because of period pain. 2020: I was back in Arizona, running to become the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council, and I was still fighting every month to get through periods that often found me curled up in a fetal position on the bathroom floor because of the pain. 2022: The Trump-appointed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , and I led the passage of a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care. 2025: I was sworn in as the youngest woman in the 119th Congress — part of a new generation of leadership. 2026: I’ve held the powerful to account: demanding answers for Epstein survivors, and exposing corruption and insider trading at the highest levels. Throughout all of that, I have had to fight my body every month, working through the pain that sometimes feels like barbed wire wrapping around my insides. And I am far from the only person who has experienced this. But now I’m a member of Congress, and I can do something about it. I’ve introduced a package of bills called the HER Agenda, common-sense bills designed to close the gaps women have faced for decades: providing 12 days paid leave for reproductive health needs (menstrual pain, menopause, fertility care, procedures); directing HHS to study barriers and expand evidence-based pain care; directing NIH funding and trials for Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder, a severe form of PMS; and a congressional acknowledgment of how medical neglect and stigma have harmed generations of women. These measures address longstanding gaps and inequities in women’s healthcare, with a focus on autonomy, pain management, and workplace protections. This is about dignity: dignity in the workplace, and dignity in our health care system. | When you sign on, you send a message to employers, Congress, and HHS that health policy must match people’s lives. Thank you for standing with us to make health care humane and equitable. Your voice — and your name — will move this legislation forward. Thank you! Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

Because they know — if they can buy Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat, they block the Democrats from having _any_ chance at flipping control of the U.S. Senate to serve as a real check on Trump. It’s a massive amount of money aimed directly at defeating **us**. _They think they can buy this seat._ [**We need the resources to fight back right now. I know there are a lot of exciting races across the country where Democrats have a chance to flip a Republican-held seat. And donors are pouring money into those races.
Michigan’s US Senate seat is currently held by a Democrat. But holding the seat is not anywhere near guaranteed, not in a battleground state like this one, and not with the _tens of millions_ they’re pouring in to flip it.
Look, I know I’ve been in your inbox a lot talking about what we’re up against, but this kind of money is something we can’t ignore. It means the GOP will stop at nothing to flip this seat.
The nonstop attacks from these groups will keep coming, Peter. We can continue building on our momentum, but only IF we have the resources to respond to the tens of millions of dollars in attack ads coming our way.
I don’t take corporate PAC money. It’s us against the MAGA billionaires, and I’m betting on us — every time.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation to keep Michigan blue, this is it. Will you split a contribution today between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us win in Michigan?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_McMorrow-45-Million_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=9&akid=2175%2E259176%2EQmqpnu)

name: Cleo Fields
subject: SCOTUS erased my seat, MAGA is cancelling my election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DSCC OF LA
body:
Six unelected judges in robes decided that Black voices are unconstitutional. This is segregation by map. It is Jim Crow with a gavel.
| | | | | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jdxhOBrU4Mr6n2zpEKFlhasWyqj04yG91vqD5PIJcuDVqOpakpaJolLnBXFzPn6-IDxGhlmgcR0IlgZGKFh7iRehiTc5Jc-nctRx22nzJd6w1B7-zuwf0g7hYyahQ5Jff-zV4cJuj0m4REYp8yaaJ5ViwTsuKyKp3VPqUr_w4mwy9i-jkzuUIqWmNw1jq62j9HnTR5uYGtlKQjJJTZEMn1XLvNNhobOB6aWUNxNxfeE=&c=cOImClWH8n566Y8Vc0M2rSA81RXYwfZqqQPUedAJOpDzCFoDmn9q6A==&ch=4WcRsyY1h0yaivV3w4Cia1ry3QQlUW5xWp3E27JKzjpCRaaXOOOysg==)
---
| Peter,
My name is Cleo Fields. I represent Louisiana's 6th Congressional District. And earlier this week, the United States Supreme Court put a target on my back.
In a 6-3 decision, the court's MAGA majority declared that my district is unconstitutional. They gutted Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, the protection that Civil Rights leaders gave their blood to secure.

---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jdxhOBrU4Mr6n2zpEKFlhasWyqj04yG91vqD5PIJcuDVqOpakpaJolLnBXFzPn6-IDxGhlmgcR0IlgZGKFh7iRehiTc5Jc-nctRx22nzJd6w1B7-zuwf0g7hYyahQ5Jff-zV4cJuj0m4REYp8yaaJ5ViwTsuKyKp3VPqUr_w4mwy9i-jkzuUIqWmNw1jq62j9HnTR5uYGtlKQjJJTZEMn1G6AO5bLz7BcUVcRls873c=&c=cOImClWH8n566Y8Vc0M2rSA81RXYwfZqqQPUedAJOpDzCFoDmn9q6A==&ch=4WcRsyY1h0yaivV3w4Cia1ry3QQlUW5xWp3E27JKzjpCRaaXOOOysg==)
---

Six unelected judges in robes decided that Black voices are unconstitutional. This is segregation by map. It is Jim Crow with a gavel.
This decision tears open wounds that have never fully healed. The Voting Rights Act was born from Selma. From Birmingham. From the Canal Street sit-ins in New Orleans and the 106-mile march from Bogalusa to the steps of this Capitol. John Lewis bled on that bridge. Medgar Evers was assassinated in his driveway. Dr. King gave his life. Fannie Lou Hamer stood before the world and declared she was sick and tired of being sick and tired. They gave everything so Black Americans would never again be stripped of their voice.
And now Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry wants to suspend Louisiana's upcoming congressional elections on May 16th so he can silence the Black voters that I represent before the 2026 midterm elections.
Early voting is already underway. Louisianans are casting ballots at this very moment. He wants to throw those votes in the trash and rush a new gerrymandered map through the legislature before anyone can stop him. All to erase a majority-Black district and to silence the voters who sent me to Congress.
They have done everything in their power to make sure Black Louisianans do not have a seat at the table. They will not succeed. I have fought this fight before and I will fight it again. The torch that the Civil Rights Movement passed to us is still burning and I refuse to let it go out.
[But I cannot do this alone. MAGA is moving heaven and earth to try and erase my district and silence the voters I represent. I need Democrats everywhere to help me carry the torch. Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Louisiana Democrats today to help me fight back?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jdxhOBrU4Mr6n2zpEKFlhasWyqj04yG91vqD5PIJcuDVqOpakpaJolLnBXFzPn6-FLa5uSpgiVfIRkekdd_TVFYLGO6vloujxmrbk61F1G7-NMBk0wY-GAly-hSd3R_4pY4_bJVd8NCQqTM0Ddzv_vT6bhp-CfmkSzUQL7OvQearPVDwoEkhxUHmiXmxc_uCtQemJNAUw_oYej9miqbHpf7VCDQC2zn6qpdQkA2F0ssCz7VPBOgRXQ==&c=cOImClWH8n566Y8Vc0M2rSA81RXYwfZqqQPUedAJOpDzCFoDmn9q6A==&ch=4WcRsyY1h0yaivV3w4Cia1ry3QQlUW5xWp3E27JKzjpCRaaXOOOysg==)
---

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Trump still won't let this go.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
In case you missed this, Donald Trump is now calling for the 2020
presidential election to be "permanently wiped from the books.”

If you can believe it, he’s still not letting this go.

But the
truth is, this is part of his continued effort to undermine faith in our
elections and rewrite the outcome when it doesn’t go his way.

As Secretary of State, I’ve seen firsthand what happens when these kinds
of lies take hold.

After 2020, when false claims were being spread and amplified by the
right-wing media, protesters showed up outside my home, fueled by
misinformation and attacks directed at me and my work.

clean_body: In case you missed this, Donald Trump is now calling for the 2020 presidential election to be "permanently wiped from the books.” If you can believe it, he’s still not letting this go. But the truth is, this is part of his continued effort to undermine faith in our elections and rewrite the outcome when it doesn’t go his way. As Secretary of State, I’ve seen firsthand what happens when these kinds of lies take hold. After 2020, when false claims were being spread and amplified by the right-wing media, protesters showed up outside my home, fueled by misinformation and attacks directed at me and my work. I stood my ground because defending the truth and defending our elections was my job. And it’s what I’ll continue to do as governor of Michigan. Now, it’s more important than ever that we elect a governor who will stand up for our democracy and protect the integrity of our elections, no matter who’s in the White House. name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Democracy is built from the ground up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
clean_body: | | | ** Peter, In her seminal work, Hannah Arendt wrote, “The ideal subject of totalitarian rule is not the convinced Nazi or the dedicated communist, but people for whom the distinction between fact and fiction, true and false, no longer exists.” Today, our local institutions are the front lines in the battle for truth and stability. From school boards to state legislatures, the foundations of our democracy are being tested, reshaped, and defended in the very communities where they were built. That's where Local Democracy Project comes in. We know that 96% of the over 500,000 elected officials in the U.S. serve at the local level. These are the leaders who manage our elections, set educational standards, and protect our civil liberties. Yet, nearly 70% of local races go uncontested or underfunded. are working to change that by recruiting and training a new generation of candidates committed to facts and the rule of law. Your support allows us to provide the essential tools, data, and mentorship these leaders need to defend our democracy from the ground up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Together, we can ensure that local democracy remains a sanctuary for facts. With gratitude, The Local Democracy Project Team supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: As America turns 250, we must honor them while we can
body:
A historic National Memorial Day Parade| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=48feeb18455341a1987ffcc8819f6ef4&_e=I3sHwMa8Yl9W8VR38jrCzXCCxOGZjfu4YsT7WdQMWq_RWO5PA4Dc24MDxUwaQvD28K59iwfb_icwzC4qf_Xkv9X_RzfgbNiQuPPng01YHoqTHiqj_QFTtUkOWm4uSGDwlW0wMGSsWZuJO3m2xavriNqoP5yeEUKP7XP2UmFaxTwVPTIdBk9x0DVZQw4dAIkMcmfiKKWzEmj3--fCBAV5-nqvTOWO63MRheHafg-tJ1jEQQZYx7ooF7JrE2biJpbQg1I-p2yGhQ_JjYgujVsngnwTdkPKEXj-e5VXKt7nwxTMn_oyQBaC7769blUjNop7UpMz3Mydzc_j3si94HH19xM5iFDhIwrK0v71PqLYKsBAItQ-DI9Zrdhnu3qJTymiAORyom6QufAHBnM-1xft_W4G7xBjlA3rwI4WjLd-U7G4CJBYv2KbghuOWlBUfaiqAWP55kcRPt3QgZaImONQeoFuwyir6AXnnLP6Q1tQ2ekxn-v8_S5btZG4CXjZnPT4huv5EpwGlqGSUk9BGKFDQ8xDOeX5T6a2RqpOmMZOq285GDaDt_eupcjJmDB0qoYZapcj99PC-Z9mXiqq4-eeu7dnCIUEhtOvtMSGLliooPBfRui8wOv0LwumbHBCbLtTaiXMb228wUCcp8JjPmdG06oHLqWJaqgN0leb1NHAKihrw-yZyRFRZrBposKUrDLD)
---
Patriot,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=48feeb18455341a1987ffcc8819f6ef4&_e=I3sHwMa8Yl9W8VR38jrCzXCCxOGZjfu4YsT7WdQMWq_RWO5PA4Dc24MDxUwaQvD28K59iwfb_icwzC4qf_Xkv9X_RzfgbNiQuPPng01YHoqTHiqj_QFTtUkOWm4uSGDwlW0wMGSsWZuJO3m2xavriNqoP5yeEUKP7XP2UmFaxTwVPTIdBk9x0DVZQw4dAIkMcmfiKKWzEmj3--fCBAV5-nqvTOWO63MRheHafg-tJ1jEQQZYx7ooF7JrE2biJpbQxiVh4mkmQ0kErotmFxjKgWzvS5-nmJpMAk9RcyFj_jAhztHFJv1fRQ0eZlieOfSBFjLA4H8ioCJA_XA64C5XI6muxheZTSm94O1JIfUfH7FNOSFuCOasNnGA41N4-psOq3w761TCqr-xpHCNjC1s4GNPip2kUFfjmR6S0Mh4vYzy16XeGOLf-HKoQkCAYmlSWlLXKAWgffPxcsyXGyP3NdK67DLTKW12GHvbOmyP0ZX3o9KYFI_bQTCrSjD9Y2hQr5S7Z9uKjAfVBYr9ys_GFU4sDn8lY-oTqDwKTZUkP00w7Were4ey_vYONHj4Fl1eS4DBheABOqVl28bErjeZR_jPPq0e2IEm8VN8hCj535G3OG-kuMqusdNALr0McB-a3r0vH7HMEBThdaqfKf1xXI1fyIyC8Ssto76RG3Phru68b21Fg76iEYzpdJEHJbzw)

Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=48feeb18455341a1987ffcc8819f6ef4&_e=I3sHwMa8Yl9W8VR38jrCzXCCxOGZjfu4YsT7WdQMWq_RWO5PA4Dc24MDxUwaQvD28K59iwfb_icwzC4qf_Xkv9X_RzfgbNiQuPPng01YHoqTHiqj_QFTtUkOWm4uSGDwlW0wMGSsWZuJO3m2xavriNqoP5yeEUKP7XP2UmFaxTwVPTIdBk9x0DVZQw4dAIkMcmfiKKWzEmj3--fCBAV5-nqvTOWO63MRheHafg-tJ1jEQQZYx7ooF7JrE2biJpbQy7psGzfBQYC7u1n0JO-TYPZoOvhjV7nqxaElE_4jQrGgWwSBSdWDTRiZTaG2FgVvJb0vo8CvvafDuFp_Wa-sU97DlIrdyldCf8dVDNfN2IbGcumaE6N8LaBSFWRUqBPP-iPtyUskrThrJedbjffP8CEHQpk-hgtjV2Z3x3vKu_yoaq5VkVRAHf0KrG6-U4fmJUbeIevOYN91IrJh2aifIYN6yeutNayTcSjnD0lnsczNTgWuedz1nFNSb57gC60NKIrKRYKjX8iNdg9xzK63E5OmRN6j141cAuqNTGTviLMes22KGBSTkIEh7WQ_6-5h8ydWJEKbDk30y349ufHBiR1YZxr5G6nQHIZ2lOMDNY_osKTZ5NmUhPX7WO0cLRBWF2YJeWiWVs51hJSXfydmjYqvlGJE_IeFoFMF7fXR5cyykeO21vfDNLSiaIgEw7A7)**

| | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---

On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America’s 250****th****birthday.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=48feeb18455341a1987ffcc8819f6ef4&_e=I3sHwMa8Yl9W8VR38jrCzXCCxOGZjfu4YsT7WdQMWq_RWO5PA4Dc24MDxUwaQvD28K59iwfb_icwzC4qf_Xkv9X_RzfgbNiQuPPng01YHoqTHiqj_QFTtUkOWm4uSGDwlW0wMGSsWZuJO3m2xavriNqoP5yeEUKP7XP2UmFaxTwVPTIdBk9x0DVZQw4dAIkMcmfiKKWzEmj3--fCBAV5-nqvTOWO63MRheHafg-tJ1jEQQZYx7ooF7JrE2biJpbQuOb6q_8VXRC6FlXYLWUW74IoSvsZNgX0GvQA0N7DEj5oUJ-sZJrQKOqm4cFWxVfyZXhVC164bn7cVmFLl5SdgKpxKxbtwtXCFDJAnOSJbA69bAMl_gPYlHSP9BFO7LH-X0b-e0hxc3wrsW5pXnModAn2F0mZ2PYFSDWvGDizQEITSxatJyBW52GEv13nHTzdD23PTP_KjUpEo9fT-ahnIAV3khTSNSBR-BXw9O42du6XGL3D7HF0t_kQq7S5za5XCbM7_aByczHH6mzHjjZmWc9voBrF6rvW25J9joMHBa-lv5Fx434yllzKdGVXeu-ylKeA8xA7u3jyEOzub1u-dM20_h14NJiQ5Pwaoj12aQOVMy5N1nax0ORSXJEJksThvM8cFRVHX6aWhyTgQzDTw8N1Gfz4pSWwsLYws_R81CE3dRi-38M64rB0vRcUIcyW)

And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. clean_body: A historic National Memorial Day Parade| | | Patriot, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade P.S. Patriot, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

The Supreme Court just gutted the Voting Rights Act:
The Supreme Court is making it harder to stop discriminatory maps, harder to protect voters, harder to keep the promise that every eligible voter gets a say.
Republicans want us discouraged and exhausted. They want us to believe there’s nothing we can do to fight back.
But while we don’t control the Supreme Court, **we do control how we use the time left to us to overcome this attack on our country.**

We’ll stay on offense to reach every eligible voter we can. No county too blue or too red.

| | | Peter , Democrats need to flip **_4 seats_** to end our Senate Majority. _Well, it pains me to share this headline with you, but I need you to see it all the same:_
---
**_The Hill:_ "Cook Political Report shifts 4 Senate races toward Democrats."**
---

## **We will dethrone the mainstream media, but we need your help!**
**Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cAxy6DpLIojrfy4zv5XRME3Zj3eVaFIkTtvR1cK-zE0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=196234487)
* * *
In the aftermath of the attempted assassination on Trump and members of his administration at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, there has been online chatter from the Left on whether it was "staged."
The suspect, Cole Allen, is accused of running past a security checkpoint with a shotgun and handgun in order to gain access to the room Trump was in. According to the manifesto he published moments before his foiled attack, Allen allegedly wrote, "Turning the other cheek is for when you yourself are oppressed. I'm not the person raped in a detention camp. I'm not the fisherman executed without trial."
Allen added the reason why he decided to do this attack was because no one else was stepping up to stop Trump. He further mocked how light security at the hotel appeared despite Trump's announced arrival to the venue.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bdabbac2-25b4-48f2-ad00-d29c25692840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
All the protesters I spoke to said they, at a minimum, have doubts about what federal officials have said about the shocking incident. One protester said she believes the assassination attempt at Butler was staged. Another said the WHCD suspect "did not seem crazy to me...he seemed pushed over the edge, in terms of what is happening to our country."
"It seems like Hollywood fluff," the last interviewee told me.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [One Shark Missed Billions... Another Saw This Coming](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imagine turning down Uber at a valuation of **$10 million,** only to watch it go public at over **$80 billion**.
That's exactly what happened to Mark Cuban... a 799,900% return, gone.
But original _Shark Tank_ investor Kevin Harrington built his career doing the opposite: spotting asymmetric opportunities before they go mainstream.
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode Mobile is **[turning smartphones into income streams.](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
They were named the **#1 fastest-growing software company** by Deloitte and have already helped their users earn and save over $1B.
Kevin Harrington invested early.
And at just $0.50/share, you can still get in before their potential IPO.
**[Secure shares at $0.50 while the pre-IPO window is still open.](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a80848f0-0208-4519-a88a-82e39843f4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Disclosures
###### _Potential Uber return for Marc Cuban does not take into account dilution._
###### _The Deloitte rankings are based on submitted applications and public company database research, with winners selected based on their fiscal-year revenue growth percentage over a three-year period in 2023._
###### _Please read the offering circular at invest.modemobile.com. This is a paid advertisement for Mode Mobile 's Regulation A Offering._
* * *
_**(Piece contonies)**_
While more information about the incident will be released, I am confident it will further confirm Allen was a Leftist who was truly trying to kill Trump and members of his administration.
Allen was part of a leftist group and had attended a "No Kings" protest recently. One of the interviewees admitted that many people on the Left have become enraged over Trump's policies and "hate," but she went on to blame Trump for other people's actions.
Having reported on many anti-Trump protests since 2016, I can attest the rhetoric and vitriol have significantly increased as time has gone on. Liberals thought they were done with Trump and he was on his way to federal prison after the 2020 election. Instead, he's back in the White House.
We are in dangerous times. While things may seem calmer for now, remember the huge outbreak of leftist violence during Trump's first term did not take place until his last full year in office.

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: As America turns 250, we must honor them while we can
body:
I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little mor

| | |
---
Friend,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbGOGyEQhp-G7WzBwO7aBUUka7tLEUVKicbDYKMD1gHWp7x9tBeXaa6d_59v9Gl-vbk3jCmW23fMbGsPrjaHDTPXSNi3WhqM8oPz1vp9dSBhOsjxIGHvqcFbTx4VDWzVPM-zmSZjhruV-jya00QAZ7xqo07gSV_BkOQwBjgN0e4oOUpQJy0NHOVVzSGE0QMEkETCSExc-7HyY7umSFg6tvewVuIjrXlI9t77own9TcAiYGlMW-UjFvZr3xsClpdGOTy5c8XSDsSlc92jJ33auBvWPy5zXmvEJPTS1q0SO1o9C3358XNRUo3qLGDaenaZfdyy0BfOGNNr-G9F6Msdq8f27pB-vyLC_MB4K0Jf_n9xqNY_PmJKsU2zMPK2cz8F-9ff8bTwNwAA__-QQpth)
---
Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.
