clean_body: I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little mor | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade P.S. Friend, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Resistance Lab via Team Jayapal
subject: Can you join us tomorrow to commemorate one year of the Resistance Lab?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
So far more than 30,000 people from all 50 states (and even other countries!) have joined a training.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260502-6205-footer&t=1&akid=6205%2E420207%2EX3Y7pZ)
Peter,
**The next Resistance Lab is tomorrow at 11am PT / 2pm PT, and we’d love for you to join us as we commemorate one year of doing this work together!**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53411?utm_source=em20260502-6205&t=2&akid=6205%2E420207%2EX3Y7pZ)
**[RSVP Now](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53411?utm_source=em20260502-6205&t=3&akid=6205%2E420207%2EX3Y7pZ)**
The session takes a refreshed approach to our original base training, looking at how nonviolent movements around the world have responded to leaders seizing power and the most effective tools and tactics to fight back. It offers frameworks to understand this moment at home, and incorporates interactive conversation with others to help create community and build our resistance movement.
You’ll also get the chance to connect with a growing community of people who are just as determined to fight for our communities and our democracy as you are.
**Whether you’ve attended a session before and you’re ready to take the next step, or even if you’re brand new to the movement, this training is for you —[so join us tomorrow and let’s train, organize, and get ready to resist together!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53411?utm_source=em20260502-6205&t=4&akid=6205%2E420207%2EX3Y7pZ)**
We hope to see you there!
— Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260502-6205-footer&t=5&refcode2=6205_420207_X3Y7pZ&akid=6205%2E420207%2EX3Y7pZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: last chance to confirm your viewership - Fight for Reform
subject: are you ABANDONING Rachel Maddow????
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. name: Tina Shah
subject: please
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This could make the difference in taking back the House

I had to reach out. Control of the House could come down to a few races across the country — and New Jersey’s 7th District is one of them. Republicans know how high the stakes are, and we’re already seeing them line up behind Tom Kean Jr. to keep this seat in their column. But here’s the truth: Tom Kean Jr. doesn’t fight for working families in New Jersey — he votes how far-right Republicans and Donald Trump tell him to. That’s _not_ how the government is supposed to work — **I believe politics should be about people.** **_[I became a doctor because I wanted to help others, and now I’m running for Congress because I know our country needs leaders who will stand up for everyday Americans, not just the powerful few. That’s why I need to ask: Can you split a donation between Sharice Davids and this campaign today to help us flip NJ-07 and bring politics back to the people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130633141/618396490/1979347804?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_050226_shah_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjJhNjU3Yi01NjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fU1rSmDY0G4T2-BhVEwbOP7NgnXa_MDgpEMg7voiPA=)_** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130633142/618396491/1979347804?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_050226_shah_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjJhNjU3Yi01NjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fU1rSmDY0G4T2-BhVEwbOP7NgnXa_MDgpEMg7voiPA=)
---
If we win here, we’re one step closer to taking back the House — and building a government that listens to hardworking families, not party bosses. **But to win, it’s going to take all of us.**
Because at the end of the day, this campaign isn’t about me. It’s about building a future where families can afford healthcare, where jobs pay a livable wage, and where Washington finally reflects the voices of the people it's meant to serve.
**_[That future is within reach, but only if we fight for it together. Will you split a donation between Sharice Davids and this campaign to help us deliver the kind of leadership New Jersey families deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130633143/618396492/1979347804?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_050226_shah_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjJhNjU3Yi01NjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fU1rSmDY0G4T2-BhVEwbOP7NgnXa_MDgpEMg7voiPA=)_**

name: Andrew Friedson
subject: Thank you
body:
People believe in what we’re building together. A campaign focused on affordability, responsible leadership, and delivering results. A vision for a county that works for everyone.

| Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

Over the past few weeks, I have seen something special happening across Montgomery County.

More and more people are stepping up. Speaking out. Joining our growing coalition. And my heart could not be more full.

People believe in what we’re building together. A campaign focused on affordability, responsible leadership, and delivering results. A vision for a county that works for everyone.

That kind of support means everything to me. I will take that any day over outside spending and Super PACs.

Because this campaign is powered by people like you.

Thank you for standing with me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130633203/618396614/-1721553747?refcode=BLU_EM_AFMC_2026-05-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjgyZjBjMi01NjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bxbq03j77Y0JVSTPMM_jN-SgMgLOMJuKp13sCdqmQEM=)
---
[_**P.S. Our next reporting deadline is May 12th, and what we raise now will show the strength of this campaign**_**._If you are able, I would be grateful if you chipped in to help us keep this momentum going_.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130633204/618396615/-1721553747?refcode=BLU_EM_AFMC_2026-05-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjgyZjBjMi01NjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bxbq03j77Y0JVSTPMM_jN-SgMgLOMJuKp13sCdqmQEM=)

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: As America turns 250, we must honor them while we can
body:

Patriot,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---

Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8f846a910b91473bb91b8410c247076e&_e=wIPqtrEllA3lngw-yZPJQmZBK0lvwmMNTs5T5SvWXZ_pZgKoAYvhg07SKPWmG_BPRmR6M1icjLXRrOa4OYOcbeXg3g_cTatNX4vINfAbZM3-nQlDWcYtjVyG4P15MJWIxWURA6pk6iGdQBtpY0chnu5Oqo5kCZfvnR2ruLk1CaUYQZuLcFbJQYwqICS2hevf2vB5bpYwvgpAWXQDqNoQ4IJz9VaubexZbbw7oMW9MhEAGE71foTiIwz4kL3BeH7T_r6_HbfukfJqB144Vkm5HXm2r9bLQPnGyzPwDgy3ebfzp_5LElijXoqOp-VzwN3EBUKz5ukwRIVCaY42UeJda9kGthbNhCoxoZaJ_k46Xb_n93TXQ6OI5E6zOuxWjXWHRlMaJ_FRY1hBSdK9nWbGEZNiHkThvuklIxkoEqWDo-wSH5o6dsrGUdn05n3-YuNd_j_jLkGnOmUJRQpcIL2d8kNUYLYgavvws4Xrb1_ZeAbbCQOPH5cuPUS49DaZwzb86IhDJoJoa3mQ7lqoKuM-k4vh_cWykxaWfQsafHNLaDiZHlsUPcXGyFdAGe3_XksSzTv4dSBXsoVb3R9iEvs4Iy_gWsnRzKwAG3nQoD1NTCia5h0OGjaAGZGIXT3iNu8jNMd68lE1vpfNDhsEPsSTJbMuxvfFc-mzo_KR7xsrHSsuEGybS02L9J5XMMyZuf4yyt3wI2rUR3IwrIj5mBD--g%3D%3D)**

Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded ****_entirely_**** by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** **[Patriot, as we look ahead to this historic event, can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8f846a910b91473bb91b8410c247076e&_e=wIPqtrEllA3lngw-yZPJQmZBK0lvwmMNTs5T5SvWXZ_pZgKoAYvhg07SKPWmG_BPRmR6M1icjLXRrOa4OYOcbeXg3g_cTatNX4vINfAbZM3-nQlDWcYtjVyG4P15MJWIxWURA6pk6iGdQBtpY0chnu5Oqo5kCZfvnR2ruLk1CaUYQZuLcFbJQYwqICS2hevf2vB5bpYwvgpAWXQDqNoQ4IJz9VaubexZbbw7oMW9MhEAGE71foTiIwz4kL3BeH7TWYj0_6HLx-W7a9ExFQHSxC95M2e-H8zkVVEuxyUlm-HEzrdZJIAv5CCShq7Ih10yMJdDuXlutYXkufH1mBL-sKj69iN9CVlrJW4iJChRldPhp2RwWjWlndxNx4-tWeEhuQ1oYjDBJW_-8Q_qgqpP4GeTWChaaPd71epQjU2A0NA_tmv8CsfUswTm-gMlQU9aMSbjiSd0zmiMdrt4PUSvA8zHTX4PORoL9s7vBVm4Mz90JSEn5JRFSX3AGTEr8bsOQb23fPb5_Hf7N5Y-W18ADUh3qAMKus6Qf6pOFp86cLDgd-T_LIFT9iOiBRKqqsLJJd0ZhSQ_y0gl97gVUFi7LCKQLenaxehXII1cE83S3jVqW55ZtMZOwIeNvYmktQu1Jpzg8Q6U25pyAFiL6VTB5y61YbwtZDOUWP9olVkYsdFFcBv-ZygXuGzrwcZyj1fF1BgmhELzDUfiOljjLlrjzg%3D%3D)[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8f846a910b91473bb91b8410c247076e&_e=wIPqtrEllA3lngw-yZPJQmZBK0lvwmMNTs5T5SvWXZ_pZgKoAYvhg07SKPWmG_BPRmR6M1icjLXRrOa4OYOcbeXg3g_cTatNX4vINfAbZM3-nQlDWcYtjVyG4P15MJWIxWURA6pk6iGdQBtpY0chnu5Oqo5kCZfvnR2ruLk1CaUYQZuLcFbJQYwqICS2hevf2vB5bpYwvgpAWXQDqNoQ4IJz9VaubexZbbw7oMW9MhEAGE71foTiIwz4kL3BeH7TLcE8T6MVVEcXh4-PJnFgbvEbET1WUYDJfV6pZzqxL52vk9Ot8iZGhs9dDcdSe6ZhqUhWqJvJD0K-JCb_aI857E8roR-fyPzMw5bOEZcouoxKRoqZNhba-un3YpamW7wzzwKV4lvt3vfC0R3r4Uv2syp2SO64S32xMw9sWDyG4J4Wyzwi0EVLT939hZDb0YuegaiFnqBUaoyXkYbVnhR-xDxOePovWNkhZqTReK9-WFbLbDTxCC2l69g0NBrKflvS8wz1LUxeQrXwGw9AiU8TfBB0EAz3zL42RucT3xkateo8M0Hjj-if8okYCY1dnrNMyc3TfABdyGpWCYjXmglVAx9O1CFZFbxpZG6yAkqTWjE26_lqA4ywiIYytjQZG-wsPQy-K9xc2sfLQdQmKC2KiHw2Xvfk3toljjwlc-vjy7XhoSnwh26Flbl7CtREuOksn2m5U9cYW2D4GxvBKrXQGQ%3D%3D)**

| | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. clean_body: The biggest National Memorial Day Parade yet | | | Patriot, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade P.S. Patriot, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

The MAGA-occupied Supreme Court issued a devastating ruling to gut the legislation that ended Jim Crow, the Voting Rights Act — the key federal protection that guaranteed minority representation in redistricting.
Louisiana's 6th Congressional District, currently represented by Democrat Cleo Fields, was at the heart of this case. MAGA challenged the constitutionality of this majority-Black district and won, setting the stage for MAGA to wipe 25+ majority-Black districts off the map nationwide.
Louisiana Republicans, empowered by this ruling, are now suspending our upcoming May 16th elections:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-louisianadems [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-louisianadems]
Using the greenlight given to them by SCOTUS, Louisiana Republicans are suspending the election to accelerate the timeline for a Jim Crow redistrict of our state before Democrats can mount a defense. They will then hold a new election using the racist new maps.
It’s a racist power grab that will drag our state back to the darkest days of segregation.
Early voting is already underway for the May 16th election. Ballots have been printed. Votes have been cast. Suspending this election means confusing voters, invalidating votes, reprinting new ballots, and sending 64 parishes into chaos—all to rush through a map that strips Black voters of their representation.
Earlier this year, a Louisiana Democrat won by a landslide in a deep red Trump +13 district. The signs are becoming increasingly clear that a Democratic blue wave is coming to even deep red Louisiana. This is a last ditch attempt to ensure MAGA does not lose Louisiana.
If they succeed with suspending our election to stop our blue wave they lay the groundwork for suspending the upcoming 2026 midterms to prevent a blue wave nationally.

| **SIGN ACROSS OREGON THIS WEEKEND!**
**Let's tell Tina NO MORE TAXES!!!**
**_NO TAX CLAWBACK_ : **Oregon Senate Bill 1507 **disconnects** from federal tax breaks, forcing taxpayers to **add back taxes**. This Referendum seeks to reverse Oregon taxation on several items of Senate Bill 1507 and to follow the Federal Tax breaks. **Oregon needs this referendum in order to follow the Federal Tax Code allowing Oregonians to keep more of their hard-earned money**.
**_VOTE BEFORE TOLLS :_** Amends Constitution: Prohibits “highway” (defined) fees/tolls after December 31, 2017, unless voters in nearby counties approve
** _END the DEATH TAX_ :** Nullifies Estate Tax which applies to estates of $1million dollars or more. Prohibits similar local taxes.
**_CRIME FIGHTING ACT_ :** Limits pretrial release for persons charged with Felonies/Class A Misdemeanors, increases state incarceration costs.
**_LET US PADDLE_** **:** Repeals the Oregon Law which requires Waterway Access Permits to operate certain nonmotorized boats and sailboats.
**_END VOTE BY MAIL_ :** Amends the Oregon Constitution - Prohibits vote-by-mail elections; Registration requires “proof of Citizenship”; Voting REQUIRES “”VALID” Photo Identification. ** _REPEAL FIREARM_ :** Repeals firearm permit requirement, magazine capacity limitations; firearm- regulation authority purportedly limited to ballot measures

| **2026 National Day of Prayer, Thursday, May 7 th****
****The National Day of Prayer has a long history****and became****public law on May 5, 1988.****The law****states:** **_The President shall set aside and proclaim the First Thursday in May in each year, as a National Day of Prayer, on which the people of the United States may turn to God in prayer and meditation at churches, in groups, and as individuals._********Find information from the National Day of Prayer Task Force at:** **[https://www.nationaldayofprayer.org/](https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/Click?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0ErQaRfS2kE6X47Ex0DuMWACWzW6jMlw9AnojbN4mP-QSZ2k4jb3rOXU5FPCKHrES4aL1Zocl2ClwiBzoZxAtkNVgnOIg85SyebA0o8avuUgEzLXzgdG_2S311pxcsSBUM1&target=05e1f144-c24e-4230-9a2b-87c70f0862e0)** **** **Sunday, May 17 th – Additional Day of Prayer****President Donald J. Trump revealed plans for a national gathering centered on prayer. As he explained:** **_“On May 17, 2026, we are inviting Americans from all across the country to come together on our National Mall to pray, to give thanks, and to rededicate America as one nation under God.”_********The event, called the National Jubilee of Prayer, Praise, and Thanksgiving, is envisioned as a day of worship, reflection, and communal prayer. Organizers anticipate participants from every state gathering in Washington to give thanks for 250 years of providential history and to pray for the years ahead.****
****In Jackson County, while Americans unite on the** **National Mall to pray, give thanks, and rededicate our nation as “one nation under God” some are planning to gather at the City Court House.**

clean_body: thought my last message would've worked, but I guess not. I thought more people would step up to help a couple of America First veterans, but I guess not. Commander Zinke here, and I may be retiring, but I'm not going quietly into the night. The SEALs taught me to always assemble the most effective, lethal team possible. I had the honor of training and leading American heroes like Rob O'Neill, the Luttrells, and Chris Kyle. Now, I've recruited the finest once again. My friend and fellow combat veteran, Aaron Flint is battle-tested and ready to take on the radical left. Aaron is MAGA A.F.- and he has my complete and total support in this race. If we don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will take advantage of this major pickup opportunity and start flooding even MORE cash into this race. And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Peter. After 23 years in the Navy SEALS, 2 years in Trump's cabinet, and 4 terms in Congress, I know who the right man for the job is. Which is why I'm backing friend Aaron Flint- a combat veteran, family man, and TRUE America First patriot. wore the uniform for 20+ years - deployments in Iraq and Afghanistan - and now spreads the TRUTH across Montana's airwaves. He tells Montanans what the fake news media won't, holds the left accountable, and gives conservatives a mic when the left silences us. I know a true America First warrior when I see one. I was in Trump's first cabinet. I took the incoming and remember who was and was not with us. Aaron was ALWAYS with us 100%. He's in this race because he knows what's at stake and what will happen to this country if we lose and the left wins. Aaron is 100% Montana tough, 100% America First, 100% pro-Trump, and 110% bought into the mission. But running for Congress with Socialist Democrats breathing down his neck will be his toughest challenge yet, and he can't get there without our support. humbly asking- will you help me keep this seat red? Peter — New York City is a union town. It’s the heartbeat of our streets, our schools, and our transit. That is why I am so deeply honored to share that **I have officially received the endorsement of District Counsel 37 AFSCME for re-election in NY-10.** With over 150,000 members and 89,000 retirees, DC 37 is the city’s largest labor union. These are the workers who keep New York up and running every single day. I am beyond proud to stand with them, and I will always fight for the dignity and rights of every working New Yorker. **[But while our campaign stands up for organized labor, we cannot ignore the reality of what we are up against in Washington. name: Haley Stevens
subject: I’m furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
The Supreme Court's latest decision is a huge blow to voting rights.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZuwqdyT79COsPiW1obFGcVeLks0lpfgboYPUdx4qxmU?) for more
---
# [I'm furious](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=196042586&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MDQyNTg2LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc3NDg4NzcsImV4cCI6MTc4MDM0MDg3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EeGWj-naQZy75pEBtB2-NZT81ublyYtPA4uasJ9Wf8Q)
### The Supreme Court's latest decision is a huge blow to voting rights.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| May 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL2ltLWZ1cmlvdXM_.zakowDvuhCMBMJV3KuyxE6xtMxaYZRyamGVbpyE84D4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/im-furious?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I wish I were writing about something else today.
But we _need_ to talk about the Supreme Court.
**This week, SCOTUS dealt a major blow to the Voting Rights Act - one of the most important civil rights laws in our country's history.**
The Court struck down Louisiana's congressional map and adopted a tougher standard for future voting-rights challenges, basically greenlighting the GOP's effort to gerrymander its way to power.
Justice Kagan warned in dissent that the ruling would destroy "racial equality in electoral opportunity."
**[Let me say this plainly: This is a sad moment for voting rights and our democracy.](https://substack.com/redirect/a72b9f3f-c32e-4599-8791-b79212d20465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
And it is a dangerous one.
_The New York Times_ reported that "at least one outcome is clear: The decision will improve Republicans' fortunes ahead of the midterm elections." They also reported the decision could allow Republican legislatures to eliminate around a dozen majority-minority House seats currently held by Democrats across the South.
**That is not some abstract legal debate. That is a direct warning about who gets represented, which communities get heard, and whether our democracy is going to keep moving backward.**
It matters because we have seen this game plan before: Chip away at voting rights from every angle. Shrink access. Redraw the maps. Change the rules to benefit the people already in power.
That is not an accident, friends.
This comes after Trump's SAVE Act. After Republican efforts to make vote-by-mail harder. After more and more talk from MAGA folks about policing who gets to vote and how.
Today's ruling fits into that same bigger pattern: Instead of building a government that actually works for people - and persuading voters to support them - too many Republicans would rather simply change the rules of the game.
**I take that personally. Because I believe deep in my soul that America belongs to its people. And EVERY eligible citizen gets a vote.**
The senior who votes by mail. The shift worker who gets off late. The young person voting for the first time. The mom juggling work and child care. The voters who have spent generations fighting just to be represented fairly.
That is who the Voting Rights Act was supposed to protect.
And when the Court weakens those protections, it is not just changing policy. It is telling whole communities that their voice matters a little less than it did yesterday.
**That kind of bull honkey makes me furious.**
Because I believe every eligible American deserves the freedom to vote and the confidence that their vote will count. I believe we should be making it easier for people to participate in our democracy - not harder.
And I believe we have to meet moments like this with moral clarity.
Because if we start treating decisions like this as normal, then we start accepting a politics where politicians choose their voters instead of voters choosing who represents them.
**That is not democracy.[That is just a bunch of powerful people doing whatever they want and disregarding the rest of us.](https://substack.com/redirect/a72b9f3f-c32e-4599-8791-b79212d20465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
That is not what this country is supposed to be.
That's why I'm fighting back. And why I'll never stop.
More soon.
With grit,
Haley

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?

clean_body: The Supreme Court's latest decision is a huge blow to voting rights. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The Supreme Court's latest decision is a huge blow to voting rights. | | | May 2 | | | | | | I wish I were writing about something else today. But we need to talk about the Supreme Court. This week, SCOTUS dealt a major blow to the Voting Rights Act - one of the most important civil rights laws in our country's history. The Court struck down Louisiana's congressional map and adopted a tougher standard for future voting-rights challenges, basically greenlighting the GOP's effort to gerrymander its way to power. Justice Kagan warned in dissent that the ruling would destroy "racial equality in electoral opportunity." And it is a dangerous one. The New York Times reported that "at least one outcome is clear: The decision will improve Republicans' fortunes ahead of the midterm elections." They also reported the decision could allow Republican legislatures to eliminate around a dozen majority-minority House seats currently held by Democrats across the South. That is not some abstract legal debate. That is a direct warning about who gets represented, which communities get heard, and whether our democracy is going to keep moving backward. It matters because we have seen this game plan before: Chip away at voting rights from every angle. Shrink access. Redraw the maps. Change the rules to benefit the people already in power. That is not an accident, friends. This comes after Trump's SAVE Act. After Republican efforts to make vote-by-mail harder. After more and more talk from MAGA folks about policing who gets to vote and how. Today's ruling fits into that same bigger pattern: Instead of building a government that actually works for people - and persuading voters to support them - too many Republicans would rather simply change the rules of the game. I take that personally. Because I believe deep in my soul that America belongs to its people. And EVERY eligible citizen gets a vote. The senior who votes by mail. The shift worker who gets off late. The young person voting for the first time. The mom juggling work and child care. The voters who have spent generations fighting just to be represented fairly. That is who the Voting Rights Act was supposed to protect. And when the Court weakens those protections, it is not just changing policy. It is telling whole communities that their voice matters a little less than it did yesterday. That kind of bull honkey makes me furious. Because I believe every eligible American deserves the freedom to vote and the confidence that their vote will count. I believe we should be making it easier for people to participate in our democracy - not harder. And I believe we have to meet moments like this with moral clarity. Because if we start treating decisions like this as normal, then we start accepting a politics where politicians choose their voters instead of voters choosing who represents them. That is not democracy. That is not what this country is supposed to be. That's why I'm fighting back. And why I'll never stop. More soon. With grit, Haley A personal note from Haley 👋 I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love. But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican. I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win. If you're with me, will you chip in today? Donald Trump wants to promote himself by putting his signature on the dollar bill.
You you won’t believe this.

**Donald Trump is putting his signature on the dollar bill.** This is an outrageous vanity project.

Trump wants to slap his name on buildings and airports, and plaster his photo on the passport. Now, the dollar bill? He’s busy using the presidency for vanity, while the middle class suffers from his awful leadership.

[**_So, I introduced new legislation to stop President Trump’s absurd practice of putting his face and name all over government property – the HUMBLE Presidents Act. I need to show widespread support for this critical bill in the next 24 hours. clean_body: Donald Trump wants to promote himself by putting his signature on the dollar bill. You you won’t believe this. Donald Trump is putting his signature on the dollar bill. This is an outrageous vanity project. Trump wants to slap his name on buildings and airports, and plaster his photo on the passport. Now, the dollar bill? He’s busy using the presidency for vanity, while the middle class suffers from his awful leadership. | | Donald Trump is using his power and position to push yet another vanity project. Instead of focusing his attention on the issues that actually impact American families – like protecting Medicare, strengthening our education system, lowering costs – he’s trying to stamp his name on the dollar. These vanity acts are the mark of someone who thinks he’s a king. I’ve introduced the HUMBLE Presidents Act to show him that he’s not. We can pass this bill, but it would greatly help if I had the backing of countless folks who agree that enough is enough. | Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

| | I have long been committed to supporting care for our seniors and to strengthening Social Security and Medicare. Tens of thousands of seniors in Northwest Washington depend on Medicare as their only source of health coverage. I believe Medicare beneficiaries deserve the best treatments possible. In Congress, I helped pass landmark legislation to lower the costs of healthcare and prescription drugs for working families and seniors, allowing Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices and capping out-of-pocket drug costs for seniors. **I am proud to be endorsed by the National Committee to Preserve Social Security and Medicare (NCPSSM).** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130634555/618401557/1596212816?refcode=2026-05-02-endorsement&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e03563b-5b46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTAzNTYzYi01YjQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaDGFB9pkXoQ0pm1Xelo_pdtkt45sWv7jMta6F3y8aY=) Here is their mission statement: _"The mission of the National Committee to Preserve Social Security and Medicare, a membership organization, is to protect, preserve, promote, and ensure the financial security, health, and the well being of current and future generations of maturing Americans."_ I am proud to earn the endorsement of an organization that understands just how important Social Security and Medicare are to so many Americans. **I will continue to strengthen Medicare, protect Social Security, support our seniors, and lower costs for working families.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

name: Team Abdul
subject: When people hear our message, they're with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/1219?t=1001&akid=2098%2E251025%2EplCL_E ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/1219?t=1002&akid=2098%2E251025%2EplCL_E ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Our biggest challenge isn't convincing people. It's getting in front of
them. Let us explain.

When Michiganders hear about Abdul’s record of fighting for working
people, they're with us more than anyone else in the primary race:

[ Favorability ]Favorability Poll - El-Sayed: 45%, McMorrow: 42%, Stevens: 35%

So we know our message resonates with voters — but getting that message in
front of millions of voters across Michigan isn't cheap.

Organizing town halls, buying supplies for our volunteers, and running
digital ads all require resources.

clean_body: This is the math the Left fears | | | Fellow Patriot, There's something the Left never thought they'd have to say out loud: They 're losing the numbers game. And now they're fundraising in a panic because of it: Above: The Left is sending fundraising texts that name-drop Turning Point to scare their donors. In their own words, they're warning supporters about a "hyper‐partisan voter registration machine." They even asked: " Ever heard of Turning Point?" Yes. They have. Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works. Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. That's the math. And the Left knows it's beating them. Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building. Every day, we're training new Chase the Vote patriots -- men and women who know that a yard sign won't win an election... ... but a ballot chaser will. And we're not slowing down. We're already working around the clock in Arizona. We 've expanded aggressively into Nevada and New Hampshire, and opened a permanent office in Las Vegas -- a command center to lock in victories in '26 and beyond. This is what winning early looks like. The Left sees it. And now they're rushing to respond. That's why they're scrambling. Raising money. Trying to spin up their own copycat machine. Because they know they're behind, so they're sounding the alarm NOW -- not in October. Above: Our latest "Chase the Vote" graduates who are being immediately deployed into the field. Every day, we're training more grassroots patriots to chase votes and deliver victories for our America First movement. But Fellow Patriot, here 's the choice in front of us: The Left wins when we wait. We win when we move. Doors. Ballots. Early. Often. It 's that simple. Saving America starts NOW -- not later. We have the upper hand, for now. But we can't let the radical Left claw their way back to power. So here 's my ask, Fellow Patriot: every $50 you give today helps train and deploy ONE ballot chaser into a battleground state. Charlie built this machine to move first... Friend, Right now Arizona’s elections are under direct attack. Well-funded campaigns of misinformation and coordinated legal challenges are already confusing voters and risking turnout across the state. We’re fighting back, and we’re succeeded. A state appeals court just rejected a sweeping lawsuit brought by American First Legal Foundation, founded by Trump adviser Stephen Miller. The group was trying to force several counties — including Maricopa, Yavapai, and Coconino — to overhaul key processes, like the use of ballot drop boxes, procedures that allow voters to fix — or “cure” — signature issues on mail-in ballots, and how counties verify signatures in the first place. And right now, Attorney General Mayes is suing the Trump administration, challenging his unlawful executive order to restrict mail-in voting. More than 80% of Arizona voters use vote-by-mail, including military families, rural Arizonans, and tribal members. Republicans know they’re in the minority — so they’re working to steal, bully, and buy your vote away from you.**We won’t let them.** On the ground here in Arizona, we’re already doing the work, fighting misinformation and educating voters. **But we need your support to keep fighting voter suppression efforts in all 15 counties.** [_**Can you help us fight for every Arizonan’s right to have their voice heard?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130634785/618402224/-7213939?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWIzYjA4YmYtNWQ0Ni1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqOO9BR-HuC9XW2vWRtNJPu-xr89kKkBu7TMHMO5q58=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130634786/618402225/-7213939?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260502_PM1_V1_S1&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWIzYjA4YmYtNWQ0Ni1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqOO9BR-HuC9XW2vWRtNJPu-xr89kKkBu7TMHMO5q58=)

clean_body: We won’t let them steal this election by blocking your vote. | = Friend, Right now Arizona’s elections are under direct attack. Well-funded campaigns of misinformation and coordinated legal challenges are already confusing voters and risking turnout across the state. We’re fighting back, and we’re succeeded. A state appeals court just rejected a sweeping lawsuit brought by American First Legal Foundation, founded by Trump adviser Stephen Miller. The group was trying to force several counties — including Maricopa, Yavapai, and Coconino — to overhaul key processes, like the use of ballot drop boxes, procedures that allow voters to fix — or “cure” — signature issues on mail-in ballots, and how counties verify signatures in the first place. And right now, Attorney General Mayes is suing the Trump administration, challenging his unlawful executive order to restrict mail-in voting. More than 80% of Arizona voters use vote-by-mail, including military families, rural Arizonans, and tribal members. Republicans know they’re in the minority — so they’re working to steal, bully, and buy your vote away from you.We won’t let them. On the ground here in Arizona, we’re already doing the work, fighting misinformation and educating voters. But we need your support to keep fighting voter suppression efforts in all 15 counties. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We’re in this through the last vote counted. **“Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures”**
_-Atlanta News First_

Patriot,

On Saturday night, a California man armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives charged the security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in the room.

His name is Cole Allen, a 31-year-old tutor from Torrance, California.

And before he made his move, he sent a manifesto to his own family laying out exactly what he intended to do.

**He wanted to target administration officials, starting with the President of the United States!**

Let us be clear about what just happened...

**This is the _third time_ they have tried to kill President Trump.**

And this time, the man who pulled the trigger wasn't some lone lunatic who slipped through the cracks. He had a plan, a manifesto, multiple weapons, and a hotel room on the 10th floor of the venue. He ran into that building while the President of the United States was inside!

The radical left has spent years calling President Trump every name in the book. Calling his supporters terrorists. Weaponizing the courts, the FBI, and every arm of the federal government to destroy him. Calling for resistance by any means necessary.

Well. Here is the truth:

**The Left is not going to stop. They will not accept the results of free and fair elections. They will not stop at legal warfare. Now we have seen - again - what happens when they incite enough hatred.**

This is exactly why what Turning Point PAC is doing matters so much right now.

**We are not fighting a political campaign. We are fighting for the survival of this movement.**

We are fighting to make sure that the America First movement cannot be stopped by violence, lawfare, or any other means the radical left throws at it.

[Fight for the America First Movement](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7c1ff2103cd6412e8ae96f446ee1dc4c&_e=BbI1VuLt76oFHdGsuakh0Ru5ehux5s8ypYuRuz-yeL1hLoQo9m5vTAhVd8nasmg1dcVzq26rRK_SEZ_51HflWB8BACCK437QNnlTnYmB3A-iqalWiZ4_Y0QxWFsD_YNMI0rLPwL5eaB1saR66inO2PeCnClM3kkUcOIjS7ljogCVgNdN190XihXR9C_2ZYNc3pLvuYJpIBS_yq7VdDqTJEq3Ln_o4GsreRSnPwve12IaYR2dDRWCQljCHnCeP74v9l-pk3iJSBBDZa4wslVN1quhQvRR0Edzsed5LGz1Qpp2EJkEWVPVqkvzETdTwa9fKGhS7ukxec1_-k1RPljmOoGLQhH4raEXImeYAUvoHA5PXWqDmgVvJVx3vBTsJUMgFVdSjq6M3JfuRjq69SKDQdeYQKnAkmHJAi4p6mAJ6xQnwaSODdluPv-od5QvxlBoPEVesa2pbMtRcC68zJBnYRAa00ejnAgv3LlMuzkt6kGM2SETeJfr1RYw2PYtIQcpXkDTjGaQ1N2stDsFn36EFVS0olc5XMisBItHH-SYHgDlC1szk64sM4dsDuNksqfgDEWwDAqrESh1JTgzD7Brh5HDgHTVQRZAfCQvoZDsMby1OGTwbzgELi7CoOyjr8ft)

Dear Patriot, They're trying to put an innocent cop in prison for **life**. Why? For defending himself against a fleeing suspect who dragged him with a car. I've been in law enforcement for decades. I've seen the system abused. But what is happening to Officer James Brennand of San Antonio, Texas makes my blood boil, and it should make yours boil too. On October 2nd, 2022, Officer James Brennand — a decorated Army veteran who swore an oath to protect his community — spotted a car he suspected was stolen outside a McDonald's in San Antonio. He called for backup. He approached the vehicle. He ordered the driver to step out. The driver's response? He threw the car into reverse and used it as a weapon. | [Defend Officer Brennand →](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=61fc725e6fc04b18933d69102d073007&_e=e_caDXT4MKx7LKiDwPBetJ9kYuIhddlpWjvq9-cmHYEiH7wx6CORyxOCQ4hPNfQtmIRQJjMNcUN51dAR1hsUZ5q5xl0Ahu-rsAGUAQ9esh6Gulq73cL2lA1mpeCvGXiDrGFtIC1OqGaKS1cza2btbCEsyUvPn8adVw-KH70kgFnetXGed4jDPU4l4Yb5RRiMewq3OUB4Vi-qZCbQ1xoPgb7t-bj4eKhq-2je_V1hd33pnGbqcPNB1rpCZvqecI-hUJGvmjMZrSjK5h8KoiFlQ8Jc94a58icHQArywxGAo2Ieb06lZEIMd4oAAQe-W_VfP7RRSXKeJ6U5NAFNPJmEMhvgVdtxEt5VBnBs_CC0-rxIgSAiF59C-DI9GzS6KHwx_XBqfFvzIG0S00liYLtQyDF7F-rmqWaXF1N7nZFQCvUzN5wLDAiD3njOnw7NDxNB)
---
The car door slammed into Brennand. He was dragged. In that split second — outnumbered, without backup, in genuine danger — James did what every officer is trained to do. **He protected himself.**
The driver survived. The passenger was unharmed. And since that night, the driver has racked up four more arrests. **Four.**
While the man who attacked James faces no meaningful consequences, Officer Brennand has been stripped of his badge, his paycheck, and his future. A politically hungry District Attorney — more interested in headlines than justice — charged James with aggravated assault and deadly conduct. If convicted: **five years to life.**
Let that sink in. A man who served his country in the Army, who volunteered to protect the streets of San Antonio, who was dragged by a car in the line of duty — could die in prison.
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=61fc725e6fc04b18933d69102d073007&_e=e_caDXT4MKx7LKiDwPBetJ9kYuIhddlpWjvq9-cmHYEiH7wx6CORyxOCQ4hPNfQtmIRQJjMNcUN51dAR1hsUZ5q5xl0Ahu-rsAGUAQ9esh6w_riD1uh2c09ury_wAhMYPU4WRVtP-pAXg9WgtaL5BDGWhNkji4egNPeuJKtA6LxE-zJUU9vn5S3jGCUUGFhVqdOHmeKVDmWZABush7jswp3XKPbPaHq19NyLmdIHC11ulaPjJLLxREGLW_5rJcQ_ZIov69GGLr3ZmhNf-AbL9Fv7oRGJcsgcqyISMKq-FL5qqe7OpeP0GBL5Bc898QUej0cwDAlLfcREvHOGXZBjujnVgLdwwrmRwOxgFQutQQScoJhV8lP0pnc_WOeEgCdrwCaY5t5EsWp3iY4UPHB-F3DMh_h2aDQo1IjLHDo0155j1152Chr6dKuSAXz_Yizj) James and his son — a family now fighting for survival while awaiting trial.
The National Center for Police Defense is in this fight with James — funding his legal defense and supporting his family while this nightmare drags on toward trial. But the costs are staggering, and they don't stop. **[That's why I need you, right now, today, to make a donation. $25. $50. $100.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=61fc725e6fc04b18933d69102d073007&_e=e_caDXT4MKx7LKiDwPBetJ9kYuIhddlpWjvq9-cmHYEiH7wx6CORyxOCQ4hPNfQtmIRQJjMNcUN51dAR1hsUZ5q5xl0Ahu-rsAGUAQ9esh7iMHfACI6Jgc7cD6mIZU39JYUFQQUmWskN8EdSRLSL-Yi9VL34RRy2VXLPd3Zv795CQzG7Ng7qevfr-719MvWk8FMG_niMqbRnZnN-iiVJGcDqHJfeRjIaDvmi8dQ7OcYo9J0xqIKYmcBA2H46tkYn3JYInb5f2YBtRG4CT1sq1OoMSmZTDILr54PWdlXHFPJxvROaVzVODgK34-8iqnyZBXW8t7nK3VG3ACkuPoS5JRvNZB3p7M3QuOhv4nuwoFCVyA8USuE6GnPBiNmMtWUvBCe7UQrWoZ5jBfF-dSIMM6xuYGcxm8xolHinEV5xS3eq-ZadRiKcViW7qYYnVwJ6) ** Whatever you can give. Your gift goes to defending James and keeping his family afloat. The anti-police mob is betting that people like you will scroll past, shake your head, and do nothing. **Prove them wrong.** James Brennand served this country with honor. He served his city with courage. When that car came at him, he stood his ground. Now it's our turn to stand with him. Don't let them take this good man down without a fight. Share this with every patriot and badge supporter you know. The thin blue line holds only as long as good people refuse to look away. **For James. For his son. For every officer who might be next.** Unapologetically, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County

**We are officially less than 2 MONTHS out from Harry Dunn 's primary in Maryland's 5th District** -- and as of right now, we're being outraised AND outspent.
We need to fight back, but we're falling WAY short as Harry's self-funding opponents and corporate interests pull ahead in this race. That's why we're reaching out to Harry's top grassroots supporters and asking for just $2.
If we can close this fundraising gap, we can set the record straight, win this crucial primary, and send a fighter to Congress who will stand up to Trump's MAGA agenda. **[So please, can we count on you to stand with Harry by chipping in just $2 before midnight?](https://substack.com/redirect/fcc5ea08-0edb-4a1f-8ddb-e25b651d5392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Harry Dunn's primary in MD-05 is less than two months away. Here's what you need to know:
1. This is a HIGHLY COMPETITIVE race that will decide party control of the House Majority.
2. If we can win this crucial seat, Harry will be able to hold Trump and his MAGA enablers accountable in Congress and fight for our democracy.
3. Harry isn't a self-funded millionaire. Our campaign doesn't take a cent from corporate PACs. We rely solely on the support of grassroots Democrats like you to fund this critical campaign.

**With less than 2 months left, every single dollar decides which doors we knock, which ads we run, and which voters we reach before Election Day.**
#### **[We're being outraised as we write this, but if even just 1 in 3 folks reading this pitches in $2, we can start to pull ahead. Can you rush just $2 before midnight to help take back our House Majority and fight for our democracy?](https://substack.com/redirect/fcc5ea08-0edb-4a1f-8ddb-e25b651d5392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Team Harry Dunn

clean_body: Here's how you can help. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Here's how you can help. May 2 | | | | | | | | | We are officially less than 2 MONTHS out from Harry Dunn 's primary in Maryland's 5th District -- and as of right now, we're being outraised AND outspent. We need to fight back, but we're falling WAY short as Harry's self-funding opponents and corporate interests pull ahead in this race. That's why we're reaching out to Harry's top grassroots supporters and asking for just $2. If we can close this fundraising gap, we can set the record straight, win this crucial primary, and send a fighter to Congress who will stand up to Trump's MAGA agenda. Harry Dunn's primary in MD-05 is less than two months away. Here's what you need to know: 1. This is a HIGHLY COMPETITIVE race that will decide party control of the House Majority. 2. If we can win this crucial seat, Harry will be able to hold Trump and his MAGA enablers accountable in Congress and fight for our democracy. 3. Harry isn't a self-funded millionaire. Our campaign doesn't take a cent from corporate PACs. We rely solely on the support of grassroots Democrats like you to fund this critical campaign. With less than 2 months left, every single dollar decides which doors we knock, which ads we run, and which voters we reach before Election Day. Thank you, Team Harry Dunn You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | (C) 2026 Harry Dunn 6710 Laurel Bowie Road, PO Box 499, Bowie, MD 20718 ? ?

Let's be clear about who we're up against: Stephen Miller has become one of the most influential figures in Trump's White House. He has drafted — or personally edited — executive orders the president has signed, and he's faced little internal resistance as he pushes an extreme agenda most Americans oppose.

**And we're seeing the consequences of Miller's pet projects in real time:** attacks on immigrant communities, assaults on our fundamental freedoms, efforts to weaken democratic institutions, and rollbacks of protections that took generations to win.

This is why we're investing in House races earlier and more aggressively than ever. **We need a firewall in Congress strong enough to stop Trump, Stephen Miller, and the cruel agenda they're forcing upon our country.**

It starts with electing EMILYs List women who see the impact of these policies in their communities — and who will name what’s happening for what it is: a deliberate strategy to divide people and fuel fear.

********[**We're directing early resources _now_ to help these candidates organize, communicate, and compete. clean_body: Americans overwhelmingly reject the direction he's taking our country in. | = Peter, EMILYs List women will be essential to taking back the U.S. House in November — and creating a check on the Trump administration, including Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller. ******=**** | = Let's be clear about who we're up against: Stephen Miller has become one of the most influential figures in Trump's White House. He has drafted — or personally edited — executive orders the president has signed, and he's faced little internal resistance as he pushes an extreme agenda most Americans oppose. And we're seeing the consequences of Miller's pet projects in real time: attacks on immigrant communities, assaults on our fundamental freedoms, efforts to weaken democratic institutions, and rollbacks of protections that took generations to win. This is why we're investing in House races earlier and more aggressively than ever. We need a firewall in Congress strong enough to stop Trump, Stephen Miller, and the cruel agenda they're forcing upon our country. It starts with electing EMILYs List women who see the impact of these policies in their communities — and who will name what’s happening for what it is: a deliberate strategy to divide people and fuel fear. ****=****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Jen Kiggans
subject: My races look a little different these days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Time to lace up our sneakers and get going!

Peter,

Early morning runs through the neighborhood, the sun just starting to rise, and the sound of my sneakers pounding the pavement. Just 8 years ago I was just a concerned citizen and mom, trying to stay active and clear my head.[](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZVLVg0LjExMDExN190MTg4NjYzMy0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwMl82VS1YNC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2MzMtMjA2OCJ9/nKYul6_PFTcN-qU_BqaH1w)Fast forward to today, and I'm running in the most competitive race in America. It's a far cry from those quiet neighborhood streets, but my commitment to our conservative values remains unwavering.
As a Navy veteran and a proud conservative, I've seen firsthand the impact that reckless spending, overregulation, and a lack of accountability can have on our communities. That's why I'm fighting every day to bring common sense back to Washington.
But I need your help. The liberal machine is pouring millions into my opponent's campaign, and we can't let them drown out our message...! That's why I'm counting on you to help me stay in this fight.
[Consider making a donation of $25, $50, or $100 to my campaign today. ](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZVLVg0LjExMDExN190MTg4NjYzMy0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwMl82VS1YNC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2MzMtMjA2OCJ9/vDUP_38gq5PKNl8Xxsl8Jw)Every dollar counts, and your support will help me take on the liberal establishment and keep conservative values in place.[CHIP IN $25
](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZVLVg0LjExMDExN190MTg4NjYzMy0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwMl82VS1YNC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2MzMtMjA2OCJ9/1ZxUY5WzLa1xile3y2zhfQ)[CHIP IN $50
](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZVLVg0LjExMDExN190MTg4NjYzMy0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwMl82VS1YNC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2MzMtMjA2OCJ9/NpVNBb3HoWbWav9jGrbL3w)[CHIP IN $100
](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAyXzZVLVg0LjExMDExN190MTg4NjYzMy0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwMl82VS1YNC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2MzMtMjA2OCJ9/iGhW7Iaa11tByknfAo_ayw)I still try to get in my morning runs when I can, they keep me focused and grounded. Your contribution today will take a weight off my shoulders, though. I have a huge deadline that will be here before we know it. Pease chip in today if you can!
Thank you...!
Jen Kiggans
[](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America’s success! [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS

name: Help urgently needed:
subject: Just when you think they can’t be more corrupt they cancel elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jamie Davis for U
body:
MAGA is relying on Democrats throwing our hands up, saying all is lost, and remaining scattered, divided, and scared.
| | | | | [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-P4vJBoMxjd_YPQYi0QRvLIh5PrptwLfIIRcBn7OsnN3_pRxcNu57d3NAM4CeJ_leNjRx31vjiaWwixgzUsCuS0AmQ9pNRzZMfj9yNYOv-_tcjpdgetJGxKl7Pu3ZioDgin1RBKEKZHKgzqOdGBXqfa00pPa21JEOWxcskrjlrdjkgFrpNjcS1OhFUFZLmwSM0qi77P4VDSs7kDcmSNxJgPSrDnTx-Ah&c=5P7R7_0pYf7QBm1oTYaODVHSk138xmpRl78XqCpR-OCxc0PvjHqk8A==&ch=EphyctqhgahtI6MDh_1ydTBak4Nt4_9ufYxLqsxdM4yjClny45afNQ==)
---
Peter, This is wild.
After the Supreme Court cleared the path for a return to Jim Crow-era voter suppression, MAGA Republicans are moving aggressively to eliminate Black and minority representatives up and down the ballot.
Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry cancelled a primary election scheduled in two weeks so MAGA lawmakers can redraw the state's maps.
Early voting and absentee voting was scheduled to start Saturday and thousands of voters have already received their ballots, but they don't care. They want power at any cost.
Now the most ineffective Speaker of the House in U.S. history, Mike Johnson (R-LA), is calling for other states to do what his home state of Louisiana is doing: cancel elections to rig the maps even more for the GOP.
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-P4vJBoMxjd_YPQYi0QRvLIh5PrptwLfIIRcBn7OsnN3_pRxcNu57d3NAM4CeJ_leNjRx31vjiaWwixgzUsCuS0AmQ9pNRzZMfj9yNYOv-_tcjpdgetJGxKl7Pu3ZioDgin1RBKEKZHKgzqOdGBXqfa00pPa21JEOWxcskrjlrdjkgFrpNjcS1OhFUFZLmwSM0qi77P4VDSs7kDcmSNxJlIH3qZWlpWY&c=5P7R7_0pYf7QBm1oTYaODVHSk138xmpRl78XqCpR-OCxc0PvjHqk8A==&ch=EphyctqhgahtI6MDh_1ydTBak4Nt4_9ufYxLqsxdM4yjClny45afNQ==)
---
We absolutely can fight this, and we are working around the clock to make sure voters see MAGA's corruption, voter suppression, and anti-democratic power grab.
But what we can't do is fight back alone. MAGA is relying on Democrats throwing our hands up, saying all is lost, and remaining scattered, divided, and scared.
We aren't doing that. Not this time. I've seen enough in my lifetime to know that folks will only rally to a cause if they think the people behind it have passion, courage, and grit.
I am a third generation farmer, and the grandson of a sharecropper who toiled in the very fields that my son and I now own. I'm proud to lead the fight against MAGA as they try to drag us back to Jim Crow. We aren't going back.
[This is the fight of our lives. Will you stand with me and with Democrats in Louisiana who are putting EVERYTHING on the line to fight back and punish MAGA this November? We cannot win without your support, so anything you can give adds up as good people from across the country chip in to fuel our fight:](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-P4vJBoMxjd_YPQYi0QRvLIh5PrptwLfIIRcBn7OsnN3_pRxcNu57d3NAM4CeJ_luZIz8hvj4-F23MTwle9sp_f47HIiOUCmn91o-P3Vc9DvJ0VFzVRGDGq0pzSAJrrzaHZn-HUjikWZB7ATlTYIWU0CeeciHq1vq-qJUs3ucbwkWUCduDiou38Tk2Bf-NP1BayVAxKh9_Q_YgzAlC3dEz8zyNcPGFUFvzt-hOp2cqU=&c=5P7R7_0pYf7QBm1oTYaODVHSk138xmpRl78XqCpR-OCxc0PvjHqk8A==&ch=EphyctqhgahtI6MDh_1ydTBak4Nt4_9ufYxLqsxdM4yjClny45afNQ==)

clean_body: MAGA is relying on Democrats throwing our hands up, saying all is lost, and remaining scattered, divided, and scared. | | | | | == Peter, This is wild. After the Supreme Court cleared the path for a return to Jim Crow-era voter suppression, MAGA Republicans are moving aggressively to eliminate Black and minority representatives up and down the ballot. Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry cancelled a primary election scheduled in two weeks so MAGA lawmakers can redraw the state's maps. Early voting and absentee voting was scheduled to start Saturday and thousands of voters have already received their ballots, but they don't care. They want power at any cost. Now the most ineffective Speaker of the House in U.S. history, Mike Johnson (R-LA), is calling for other states to do what his home state of Louisiana is doing: cancel elections to rig the maps even more for the GOP. | == We absolutely can fight this, and we are working around the clock to make sure voters see MAGA's corruption, voter suppression, and anti-democratic power grab. But what we can't do is fight back alone. MAGA is relying on Democrats throwing our hands up, saying all is lost, and remaining scattered, divided, and scared. We aren't doing that. Not this time. I've seen enough in my lifetime to know that folks will only rally to a cause if they think the people behind it have passion, courage, and grit. I am a third generation farmer, and the grandson of a sharecropper who toiled in the very fields that my son and I now own. I'm proud to lead the fight against MAGA as they try to drag us back to Jim Crow. We aren't going back. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | We need to unite now to fight back. Thank you for standing shoulder to shoulder with us. Jamie Davis Democrat for Senate Third-generation family farmer | | == | | | == | | == | == == == == Mail checks to: Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate PO Box 55 Ferriday, LA 71334 | Paid for by Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate | | | | Jamie for Louisiana | PO Box 55 | Ferriday, LA 71334 US |

Peter,

On Saturday night, a California man armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives charged the security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in the room.

His name is Cole Allen, a 31-year-old tutor from Torrance, California.

And before he made his move, he sent a manifesto to his own family laying out exactly what he intended to do.

**He wanted to target administration officials, starting with the President of the United States!**

Let us be clear about what just happened...

**This is the _third time_ they have tried to kill President Trump.**

And this time, the man who pulled the trigger wasn't some lone lunatic who slipped through the cracks. He had a plan, a manifesto, multiple weapons, and a hotel room on the 10th floor of the venue. He ran into that building while the President of the United States was inside!

The radical left has spent years calling President Trump every name in the book. Calling his supporters terrorists. Weaponizing the courts, the FBI, and every arm of the federal government to destroy him. Calling for resistance by any means necessary.

Well. Here is the truth:

**The Left is not going to stop. They will not accept the results of free and fair elections. They will not stop at legal warfare. Now we have seen - again - what happens when they incite enough hatred.**

This is exactly why what Turning Point PAC is doing matters so much right now.

**We are not fighting a political campaign. We are fighting for the survival of this movement.**

We are fighting to make sure that the America First movement cannot be stopped by violence, lawfare, or any other means the radical left throws at it.

[Fight for the America First Movement](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b937a02f7313461685158f564aa51162&_e=Z7iYSdAymRQSVwrvU8HtP8ODHqvzDdmFZvzGedSXqy5R9ExFeBUjptyJOuI7b7VCYAMLGUyINM5kmtGM2KFJNL2K1bmWJM2sfHcKRWDCQnrSmJlMHl2mlkrnSjIVC9DtVRrYb-u-QaFeemjcnAQth-alhqlXEuIvZ7dSWRbHmfQq6f0mzjCw5qAR7J7bQVwR0VcTHAv6raCVs5_aHwVzZhHMUoTZ750cVJArzm-Zy5fzQBMA6nzyIiMugdCJryaVkpcdDolQHBSohvc0nYudqNsERo8n8sWpdYrv2fTgSLtTXBg_5vj7iHCJIuVkaGxSm7H3AIks_G6wcNcImkUndoYZlIcMHcNUXz4YNpB0086rDjz_4bOxP3lLF1nTjugQPaA-1d2hBFH1GTp1Gglka6G-hQ9G6uOOiLcuMm0LHR5jXMsTFbF8HXrXlz3-alrm8dMDlttHPY6OG-FUggPebvBZ5EsF1MU4xcbvj12iCe-5sNGxSDfkKRddtemeHjBBWGDpLcmG5-pl_f0WZbyfiVhaDkuTh3Qg-lRi1K4JKPUzfJu06BhLwyU7YXkuKnlNZw_mTcrYo9zL_TpObIqYW7Fa9e76H99WLm0sOIgsZRIVrYNhGmxEuC1uqmc-8Az2)

**Here is how you can help right now:**

**ONE:** Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire are the battleground states where 2026 - and the road to 2028 - will be decided. The radical left is already pouring millions into these states.

**TWO:** Turning Point PAC is hiring, training, and funding **700 NEW ballot chasers**. Boots on the ground. Real relationships in real communities. Not TV ads. Not consultants. People.

**THREE:** Republicans outnumber Democrats in registration in these key states. We have the voters. We just need to reach them - and _**we need your help to do it**_.

Every **$50** you give funds a ballot chaser for a full day in the field.

[Every dollar you contribute today is a direct response to what happened Saturday night.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b937a02f7313461685158f564aa51162&_e=Z7iYSdAymRQSVwrvU8HtP8ODHqvzDdmFZvzGedSXqy5R9ExFeBUjptyJOuI7b7VCYAMLGUyINM5kmtGM2KFJNJ0RUnz8u0XBKBNYIu6NvU74rDVOfjmUB1ogwNuqgk64l59XTna5MMgm0uXXTbxsKnmNHfSDYOyTtzIzf2uhYfCSn5ptEDt8MZrhuykC_dGxeR3Gj422rbB-gEyKjy0fVE9YlEBawwRzcjW1ul0Bd6xdcgBLq17HgN1tcfgyX0YdzLEaK5Fig-QfbS405j9AjaSc1igIEUnKXplcF5IpdnCTSCCkogwVmR7s7J-UqtELoeiw5OMlmhSLMHVdqE0eD2ecnZPN2sT_XDcpEjSo3IoGsvHjJIW0-u7I0qjI48KvWrUG1M1j7T7FzlHiG0pqJPoBzC3zuv-phtp07Uoz6m709mO7ZErV-SSYgaiCY-Ss-wFwjnFZZ-EiAJqTv7c4SDw0KdJIDoVnc3rREkTub9BhCcaWXU_bicAqlctRzXNMnprnfVYBqfv2EjDfpKmpghqY0VbyJ5QDf-ZrTi9bjlfjWE6-3wI3ZwPkKRgjjTE4doL8zzoc41cvaUnan40iiMJamxaBQuuUPkqHeT7L4yG8d8AmGXhZcDejJhmmjiAH)

clean_body: Peter, On Saturday night, a California man armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives charged the security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in the room. His name is Cole Allen, a 31-year-old tutor from Torrance, California. And before he made his move, he sent a manifesto to his own family laying out exactly what he intended to do. He wanted to target administration officials, starting with the President of the United States! Let us be clear about what just happened... This is the third time they have tried to kill President Trump. And this time, the man who pulled the trigger wasn't some lone lunatic who slipped through the cracks. He had a plan, a manifesto, multiple weapons, and a hotel room on the 10th floor of the venue. He ran into that building while the President of the United States was inside! The radical left has spent years calling President Trump every name in the book. Calling his supporters terrorists. Weaponizing the courts, the FBI, and every arm of the federal government to destroy him. Calling for resistance by any means necessary. Well. Here is the truth: The Left is not going to stop. They will not accept the results of free and fair elections. They will not stop at legal warfare. Now we have seen - again - what happens when they incite enough hatred. This is exactly why what Turning Point PAC is doing matters so much right now. We are not fighting a political campaign. We are fighting for the survival of this movement. We are fighting to make sure that the America First movement cannot be stopped by violence, lawfare, or any other means the radical left throws at it. Here is how you can help right now: ONE: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire are the battleground states where 2026 - and the road to 2028 - will be decided. The radical left is already pouring millions into these states. TWO: Turning Point PAC is hiring, training, and funding 700 NEW ballot chasers. Boots on the ground. Real relationships in real communities. Not TV ads. Not consultants. People. THREE: Republicans outnumber Democrats in registration in these key states. We have the voters. We just need to reach them - and we need your help to do it. Every $50 you give funds a ballot chaser for a full day in the field. It is a statement that this movement will not be intimidated. That we will not be silenced. That we will not back down. Please stand with Turning Point PAC right now. They tried to stop him with two bullets in Butler, Pennsylvania. They tried to stop him with a gunman on a golf course. They tried to stop him on Saturday night with a shotgun, a handgun, and a manifesto. And every single time, he survived.
