body:
[ stdin# ]Josh Shapiro for Pennsylvania
I know you’ve seen it too,
Derek: Across the country, so many
politicians love to trot out a slogan or a catchy promise during election
season. But far too often, once they’re elected, those promises go right
out the window.

This may sound a little old-fashioned, but I’ve always believed when you
make a promise, you should do everything in your power to keep it. So when
I ran for Governor in 2022 on the promise of Getting Sh*t Done for
Pennsylvania, I knew families were counting on me to deliver.

And Derek, we’ve
delivered.

We’ve slashed taxes seven times, secured record investments into our
public schools, created tens of thousands of good-paying jobs, built the
only growing economy in the Northeast, and so much more.

Look, Getting Sh*t Done is more than just a slogan or a catchy motto for
my administration,
Derek. It’s the guiding
principle of everything I do as your Governor.

I couldn’t be more proud of what we’ve accomplished together over the
years. But we still have so much more work to do, and we need to stand
together to get it done.

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/475?t=1001&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]This election won’t only be enormously consequential,
Derek — but enormously
expensive as well. So I need to ask: If you can spare just a few dollars,
will you chip in to support our campaign for reelection? As our May 19th
primary draws closer and closer, your donation stretches further than
ever.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/476?t=1002&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/477?t=1003&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Donate $15 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/478?t=1004&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/479?t=1005&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/480?t=1006&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/475?t=1007&akid=34%2E245147%2EhUJAFf ]Other →

Thank you,

Josh Shapiro

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

If you have just a few extra minutes, we’ll explain why we need to hear from you:
President Trump’s agenda in Washington is having real consequences for Oregonians, and Tina’s Republican opponents are refusing to stand up for us.
Since President Trump and nationwide Republicans passed his budget bill:
* **[47,000](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130635585/618405245/1492372804?refcode=email_050226_prioritiessurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1MzFmNC02NzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T0HRHUyD1rFsh8VMsS4_kyQ40uDSZK4z3hYzPijqDK0=&emci=19b531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1ab531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=15353729)** Oregonians have lost their SNAP benefits.
* Nearly **[200,000](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130635586/618405246/1492372804?refcode=email_050226_prioritiessurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1MzFmNC02NzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T0HRHUyD1rFsh8VMsS4_kyQ40uDSZK4z3hYzPijqDK0=&emci=19b531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1ab531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=15353729)** Oregonians could lose their health insurance coverage.
* **T[ens of thousands](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130635587/618405247/1492372804?refcode=email_050226_prioritiessurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1MzFmNC02NzQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T0HRHUyD1rFsh8VMsS4_kyQ40uDSZK4z3hYzPijqDK0=&emci=19b531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1ab531f4-6746-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=15353729)** of Oregon families are struggling to keep up with soaring costs.

These attacks can't go unanswered.

| | | Hi Peter, As we approach California’s primary elections next month, I want to be clear about what’s at stake.

**The path to taking back the House majority in November runs through California.**

So when Donald Trump commanded Texas Republicans to steal Democratic seats through redrawing their congressional map, I teamed up with my Democratic colleagues to cancel out his election-rigging scheme by introducing Prop 50.

Thanks to California voters, Prop 50 passed in November — and now our state is the frontlines of the fight to end Trump’s trifecta.

We need to win these newly drawn districts, and as Chair of the California Congressional Delegation, I’m leading efforts to elect more Democrats in California and take back the House.

That’s why it’s so important to support California Democrats before the primaries on June 2nd. We need to show that we have the momentum going into the general election, and that we have the resources to back these new candidates in competitive districts in California.

__[_**So I’m asking you, Peter: Will you chip in today ahead of the primary elections in just one month to elect Democrats and flip the House blue? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130635592/618405312/-1469126793?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-05-02_P50_FTH_ES-47002_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MzY2M4MC02ODQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bF9e5bh_xtDIjw1UU6TjOjbNuNm7kxwzAZqp0KuNDak=)

clean_body: | | | | = | | | | Hi Peter, As we approach California’s primary elections next month, I want to be clear about what’s at stake. The path to taking back the House majority in November runs through California. So when Donald Trump commanded Texas Republicans to steal Democratic seats through redrawing their congressional map, I teamed up with my Democratic colleagues to cancel out his election-rigging scheme by introducing Prop 50. Thanks to California voters, Prop 50 passed in November — and now our state is the frontlines of the fight to end Trump’s trifecta. We need to win these newly drawn districts, and as Chair of the California Congressional Delegation, I’m leading efforts to elect more Democrats in California and take back the House. That’s why it’s so important to support California Democrats before the primaries on June 2nd. We need to show that we have the momentum going into the general election, and that we have the resources to back these new candidates in competitive districts in California. = | | | If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me and for believing in this work. name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: They charged him with a felony for stopping a riot
body:
Dear Patriot,
They charged a cop with a felony for stopping a riot. I am not making this up.
They want to lock him away for using **non-lethal bean bag rounds** against a violent mob that was blocking an interstate highway, hurling rocks at officers, and bringing Molotov cocktails to the party.
I have seen a lot in my years in law enforcement. I have seen politics poison the justice system. But what is being done to Officer Jeffrey Teng of Austin, Texas is one of the most shameless, stomach-turning betrayals of law enforcement I have ever witnessed.
** [It has to stop — and I need your help to stop it.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25d8045cda064262a6241269093afed7&_e=1ajI0dpmod0sl5-ifbJqusAVcccmQu7zsXnApiwW2iK-YUrMjZZCOOZkhVCbbNszID73Tv3CPPFXZXsCVzfgJPIH4Hykgh2yiuc7AxTGnGOpAlrBxiUJ9-jf309NMfOM4aC5biGzdlihpPJsdjUrO0DmKnc_m2lpAZXM_KsGgHa1HJ2dt3BYezp33jUsa1ZJyQACxFmN58D5YPmPBxOGUfdc5709IIphe-9oBUYDNNhdfYAY-ANO53Nf2cMiWoREpKoObPzWzxAWWjsIYnCVJ9YWn0TKK2lCYDYJKmna5dGwFu5FItGdFfu_fEmIuzTBebe84YXm0-7RVCQ7tPKPtIb4NQ9VBryDSM-rbIPGpQ8ST_Qj8QKps6MSu2pZuGrW-USniVdprcJPofh9sn9m6WWJX5obWZ1q71ZxCdFU8afRWKcxFIe_5YKFzH448h1Y) **
It was Memorial Day weekend, 2020. Hundreds of protesters flooded the streets of Austin. What started as a demonstration turned into three days of chaos: buildings looted, police vehicles set on fire, a rioter caught with a Molotov cocktail before he could throw it. It took nearly Austin's entire 2,100-officer police force to keep the city from total collapse.
On May 31st, a mob completely shut down I-35 — a major interstate highway — directly in front of police headquarters. Ambulances couldn't get through. Officers gave verbal orders to disperse. A police helicopter broadcast commands over a loudspeaker. The rioters refused.
**Officer Jeffrey Teng and his partner were ordered in to clear the highway.**
Officer Jeffrey Teng with his wife
When they arrived, the mob started throwing rocks. One of those rocks struck Officer Teng's partner square in the chest. Under attack, outnumbered, doing their jobs — Teng and his fellow officers deployed non-lethal rounds to stop the violence.
That's it. That's the "crime."
Now Jeffrey Teng, along with 4 other Austin police officers, faces felony charges. Meanwhile, District Attorney José Garza has dismissed nearly every charge against the actual rioters. The people who threw rocks, set cars on fire, and shut down a highway walk free. The officers who stopped them are being prosecuted.
This is a political vendetta by a DA who has made it his mission to destroy the men and women who keep order in our streets.
And Jeff Teng is paying the price. His career is on hold. His future is uncertain. His trial has been delayed again and again — meaning this family has been living under this cloud for _years_ with no end in sight.
The National Center for Police Defense is standing with Jeff and his family — funding his legal defense and providing support while this ordeal drags on. But we cannot do it without you.
I'm asking you to [ **donate today** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25d8045cda064262a6241269093afed7&_e=1ajI0dpmod0sl5-ifbJqusAVcccmQu7zsXnApiwW2iK-YUrMjZZCOOZkhVCbbNszID73Tv3CPPFXZXsCVzfgJPIH4Hykgh2yiuc7AxTGnGMvC38mW6B7GKHB4uohzDs5Mml6rUMqmVAS3FHbB_BneyU9K1NZA6x1J_cD6I3audxUI-BVNvVzEGIGD2JiqTXK8XQw9iIgLkGdpTKejM7z3VTpdMeUE1lOPabgeukNrptw0Mb337WpXFR23dYwoPxg4SFs40wvR_fRDHdDnmF-pMbCgWiaip493Y6OBRy4Qs-9BQAcfbwZaaTi5oAny_6iFTxMDlEQEXizp1zNnV2-2eRXGfzKOe508J838WUKD-R2pWrWLsmxljm2VsXVKdsMvoPQnTArqOsDaQpMrN0FNRKEjUlNXry6whrJzZi7aU_BjqmWHDG-WGPxfz-UI44v). $25. $50. $100. Whatever you can. Your gift goes to Jeff's defense and to supporting his family through this nightmare.
### Stand With Officer Teng Today

[Give What You Can →](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25d8045cda064262a6241269093afed7&_e=1ajI0dpmod0sl5-ifbJqusAVcccmQu7zsXnApiwW2iK-YUrMjZZCOOZkhVCbbNszID73Tv3CPPFXZXsCVzfgJPIH4Hykgh2yiuc7AxTGnGPyjhwrxM7lV1SlDgHYFGJGeuqH5EWwXmjqDt6Yvyu9tGNwXBw-hB5sTjGvxt-BpcViaywxXMdj-KbnDS5TwhWOcgjcjMfBMSjZRK2q2gPizwYQw3g8A3B-y2gaOT1S19Sgw3KVcf3kabwY9kPvr-hPTDZfN0Gi2ZiZId1SA42FEp815MzB-CBbWJ5wl_XCzVNgQmn7uXcDb-4OebO6UoZoi2g3c8WoLLQJnb6o9uNx5h3JT2n9iI8nRW93yWPzlEGPeitFKuwr1L9RgjXxj5IkvoDbHzIP_kcucXWT_M0wZ3GPh2DT9PL2uFRHZH3MHHIWpiqnSFVdQQ8OP5DLyyiD)
100% of your donation goes toward Officer Teng's legal defense fund.
The radical left is counting on your silence. They want you to think this is just one officer, one city, one story. **It isn't.** If they can prosecute 20+ officers for stopping a riot with non-lethal force, no officer anywhere is safe.
Jeff Teng showed up. He held the line. He protected his partner, his city, and the rule of law — with every tool he was authorized to use. The least we can do is show up for him.
Don't look away. Share this with every law enforcement supporter you know. And please, [ **give what you can today.** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25d8045cda064262a6241269093afed7&_e=1ajI0dpmod0sl5-ifbJqusAVcccmQu7zsXnApiwW2iK-YUrMjZZCOOZkhVCbbNszID73Tv3CPPFXZXsCVzfgJPIH4Hykgh2yiuc7AxTGnGMboFDM47i8zSGLKyKDESmpkxp0_tHjlOsX7bcufqCuq40AsDAqEDeQO4eFsxpV-aq-VUpyl43tSRQpngIX8tq7sgJv1xvSUf_ENTwreLT2JnZ97-k9aOqccj6dFjUud6QfniHTbdIqG3s_3oHjEK6AOZBpV_6Jpz_4eqo52NgKcI9O0n7gH--NuwxRrt7c9GNfKTk-flKEsUQFQgKDJtm16CUUjah19_woZbQ5VdyhwNd0i8S1Cn5WZg-EHAQz-rjpVoNEnUIOcocDF0Tp8zQiTzNBcRY5bALB4qXGFl92vl_RlpSBBIPIP1LzPkW2SvyD95-4VbaQTbr7RNTKeE4K)

It took nearly Austin's entire 2,100-officer police force to keep the city from total collapse. On May 31st, a mob completely shut down I-35 — a major interstate highway — directly in front of police headquarters. Ambulances couldn't get through. Officers gave verbal orders to disperse. A police helicopter broadcast commands over a loudspeaker. The rioters refused. Officer Jeffrey Teng and his partner were ordered in to clear the highway. Officer Jeffrey Teng with his wife When they arrived, the mob started throwing rocks. One of those rocks struck Officer Teng's partner square in the chest. Under attack, outnumbered, doing their jobs — Teng and his fellow officers deployed non-lethal rounds to stop the violence. That's it. That's the "crime." Now Jeffrey Teng, along with 4 other Austin police officers, faces felony charges. Meanwhile, District Attorney José Garza has dismissed nearly every charge against the actual rioters. The people who threw rocks, set cars on fire, and shut down a highway walk free. The officers who stopped them are being prosecuted. This is a political vendetta by a DA who has made it his mission to destroy the men and women who keep order in our streets. And Jeff Teng is paying the price. His career is on hold. His future is uncertain. His trial has been delayed again and again — meaning this family has been living under this cloud for years with no end in sight. The National Center for Police Defense is standing with Jeff and his family — funding his legal defense and providing support while this ordeal drags on. But we cannot do it without you. I'm asking you to . $25. $50. $100. Whatever you can. Your gift goes to Jeff's defense and to supporting his family through this nightmare. Stand With Officer Teng Today Your gift funds Jeff's legal defense and supports his family through this nightmare. 100% of your donation goes toward Officer Teng's legal defense fund. The radical left is counting on your silence. They want you to think this is just one officer, one city, one story. It isn't. If they can prosecute 20+ officers for stopping a riot with non-lethal force, no officer anywhere is safe. Jeff Teng showed up. He held the line. He protected his partner, his city, and the rule of law — with every tool he was authorized to use. The least we can do is show up for him. Don't look away. Share this with every law enforcement supporter you know. And please, For Jeff. For every officer they're coming after next. Sincerely, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County, Arizona Honorary Supporter, National Center for Police Defense P.S. Officer Jeff Teng is facing felony charges for stopping a riot. If this DA gets away with it, it sets a precedent that will haunt law enforcement across this entire country. — before another good cop's life gets destroyed. Don't Wait — Jeff Needs You Now Your gift to his legal defense. National Center for Police Defense**

Peter,

One year ago, my home in Pacific Palisades burned to the ground.

_My family lost everything._

**Now, homeowners in those same fire-ravaged neighborhoods are opening their mail to find “noncompliance” notices over brush clearance inspections — on empty lots that are still waiting to be rebuilt!**

Read that again.

**Their homes burned down.
Their properties are sitting vacant.
And City Hall is sending them warnings. **

_This is exactly what’s broken in Los Angeles._

| [ DONATE NOW -
HELP ME FIX LA ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/5N2J5xHW35LugkXb3DCf0scPf24GxELOdx-yRDgyfaXDqO6O3oM8rTJXhLjix49Hlfc0aEJwStl8EK2y_GwOVWnOyxM9LUe69S8i0TjcLGeZ0zeBmFzBSVexciESVgaZqgk2R5U0dXrSUxxtXxCukzxYcHLXltCPQZal7RSXbodhEDL-fSKq1rcGWicKC0beXaVDCfMrUvNjhW2PhTncR_lJCyFw2PH7qiNUnIe3X2hGGO4KafAFOILn5xgbc6OT-JnJ1EsPyfyrZ5rZDTSvJeaiiGyHK3SqvHC1h8QreWs-SuQo-YaV_-B67CJUDct4B3nWoaQQ_zh6XCOToK6qU00nrd-Y5RuzDFiia658X1sXCJ3oRY4D3lU46jg3JRK79Cs-Y40XG0oM1KwReuk2aWENt3eXT7ZIf5tRapa1kh9fE_TPPvL0M-YZe8pmWXb4LnLrdxoSkWVcO8jlIN-pC-IaeMHAGPKQYeybPb8BZtA-us0Yb76K4OZkaPfLRN3-wB-sgX3Tl0zg1Va9PO_Y7EcU8dMcsxx0cCOZmeGfTqNGuSRjHXmUm6I-GtSctanqtcjBlm05rjfNNSbqn7aoSDNiRzL2NbK2PNacAuYFf7hS-mxtN4INuVBVnEN4xjzgdN-44GjOCE7UIfHGsg2PmQC22whAzjfO3rCIXpfLWXc25vH_UHgqQapxndrQJpgvgg/a3OJt2dZKAloRbJjBNnxYN8teN4m48Pb/20)

The system isn’t designed to help regular people recover. It’s designed to protect itself. To generate fees. To check boxes. To punish homeowners while politicians hold press conferences.

I’m running for Mayor because I lived this.

I know what it feels like to lose your home, and then deal with a city government that makes everything harder.

Los Angeles deserves leadership that stands with families trying to rebuild, not bureaucrats sending notices to burned-out lots.

If you’re ready for a Mayor who will fix what’s broken and put residents first, I need your support.

name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: We refuse to be next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Imagine losing your fundamental right to vote because politicians didn't like the projected outcome of an election. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130635679/618405953/-1614139448?Refcode=260502-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWJjYTZkNy02OTQ2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xP_wVN3fnRKZDAhBGo4aT0_B-l53ET2VsO63oNFLs8=)
---
Hey Peter, Imagine losing your fundamental right to vote because politicians didn't like the projected outcome of an election. That is exactly what Republicans are trying to do in Louisiana right now. Following the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that gutted the Voting Rights Act, the GOP is attempting to cancel an ongoing primary election just so they can redraw the maps and eliminate majority-Black districts. If they get away with canceling an election to erase minority representation, they will export this strategy to every red state in the country, **and we’re already seeing it in Tennessee.** Governor Bill Lee promised him they would "correct" Tennessee's maps to hand the GOP another seat. And they **just called a special Tennessee legislative session for next week** so they can get started. **And yep, that’s right: it begins ON ELECTION DAY, Tuesday, May 5th.** This is a blatant attempt to eliminate the state’s only majority-minority district in Memphis and hand Republicans a 9-0 advantage in our U.S. House map. **Tennessee Democrats will fight tooth and nail to reject a new Jim Crow South where Republicans choose their voters and silence communities who resist their political agenda.** We know what’s happening in Louisiana, and we won’t let that happen in Tennessee. We are going up against the entire national Republican machine, and we need money to fight back. name: Voter Registration @ Voter Action Project
subject: You + new voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
MS NOW: ‘The largest investment ever’: DNC launches voter registration drive [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=050226_1&amount=30]
The 2025 elections showed us a valuable truth, folks: Voter participation is increasing in all the right ways.
Voter registration activity increased across the country. According to the team at National Voter Registration Day, New York recorded more registrations for their 2025 events than in 2024, and California saw similar increases. Earlier this fall it looked like voter participation was going to make a real jump, even in a so-called "off-year".
Then Election Day came. New Jersey had more voters turn out for a gubernatorial election than they had in 20 years. Crucial counties in Pennsylvania saw their highest turnout levels in almost 15 years. New York City reached a turnout percentage unseen in over five decades.
We can drive even higher levels of participation when voters understand the stakes and feel like their vote matters , just like it did last November. That's why our voter registration efforts are so important, and why we work on it all year long.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $30 or more today to help register 10 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=050226_1&amount=30]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=050226_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=050226_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=050226_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=050226_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=050226_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=050226_1&amount=36]
The key is getting young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights across the country -- to see the importance of voting now more than ever. Pundits in Virginia said they could have called the election results when they saw the first turnout numbers from the major college campus locations around the state. That's the kind of impact these young voters can have.
Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The upcoming midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at a cost to us of just about $3 per new voter -- can be game-changing. Can you pitch in with $30 or however much you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters ahead of this year's voter registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=050226_1&amount=30]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050226_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050226_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=bmkuf3f3ZlPImAZL6c8LsjkbEPS96eTBzE%2B4QBNTMWkx8iS39RVgcXGUGHzvQtfUMic4c6%2B2%2BOj8AgN9Em%2F0vBv5r%2F%2BFi4Owvf1S%2BS%2FKiM4TfwsEa9AypMwCPalPv0XreyLKICbssBjsUXAWAe3mbae4pibFJ0cB%2FH2qMK3FO%2FFJ5obG%2BRLvGhrKX2Npz6gh61K6eiosf5%2BGaJ2IeVPdAMq31NYpT40esbWDg7w%2FfZ60pSa5kPj45keKyIO7Kth7VVshgrBNngrRznDgyMiygZgboXcqWt0MAVF7M40GItawfBjz9YUK8tTFJRf96fgJ9FfETjAwtciEM79FUmiG9c5Ez2diMgaJzl6SK5dp6VX1fLZ4MoI37lTgr5NgJbEOrFRr1uEGofoK5wU917QMB7DurWXLqPzoz2Qv4F58Ohk%3D .

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Help keep our ads up →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)
Peter,
We just launched our **THIRD** ad, and we need your help to keep all of them on air.
[****](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260502_2_ak.MfGs7j&refcode=em20260502-41254&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)
These ads show exactly who Katie is: someone who’s spent her career holding Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Banks accountable for driving up costs. She’s focused on making our state more affordable, fighting for tuition-free public college, single-payer health care, and less expensive housing.
On Tuesday’s debate stage, Katie brought that same record and didn’t hold back—calling out Trump’s failing agenda and the corporations that are squeezing working people.
It’s the same fight she’s taken on her whole career, and the same fight these ads are helping us bring to voters across California.
**Keeping these ads on air is how we make sure voters hear that message loud and clear directly from Katie, on and off the stage.**
But staying on air is expensive, and we’re up against corporate-backed opponents and a self-funded billionaire spending millions to flood the airwaves.
**[If we’re going to cut through the noise and win, we need grassroots supporters to step up. Can you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to you today to keep our ads running for as long as they can?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260502_2_ak.MfGs7j&refcode=em20260502-41254&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260502_2_ak.MfGs7j&refcode=em20260502-41254&t=23&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)
— Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260502-41254&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41254_3422442_FsCAor&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41254&t=26&akid=41254%2E3422442%2EFsCAor)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

Sincerely, — Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. clean_body: Please take a minute to fill out our Issue Survey. I can’t speak to all of you one-on-one, so these online surveys are incredibly helpful → | Hi Peter, it’s Emily! April is over and I want to know how you’re doing. These responses are so incredibly helpful to us while we craft our strategy for the rest of the month and year. I’m meeting with folks all the time from across Washington’s 6th district; there’s so much we’re up against that it can be overwhelming. . • We’re paying $1 billion a day for a war that we didn’t ask for. • The Department of Justice is failing to meaningfully prosecute the villains mentioned in the Epstein files. • There’s an ICE facility in our district that is detaining folks without due process who are sick and afraid. Those are a few of the things at the top of my mind this week — but what about you? I appreciate you taking the time to read this email. Sincerely, — Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. **********************
The TTV Weekly Wrap Up
**********************

For more than a decade, True the Vote has worked to bring
transparency to what shapes our elections long before Election
Day — the maps, the rolls, the rules, and the institutions most
voters never see. This week, that truth came roaring into public
view. The Supreme Court's landmark ruling in Louisiana v. Callais
reshaped how redistricting can be challenged — and within hours,
states from Louisiana to Alabama to Florida moved to redraw their
maps. Virginia's legal fight intensified. State authority scored
major wins. And the institutions that have quietly shaped our
elections for years are finally being pulled into the light. This
is exactly the moment True the Vote was built for. Now is the
time to roll up your sleeves and engage locally — and we're here
to equip you, train you, and stand alongside you. A great
awakening is on the horizon — but only if we refuse to quit.
Let's see this through, together.

In Case You Missed It...
------------------------

making it harder to claim discrimination without proving intent -
a shift that could reshape redistricting fights nationwide.

-----------------
Grounded in Truth
-----------------

A weekly word from the TTV team. Want one every day? Join us in
TTV Now.

Father, we come before You to thank You for meeting us where we
are. You stand with us in the middle of our mess, our mistakes,
and our brokenness and You refuse to leave us there. You step
toward us, just as we are, with grace and compassion. Thank You
for taking our shortfalls, our guilt, and our shame upon Yourself
so that we can walk in freedom.

Remind us daily that we are not defined by our past, but by Your
redemption. Help us to lay down what You have already carried so
we can step fully into our purpose. And Father, we also ask You
to shape our hearts to reflect Yours so that we can meet others
where they are too. Let us be a beacon of Your light so that in a
world filled with darkness, others may be drawn to the hope,
freedom, and redemption found in You. In Jesus’ Name, Amen

~ Jenna Riggs

— it's a commitment. And it doesn't happen in Washington. It
happens because citizens like you stay informed, stay engaged,
and refuse to look away. That's how transparency takes root.
That's how accountability is built — one step, one state, one
community at a time.

True the Vote will keep showing up, keep digging, and keep
telling the truth. We hope you'll keep showing up with us.

clean_body: May 02, 2026 | Read Online ( == ) The TTV Weekly Wrap Up For more than a decade, True the Vote has worked to bring transparency to what shapes our elections long before Election Day — the maps, the rolls, the rules, and the institutions most voters never see. This week, that truth came roaring into public view. The Supreme Court's landmark ruling in Louisiana v. Callais reshaped how redistricting can be challenged — and within hours, states from Louisiana to Alabama to Florida moved to redraw their maps. Virginia's legal fight intensified. State authority scored major wins. And the institutions that have quietly shaped our elections for years are finally being pulled into the light. This is exactly the moment True the Vote was built for. Now is the time to roll up your sleeves and engage locally — and we're here to equip you, train you, and stand alongside you. A great awakening is on the horizon — but only if we refuse to quit. Let's see this through, together. In Case You Missed It... **Peter, look around, the Supreme Court’s gutting of the Voting Rights Act is taking the redistricting crisis to a new, disastrous level:** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130636660/618409113/1630712388?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CallaisFallout_email_20260502-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisFallout_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260502-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisFallout_&utm_campaign=CallaisFallout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDg2YmE5LTczNDYtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOF1Fqqv8FoOOfWCZceojUTp3Mee6AtHuI_E8Mmxuhg=)
---
President Trump and Republicans are moving fast to force more aggressive redraws so they maintain their grip on power — at the expense of communities of color.
An extreme gerrymander was passed in Florida the same day this Supreme Court ruling was handed down. Louisiana just declared a “state of emergency” in an attempt to postpone their primary so they could have more time to get rid of a Black-opportunity district. More and more Republican-led states are talking about using this decision as cover for suddenly manipulating their maps.
[**It’s up to us to fight back with everything we’ve got against Republican manipulation. Rush a donation now to strengthen the NDRC’s every effort to protect voters and defend our democracy in the face of this worsening redistricting crisis.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130636661/618409114/1630712388?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CallaisFallout_email_20260502-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisFallout_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260502-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisFallout_&utm_campaign=CallaisFallout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDg2YmE5LTczNDYtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOF1Fqqv8FoOOfWCZceojUTp3Mee6AtHuI_E8Mmxuhg=)

name: Trina Swanson
subject: We earned the DFL Endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trina for Congress
body:
trinaforcongress.com [trinaforcongress.com]
Friends,
We did it.
After months of showing up across northern and central Minnesota listening to voters, I’m honored to have earned the DFL endorsement in the 8th Congressional District with 72% of the vote!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502]
And I want you to hear this clearly: You were integral part of this victory and I am so grateful to have your support!
This campaign has been built the old-fashioned way. Showing up. Listening. Having real conversations about what people are dealing with every day.
I’ve seen it in every county. I’ve heard it in living rooms, union halls, coffee shops and community centers. People are energized and ready to support my vision for solutions that benefit our district.
Take a moment and feel that. You helped build this.
But this is just the beginning! We aren't taking our foot off the gas and will continue campaigning in every corner of CD8 to build a winning campaign. As we celebrate this victory, can I count on you to make a donation to help us do exactly that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502]
In all 21 counties, I heard the same thing: people are doing everything right and still coming up short. Costs are high. Stability feels out of reach.
People want leadership that shows up and delivers results, not chaos and prioritizing corporate profit over the working class.
That’s the campaign we’ve built. And now we have the momentum to win.
But we don’t have much time. The path to November is short, and we need to build a campaign strong enough to finish this.
That only works if supporters like you who helped build our momentum stay in it. So please, click here to make a grassroots donation as we celebrate earning the DFL endorsement! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502]
I’m grateful for you. I’m proud of what we’ve built together.
Let's win!
Trina
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502]
P.S. This campaign was built by people who show up. That’s how we win in November, too. Volunteer to be a part of something that will bring opportunity home. [https://trinaforcongress.com/#involve]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trina-swanson-may-email?refcode=20260502]

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Jared Kushner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.electjon.com/go/4629?t=1&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV)

How much do you know about Jared Kushner, Peter?
Jared — Donald Trump’s son-in-law — has taken _billions_ from the Government of Saudi Arabia through his shady private equity firm.
And now, he's apparently leading American diplomacy in the Middle East while at the very same time asking Princes and Sheikhs across the Arab world for billions more!
It’s cartoonish.
And it's not just Jared getting in on the action...
A company owned in part by Eric Trump and Don Jr. has been pitching Gulf kingdoms on its drone interceptors during this war.
_The Financial Times_ reported, “Pete Hegseth’s Broker Looked to Buy Defense Fund Before Iran Attack.”
_Never before have we seen so little effort to hide so much corruption, Peter._
**The Mar-a-Lago mafia has taken American corruption to spectacular new heights. But corruption in America runs a lot deeper than Donald Trump.**
Because how does American politics really work?
It's coin-operated: money in, favors out.
It's been running on secret money, corporate money, billionaire money. _Citizens United_ was the worst court decision in modern American history. It's why Members of Congress don't listen to the people; they listen to their donors.
**And this corruption is why insurance companies get away with denying your claim for a procedure you needed to save your life.**
This corruption is why Big Tech’s still allowed to spy on us and track our every move and sell our private lives to the highest bidder. This corruption is why the ultra rich get tax cuts while you pay more for everything.
And beneath it all, a lazy, cynical expedience in Congress and in both political parties, serving donors and reciting poll-tested talking points with no higher purpose than winning the next election.
_But it doesn't have to be this way._
The United States is still destined for greatness, but only united will we meet the challenges and seize the opportunities of our time: to guarantee great health care for every American, to unleash an affordable housing boom and save our family farms, to make America the world leader on human rights and return nations to the path of peaceful coexistence.
**But none of this is possible without victory this November.**
***
When I first ran for Congress, it was because I saw that the election of someone so unfit for the Presidency was a danger to the country. And you got behind me because you saw the same thing.
When we won the Senate it was because we still understood together the urgency and necessity of the moment, and we knew Georgia could lead the way.
Now, the nation is once again turning to Georgia in a moment of crisis.
[**If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may26.KE07xH&refcode=em260502-1-f&t=2&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-may26.hx6_OY&amount=5&refcode=em260502-1-f&t=3&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-may26.hx6_OY&refcode=em260502-1-f&t=4&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV)**
---
****
Thank you so much,
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2218%2E5691347%2E-zIXMV) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

God Bless America!
---
|
---
What man is a man, without the desire to make the world better?

This week, my wife Tracy and our team have been working with talented students from across the district as part of our Annual Congressional Art Competition. Today, my team and I hosted our Service Academy Day at Fork Union Military Academy in Fluvanna County, where we met with exceptional young men and women who are eager to serve our country by attending a Military Academy.
As your Congressman for Virginia's 5th District for the past fifteen months, and by the Grace of God, my incredible team and I have been hard at work helping folks all over the district solve issues with the IRS, Social Security, the VA, and other federal agencies. In addition to working to pass the America First Agenda and deliver the largest tax cut in history, we have successfully returned over $8 million to the people of this district, money that was rightfully owed to them by the U.S. Government.
It is a true honor to represent Virginia's 5th District. We remain hopeful that the Virginia Supreme Court will fulfill its constitutional duty and uphold the lower court's ruling, declaring the redistricting referendum unconstitutional and illegal. In the meantime, I am continuing to campaign for and represent the amazing people of our current district.
###

### Join Team McGuire!

If you want to endorse our campaign, join Team McGuire, or help us with our re-election efforts, please reach out to our Political Director, Ramona Christian:
* Email: ramona@mcguireva.com
* Phone: 434-391-4546

| The Farm Bill Passes The House
---
| |
---
| The US House of Representatives passed the Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026 (H.R. 8467) in a 224-200 bipartisan vote, setting agricultural policy for the next five years. The bill, which now heads to the Senate, authorizes SNAP through 2031 and includes $187 billion in spending cuts. This bill is important to farmers and loggers in the 5th.

It was great seeing so many friends and colleagues also committed to standing up for life. In the middle is John Fredericks, the Godzilla of Truth and his wife Ann in the green dress. | Why We Need Education Reform
---
| |
---
| According to a study by the National Home Education Research Institute (NHERI), homeschooled students typically score 15% to 25% higher on standardized academic achievement tests than their public school peers. This holds true regardless of parents' level of formal education or household income.
The priority in school should be preparing young people for life. Instead of reading, writing, and arithmetic, our education system has fallen behind because educators focused on anti-American divisive ideologies like CRT, Gender, Socialism, Feminism, and Atheism. For a better future for our Christian nation and for all Americans, we must have education reform that ensures educators focus on the fundamentals including love of country or patriotism.

clean_body: | | | | == == God Bless America! | What man is a man, without the desire to make the world better? This week, my wife Tracy and our team have been working with talented students from across the district as part of our Annual Congressional Art Competition. Today, my team and I hosted our Service Academy Day at Fork Union Military Academy in Fluvanna County, where we met with exceptional young men and women who are eager to serve our country by attending a Military Academy. As your Congressman for Virginia's 5th District for the past fifteen months, and by the Grace of God, my incredible team and I have been hard at work helping folks all over the district solve issues with the IRS, Social Security, the VA, and other federal agencies. In addition to working to pass the America First Agenda and deliver the largest tax cut in history, we have successfully returned over $8 million to the people of this district, money that was rightfully owed to them by the U.S. Government. It is a true honor to represent Virginia's 5th District. We remain hopeful that the Virginia Supreme Court will fulfill its constitutional duty and uphold the lower court's ruling, declaring the redistricting referendum unconstitutional and illegal. In the meantime, I am continuing to campaign for and represent the amazing people of our current district. Join Team McGuire! If you want to endorse our campaign, join Team McGuire, or help us with our re-election efforts, please reach out to our Political Director, Ramona Christian: Email: ramona@mcguireva.com Phone: 434-391-4546 To == Here is some of what we have been up to: | Trump IRAs! | | == | Thank God President Trump is in the White House. We are working hard to make things happen for the American people. We signed several Executive Orders this week, including one that helps every day Americans with retirement through the Trump IRAs. == | The Farm Bill Passes The House | | | The US House of Representatives passed the Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026 (H.R. 8467) in a 224-200 bipartisan vote, setting agricultural policy for the next five years. The bill, which now heads to the Senate, authorizes SNAP through 2031 and includes $187 billion in spending cuts. This bill is important to farmers and loggers in the 5th. | Susan B. Anthony Gala | | Marjorie Dannenfelser, President of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America | | Governor Glenn Youngkin | | | I had a wonderful evening at the Susan B. Anthony Pro- Life America gala. They are doing incredible work advocating for the lives of the unborn. It was great seeing so many friends and colleagues also committed to standing up for life. In the middle is John Fredericks, the Godzilla of Truth and his wife Ann in the green dress. Life is a miracle and it must be protected. Most recently an appeals Court blocked access to Mifepristone by Mail == | King Charles III Visits The White House | | == | President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted His Majesty King Charles III and Her Majesty Queen Camilla at the White House this week for the first state visit by a British monarch in nearly two decades. | Why We Need Education Reform | | | According to a study by the National Home Education Research Institute (NHERI), homeschooled students typically score 15% to 25% higher on standardized academic achievement tests than their public school peers. This holds true regardless of parents' level of formal education or household income. The priority in school should be preparing young people for life. Instead of reading, writing, and arithmetic, our education system has fallen behind because educators focused on anti-American divisive ideologies like CRT, Gender, Socialism, Feminism, and Atheism. For a better future for our Christian nation and for all Americans, we must have education reform that ensures educators focus on the fundamentals including love of country or patriotism. | King Charles III Addresses Congress | | This week, I had the honor of shaking hands with King Charles III and Queen Camilla at the Joint Meeting of Congress. This significant moment for our Special Relationship marks the first time a British monarch has addressed Congress since Queen Elizabeth II in 1991. | Congratulations! | | | The Senate confirmed Matthew L. Lohmeier as the 29th Under Secretary of the Air Force on July 24, 2025, in a 52-46 vote. A former Space Force officer and author, Lohmeier assumed office on July 25, 2025, taking over as the second-highest-ranking civilian in the Department of the Air Force. | Our Secretary Of War Pete Hegseth | | | We have brought an end to the ridiculous social experiments in our armed forces and returned to the core principle of Peace Through Strength. I want to thank the Secretary of War Pete hegseth for reinforcing the Warrior Ethos and restoring our military's ultimate focus: lethality. Under his leadership, recruitment is rising across all branches. In addition to aggressively modernizing our Defense Industrial Base, I am proud to announce that we are sustaining the AH-64 Apache production lines and extending the service life of the legendary A-10 Warthog through 2030. Long live the Warthog! | Conservatism With Results | | == A 100 voting score with ==. Thank you Tony Perkins for all you do to protect family values. Promises Made, Promises Kept | == | A 100 voting score with Heritage Action. Newly elected and keeping their campaign promises! == | The Shall Not Be Infringed Act | | | Anti-gun laws make us helpless victims. We all know criminals do not care about the law. If you get shot in a gun-free zone, you should be able to sue the government. | | == Getting results for the people with a great team continues in congress. == | Endorsements: | Congressman August Pfluger | | It is an honor to be endorsed by my friend, fellow veteran, and F-22 Fighter Pilot, August Pfluger. He is Chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest conservative caucus in Washington, D.C. "Congressman Pfluger is proud to endorse Congressman McGuire for re-election to the United States House of Representatives. Congressman McGuire is a thoughtful and principled leader in Congress who has demonstrated a willingness to pass legislation that moves the country forward." | Kirby Burch Endorsement | | | I want to thank my friend, and President of the Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance, Kirby Burch for the endorsement. Thank you for all you do to support our hunting community in Virginia. | Cumberland County Sheriff Darrell Hodges | Thank you, Sheriff Hodges, for your endorsement, and all you do to protect the people of Cumberland County! Senator Luther Ciphers | I really appreciate the endorsement from my friend, Senator Luther Cifers. You're doing a great job in the State Senate. Thank you for all you do for your constituents in Senate District 10. "I'm proud to endorse == for re-election to Congress. Coming into Virginia politics, I didn't know John, but that's changed over the last year and a half. John is without a doubt one of the hardest working people in Virginia politics. This is evident in his Congressional office and the work they are doing - from ensuring Virginia is well-represented in the Federal budget to excellent constituent services to fighting for good legislation. But it doesn't stop there. From the November 2025 elections to the recent referendum, John never stops fighting whatever battle common-sense Virginians find themselves in. His energy is remarkable, and we need more of this kind of energy if we're going to get our state (and country) back to its Constitutional roots and working for every-day citizens. I hope you'll join me in sending John McGuire back to Washington to continue that fight!" Lynchburg C== | | | Thank you to my friend == for your endorsement! I appreciate how hard Stephanie is working to support the people of Lynchburg. | Congressman Jack Bergman | | | I am deeply honored to receive the endorsement of my friend and fellow warrior, retired Marine Corps Lieutenant General and Congressman Jack Bergman. Serving together on the House Armed Services Committee, we remain steadfast in our shared mission: strengthening our national defense and ensuring our veterans receive the unwavering support they deserve. | Congressman Jim Jordan | | | I am deeply honored to receive the endorsement of my friend, Judiciary Committee Chairman and fellow Oversight Committee member Jim Jordan, for my reelection to Congress. His support is a testament to our shared commitment to America First and the American people. | Navy SEAL Brother Jason Redman Endorsement | | | It is an honor to be endorsed by warrior and Navy SEAL brother Jason Redman. Jason is all grit and never backs down, even when he was shot serving our nation. My Brother and Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney | I'm deeply honored to have the endorsement of sheriffs and prosecutors who work every day to keep our communities safe. It means even more when that support comes from family. Thank you to my brother, Louisa County Commonwealth's Attorney and Brigadier General Rusty McGuire, for the endorsement and unwavering support of my office. Hanover County Commonwealth Attorney | Mackenzie is doing a great job ensuring justice is served in Hanover County. Thank you for the endorsement! Appomattox County Commonwealth Attorney | | | Thank you, Leslie, for all you are doing for the great folks in Appomattox County. | Nelson County Commonwealth Attorney | | | I appreciate the endorsement, Daniel! Thanks for all you do for the good people of Nelson County. Pittsylvania County Sheriff Endorsement | | Thank you for your support, Sheriff Taylor. You're doing a great job protecting the people of Pittsylvania County. | Goochland County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Creasey, for how hard you work to keep Goochland County safe. Your efforts do not go unnoticed. Mecklenburg County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you for the endorsement Sheriff Hawkins! You are doing an incredible job protecting the good people of Mecklenburg County. Buckingham County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Kidd, for keeping Buckingham County safe and for the endorsement! Chesterfield County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Leonard for protecting the great people of Chesterfield County, and for the endorsement. Charlotte County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Grissom, for your support. Fluvanna County Sheriff Endorsement | While I work for you in the Fifth District and in D.C., our incredible Sheriffs are keeping our communities safe. It is an honor to have their endorsement. Thank you, Sheriff Hess for your support. Lynchburg City Commonwealth Attorney | It is an honor to receive an endorsement from someone so respected in the Lynchburg community. Thank you, Bethany! Lynchburg City Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Sloan, for keeping Lynchburg safe and helping us spread the word to vote NO. I appreciate the endorsement and your help in defeating the referendum. Appomattox County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Richardson, for the endorsement and everything you do to protect your community. I promise to keep working for you and the people of the Fifth District when re-elected. Louisa County Sheriff Endorsement | | Thank you, Sheriff Lowe, for keeping everyone in Louisa County safe. | Campbell County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Thank you, Campbell County Sheriff Clark, for your unwavering support and friendship. | Amherst County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Sheriff Ayers is doing an incredible job protecting the people of Amherst County. Thank you for your hard work and the endorsement. | Amelia County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Thank you, Sheriff Walker, for everything you are doing to protect people in Amelia County. | The Bait And Switch Governor | | | Why do you think Governor Spanberger has the worst approval rating of any Virginia governor? She said she was a moderate. She lied about redistricting. She lied about making Virginia more affordable. She lied about eliminating the car tax. She lied about standing up to unions. She lied about not coming after gun owners. Democrats in Richmond proposed over 50 new taxes and voted to give themselves a 300 % pay raise. I guess she ran on affordability for them not you. Policies like boys in girls bathrooms, divisive and marxist DEI, expensive green energy, and more make life more difficult and less affordable. Do you think our governor is trying to out California California? Affordability | During the four years of the Democrat Biden Open Border Policies, we estimate 15 to 20 million illegal criminal aliens crossed our border illegally. The cartels have been having their way with innocent American Citizens. In addition to robbing, raping, and murdering our fellow Americans like Laken Riley, the sheer number of illegals has also overwhelmed our resources and increased the cost of living for all of us. Thank God President Trump, Tom Homan, and others are putting Americans first and doing something about it. Why have home prices gone up? Illegals. Why has my car insurance gone up? Illegals. Why has my home insurance gone up? Illegals. Why have my food prices gone up? Illegals. Why hasn't my salary gone up? Illegals. Get it yet? | Vote Ramona Christian Next VA-05 Committee Chair | | | Ramona Christian holds a degree in political science and has been a steadfast leader in the conservative movement. She served on Donald Trump's platform team, was one of just three Fifth District delegates selected to represent President Trump at the Republican National Convention, and she played a key role on the Trump Virginia campaign team, helping organize Trump rallies across the Commonwealth last year. She also serves as Political Director for Congressman John McGuire and she currently serves as the Buckingham County GOP Chair. Ramona is a no-nonsense leader, a trusted friend, and someone who absolutely will bring people together and get things done. She has my complete and total endorsement for Virginia's 5th Congressional District Committee Chair. To learn more including how to vote for her and to join her team, email Ramona at ramonachristian862@gmail.com | I Love CVille Podcast | I Love CVille with Jerry Miller. Thank you for having me on your show. We've received a lot of great feedback! == | If you want to join Team McGuire and help us help Trump Save America, please contact Ramona Christian at ramona@mcguireva.com or call her at 434-391-4546. Take care, please tell a friend to vote, and we look forward to seeing you around the district. == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

Your 2026 Republican Policy Assessment is still missing. |
Fellow American,

I've been reviewing the final responses for our [**2026 Republican Policy Assessment,** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73f6a3b85802434b90c3887a48b726f1&_e=1Cl0zGXjFzhSLUp8M-NC3XRzyM7oMneib9sfd2V2LQXh2pmWZALrFaGAQQz5hFwdJYUmH0msJLMT3s23Gr3L3goLOGhuwj0e7d225w7EllISKL-q1ixL91JjWmVu6p4jlEJMvlAZ22o0aAVq0dU2x5qOIjNSo1sDgiB0r8McCqaxSfrlsUZ7C2m_9anHUKPzzlCjHp9qDC6ivzhy0V-M1s3orUMx_-v10kmE4zTiVZ4O9RMId9YmaDRg2FtKubPSDzkNRGJHrxDTWq1AEsY_Cj7UZZ-vj8e8Uy-g4J1j1eSTv7SXVlPXaSyJnJfeuj2K-zY6PStRWlBrSo2Le_hCGYRa-ZuVzBGX_90thOIjGOa287E-OVUvVN2Ax4okYEa45HyvWldMlQa3iu1o1sC8z9SB8Za2XwmF9Iel0snm3ahBf9GLSPkDp7yr8avTlpUTaicwiyVco9GIC8_xQppyXbsBqOQeQxAVuRjTbuCU7iq_225JS-isSgyE-86NnVubvyGostx1znOPiEZLwWzuK9eY5O0dpRbYehtxQorSX22ShPr58vlkGNwtIOt9GDhjVbg6zjeNFmQShlN3qTfG2wDEk6ohjSmYfdMX6y0D1Fwlkg9fm4j7Yl8T0oHSqHqUR8EMNnnbJk5phuEzSOuJvqKuHKP2YkZgB0kYsh-geNB7Yxd1LZfemOC20sS_V_u0sCl5eJiq6ubsgLdIWgOCCIXBkHum-XUpeq413PifE88dClcENNEdaBHUahjfKdivRNifX5-OmXFQXZrQ2RK6G-cgGfO70jCznG5uBvpnx7Tx_qt7MaSzOgDehe7SW5V8TPIuNNyNMcUViBWlHy1sLN6elH066tD5scerdKifP0K4hdnqdRN22J3P9JZmwFM4bkVQbGGXd5lzdPv6LfaeBTp67vo7AHXQ7ALfmK4sl78IU9YQ8ntl0UEQg_KM678NjGHBrVg7OEmA976q9XYQ2AVKUMvCSRNMmInqhMpLzbU%3D) and I keep noticing the same thing.

subject: Demand Ilhan Omar’s REMOVAL from Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
We need your name on that list today.
|
---
| | | | Patriot,
Ilhan Omar _**attacks**_ our values. She _**mocks**_ our heroes. She spreads messages that _**divide**_ Americans — _all while siding with radical agendas that_** __threaten__** _the very future of our nation._
That kind of leadership might be tolerated elsewhere, but in the United States, _**_it is unacceptable_**_** _._**
We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. That’s why citizens in **your state** are standing up, and we’re collecting **1,850 signatures** demanding immediate accountability. **We need your name on that list today.**
**[SHOULD ILHAN OMAR BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE?](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
---
|
---
[YES — ADD MY NAME](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[NO — I’M NOT SIGNING](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Every signature is a stand. Every signature is a warning. Every signature says loud and clear: **[we will _not_ let radicals like Ilhan Omar tear our country apart](https://link.email.brittforsenate.).**
|
---
**[]()[Add your name NOW to make your voice heard:](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
|

[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|

\- Patriot Alerts (via Team Britt)
|

[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
Senator Katie Britt didn’t come to Washington to sit on the sidelines. She came to fight — for Alabama, for our families, and for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_
While the Left tries to tear down everything we hold dear, Katie Britt is standing her ground — securing our borders, protecting our children, and defending every hardworking Alabamian who feels left behind.

**This fight isn’t easy. But Katie Britt never backs down — and Team Britt is right there with her.**

Now, she’s counting on you to join the fight.
|

[JOIN TEAM BRITT >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)

name: Nancy Lacore
subject: I’m concerned about Pete Hegseth.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Hi there, it’s Nancy Lacore, the Democrat running to flip South Carolina’s First District.
I have a lot of thoughts about what’s been going on with Pete Hegseth.
Not only did he remove me from my position as Chief of the Navy Reserve after 35 years of service, but he’s actively undermining the foundation of our military.
Hegseth has fired more than a dozen senior military officers, including an Army chief of staff and two other generals who were ousted recently.
And now, he’s waging a war with Iran that could put our national security and countless American lives on the line.
That kind of behavior isn’t just destabilizing – it’s dangerous.
Now more than ever, we need leadership that’s rooted in honor, service, and respect. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s First District.
If we’re going to flip this seat and take back a Democratic House Majority, I need your help. Can you make a split donation of $25 or whatever you can, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
I’ll be honest, folks, I’m concerned.
While global tensions rise, the last thing we need is reckless leadership that’s willing to gamble with American lives.
We need steady, experienced leaders who are focused on delivering results – not inciting chaos, playing political games, and putting their own interests above the nation’s.
And I’m running for Congress to restore that kind of leadership – but we have a long road ahead of us to flip this seat and restore some accountability to Washington.
This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and it could decide control of the House. So I need all hands on deck to win. So I have to humbly ask: Will you split $25 today to support Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT MAGA! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
With my deepest respect and gratitude,
RADM Nancy Lacore

clean_body: Hi there, it’s Nancy Lacore, the Democrat running to flip South Carolina’s First District. I have a lot of thoughts about what’s been going on with Pete Hegseth. Not only did he remove me from my position as Chief of the Navy Reserve after 35 years of service, but he’s actively undermining the foundation of our military. Hegseth has fired more than a dozen senior military officers, including an Army chief of staff and two other generals who were ousted recently. And now, he’s waging a war with Iran that could put our national security and countless American lives on the line. That kind of behavior isn’t just destabilizing – it’s dangerous. Now more than ever, we need leadership that’s rooted in honor, service, and respect. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s First District. If we’re going to flip this seat and take back a Democratic House Majority, I need your help. Can you make a split donation of $25 or whatever you can, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [] DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [] I’ll be honest, folks, I’m concerned. While global tensions rise, the last thing we need is reckless leadership that’s willing to gamble with American lives. We need steady, experienced leaders who are focused on delivering results – not inciting chaos, playing political games, and putting their own interests above the nation’s. And I’m running for Congress to restore that kind of leadership – but we have a long road ahead of us to flip this seat and restore some accountability to Washington. This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and it could decide control of the House. So I need all hands on deck to win. So I have to humbly ask: Will you split $25 today to support Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [] CHIP IN TO DEFEAT MAGA! >> [] With my deepest respect and gratitude, RADM Nancy Lacore [] Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide. name: kiss our blue wave GOODBYE [via Blue Amp Action]
subject: 5 states need your urgent attention, Peter….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| We need you to know why this moment is so damn important.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=1&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11950?t=2&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_)Did you know that five states have **toss-up** governor races that Democrats can **win**? [](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11092?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Govenor-Toss-ups_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=3&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_) [**Before we explain more, can you make a grassroots donation of _only_ $5 that will help Democrats pull ahead and win these states?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11092?%3Fsource=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Govenor-Toss-ups_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_) | [DONATE $5](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11122?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Govenor-Toss-ups_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_)
---
Peter, **we need you to know why this moment is so _damn_ important.**
👉 Last year, we helped Abigail Spanberger make history. As Virginia's first female governor, she’s raised the minimum wage to $15 an hour, invested in the Commonwealth's workers, and fought back against reckless policies from the Trump Administration.
👉 This year, Trump _knows_ Democratic governors are the states' last line of defense against his MAGA agenda, and _will spend whatever_ it takes to keep a red firewall up!
👉 This is why we have to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. We set up a HUGE fundraising goal to elect more Democratic governors and protect our key incumbents!
But folks, we're still **$42,039 short of that goal** – and unless every single person reading this email rushes $5 or more, we can kiss our blue wave **_GOODBYE_**.
[**We need more governors in states like Arizona, Georgia, and beyond who will fight for the people and stop the GOP's recklessness. So please, will you make a special contribution of $5 or more so Democrats can win these toss-up states and continue holding Trump's GOP accountable?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11092?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.02_Govenor-Toss-ups_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2178%2E259176%2EuO5eT_)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | We need you to know why this moment is so damn important. You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you know that five states have toss-up governor races that Democrats can win? | Peter, we need you to know why this moment is so damn important. 👉 Last year, we helped Abigail Spanberger make history. As Virginia's first female governor, she’s raised the minimum wage to $15 an hour, invested in the Commonwealth's workers, and fought back against reckless policies from the Trump Administration. 👉 This year, Trump knows Democratic governors are the states' last line of defense against his MAGA agenda, and will spend whatever it takes to keep a red firewall up! 👉 This is why we have to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. We set up a HUGE fundraising goal to elect more Democratic governors and protect our key incumbents! But folks, we're still $42,039 short of that goal – and unless every single person reading this email rushes $5 or more, we can kiss our blue wave GOODBYE. Peter,

**White Liberals think it’s racist to say “Somali Fraud.” Well then, call me racist.**

The White Liberal on programs like MSNBC wants to have it both ways. Whenever one of their Liberal heroes accomplishes something, they raise them on a pedestal, praising them.

But as soon as one of their Liberal heroes commits a crime or fails, they call us racist for pointing it out and trying to hold them accountable.

They can’t have their cake and eat it too. If you want to celebrate a group’s accomplishments, you need to hold them accountable for their failures, too.

That’s why I’m unafraid to call what happened in Minnesota what it was: Somali Fraud. And I guess I’m a racist for that – a Black, Racist Republican. **[So will you support a “Black, Republican Racist” who’s in pursuit of the truth and justice?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe53162f3c1c46b48edcc9255e5d5a14&_e=ivXFbblWqCnZFTrnGL-iGTz2DkRnnOm5EjmzMzJMAbxrX44ohUb26aAuJsZ1Zlxpejhebt3ix-z7lJQ9uVaTwl_qcqvmCurPxmesMpFoxcKtIcQ3vbjQNc2WkyyPy_O_BxC-2NJAsgF5i1lTtDkaq1rXPdOkITKlElVleOhO7LsLgqTG-wwB5arlU-LYee-Icas83WjiiOCdGEcdbJmNqtzYkcQF0L0sHkcyBcnnmlR3yuTYG0IttzOXHcLRZJTVQf-BBpVYGQ_MJfGO0xFS3k0c_2Hdkb8wQizfPHhxbrfITwstQ9kHWQG2z9Hrl8aVywvbMZXpgdPERjtGAlgkT-eMjSnRFeoU9zrig9mCwR5y9RW0HBdzonbDhXQUdEYoOegqyh-ABGOYXUuMOYHNm5cEl3QRPIflqqtsjsB5F20BFGcCJgqDrsnxwLxDbFetJ_RIQDdfH1akaFO_mvgHC73NWxJbi2jvOnbUINCmF2jKExgLI5hOiH-sEJCIwtZjctWFW_sTzXFk9eXs0cwXsoY4JFOZeXPtRZwH5Nb3xRQ%3D)**

Somali Minnesotans STOLE OVER $9 BILLION, with some reports estimating up to $18 BILLION. And an independent journalist RECORDED EMPTY CHILDCARE CENTERS which received MILLIONS from taxpayers.

_If they want to call it racism for talking about this, fine. I call it the truth._

**I’m running for Senate from the belly of the beast to STOP THE FRAUD and WOKENESS that has corrupted Minnesota.**

But the establishment HATES ME for it. They’ll never help me. They’ll never support me. All I have is YOU.

**[Will you chip in $10 before midnight to help me win and hold ANYONE INVOLVED accountable?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe53162f3c1c46b48edcc9255e5d5a14&_e=ivXFbblWqCnZFTrnGL-iGTz2DkRnnOm5EjmzMzJMAbxrX44ohUb26aAuJsZ1Zlxpejhebt3ix-z7lJQ9uVaTwl_qcqvmCurPxmesMpFoxcKtIcQ3vbjQNc2WkyyPy_O_BxC-2NJAsgF5i1lTtDkaq1rXPdOkITKlElVleOhO7LtTbVkuRHEGR3UJLA-LnnZDElhuIHytCtRY4G6P8-L3C6RHNFN3sJdt4LPDMXtf-NcbGJVU1lBsJR4fz5Z0kKFhsFksW0rL9yDHeQKH8CT7TGfenEeEywEkrGFsF-fSkmAAXlKLe5ktdfRBu1xlezuduk-ihsynso51y-qqwAe_60Kh1G2Qe991h90onSxUWmBE96q2HXXJP4OcelGpBj62e6uitXpwMY6Oc56t4I6FQ3w6drlUgqntnVtWcYdj1-hZYwapt5Uk0scMN1R87qI_QV5p2nSMbyZsCpuO4tXMwhV-526SHjyxZM80aYFPEFlYs16rkSxiJA6h614vSokxxIYkDOqZ8Oc1ZZVrRL72wh9d0JuZDDzUvZeHw-LFtGQ%3D)**

clean_body: We couldn't be more different from Mark Baisley. = Lauren Boebert’s hand-picked candidate is chomping at the bit to flip this seat. He can’t wait to rubber-stamp the president’s cruel agenda. Can you believe that!? State Senator Mark Baisley has pledged to partner with the Trump administration. He’s vowed to create a national abortion ban and supports overturning common-sense gun control. = | | = We couldn’t be more different from Mark Baisley. He doesn’t seem to care that ICE is dragging people from their cars and killing people in the streets. He’s defending federal agents killing American citizens. We’re refusing to fund Trump’s secret police or give another penny to DHS until ICE is overhauled or shut down. Baisley would be proud to support President Trump as he increases your health care premiums to pay for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. We’re fighting to extend the ACA tax credits and lower health care costs. He’s even tried to overturn gay marriage in Colorado. As Governor, we signed the law that allowed same-sex couples to enter into civil unions. And in the Senate, we’ve protected marriage equality nationwide. The differences are clear: Mark Baisley will bend the knee to Trump. name: The Democrats
subject: Zohran Mamdani, Abigail Spanberger, and Mikie Sherrill
body:
---
Derek, it’s been almost six months since the 2025 elections, which means that in Virginia, New York, and New Jersey, Abigail Spanberger, Zohran Mamdani, and Mikie Sherrill have reached the 100-day mark in their terms. We wrote to you a lot in the lead up to last year’s elections about the work that these Democrats hoped to do to better the lives of their constituents, so we wanted to share an update on their first 100 days in office.
* In her first 100 days, Governor Spanberger signed bills to lower the price of insulin, **establish the first paid family and medical leave in the South** , and stop middlemen from inflating prescription drug costs. She’s invested billions of dollars in Virginia businesses, created more than 3,000 jobs, and **raised the minimum wage to $15 an hour.**
* Governor Sherrill opened her term by signing a series of **more than a dozen executive orders focused on making life more affordable** for New Jerseyans. She’s made improvements to New Jersey’s public transportation system. She **sued the Trump administration for withholding infrastructure funding** and signed executive orders to drive efficiency, transparency, and accountability across state government.
* In his first 100 days, Mayor Mamdani has secured **$1.2 billion in funding for universal child care** , won over $34 million in damages on behalf of tenants, and filled more than 100,000 potholes. In his first 100 days, **New York City reached record-low crime rates**. He has invested millions of dollars in small businesses and appointed a “Mom-and-Pop” czar.

**_This_ is what Democrats can accomplish in 100 days.** Derek, one year from now, we will have reached the 100th day of the 120th Congress. That could mean 100 more days of unchecked power for an even more empowered Donald Trump. _Or_ we could have 100 days of beginning to unravel the damage done by the Trump administration. 100 days of reimplementing the checks and balances that keep our democracy running. 100 days of Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. We know which option we’d prefer — and we think you do, too. [**So, if you’re with us, and electing a Democratic Congress matters to you, please chip in $7 to the DNC today. We’ll put your donation to work immediately to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, across the country — this November and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260502_6979_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6979_22930333__QPgo2&akid=6979%2E22930333%2E_QPgo2) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260502_6979_fr&refcode2=6979_22930333__QPgo2&akid=6979%2E22930333%2E_QPgo2)**
